chorus: “U Trai Jisu shen Un sa wan”

lines: U Trai Jisu shen Un sa wan;
To pynkhreh ba Un wan!
Na ïing bneng ban wan U la jan:
To pynkhreh ba Un wan!
U long U Trai ka hok jong ngi,
Un wan la ki jong ban shimti;
Ban synshar junom bad U hi,
To pynkhreh ba Un wan!
chorus: To phin pynkhreh kloi ba U Trai Un wan,
To phin pynkhreh kloi ba U Trai Un wan;
La ki sharak to pynshai,
Ha ka sngi ba wan U Trai;
To phin pynhreh kloi ba U Trai Un wan.

lines: Shen Un sa wan pat sha pyrthei;
To pynkhreh ba Un wan;
Ban synshar da bor, burom Blei;
To pynkhreh ba Un wan!
Bneng kan risa Haleluïa,
B'U wan siewspah ïaphi ïa nga;
Khreh kloi ban ïashem bad U Trai,
To pynkhreh ba Un wan!
Un wan ha bor baphylla tam;
To pynkhreh ba Un wan!
Shen turoi bneng kan sawa jam;
To pynkhreh ba Un wan!
Un wan sha pyrthei ban synshar,
Їa jaidbynriew Un wan bishar;
Ki b'la siewspah kin phyrnai phar,
To pynkhreh ba Un wan!

hymns.author: D.E.S.
hymns.reference: U Trai Jisu shen Un sa wan (113)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: U Trai Jisu shen Un sa wan (113)
hymns.db_name: 113. U Trai Jisu shen Un sa wan

lines: Ka ktien U Trai yn pyndep,
Kumba U la kular;
Ba Un wan pat sa shisien,
Їa pyrthei ban bishar;
Na sawdong kin ïa mih lang,
Ki khmat kin khmied sha bneng;
Ki ‘riewhok ne ki nonggop,
Ha khmat U Trai ngin ïeng.
Ki ‘riewbymman kin shyrkhei,
Ha jingwan jong U Trai,
Jinglanot khop ïa ki dei,
Ah shano pat kin phai,
Tang jinglynñiar ba sngewtriem,
Lad jinglait ym don shuh;
Lehnohei ruh ban babe,
Trai ïa ki Um ithuh.
Ka jingwan pat jong U Trai,
Shen shen kan sa wan hi;
Ka khot ïa ngi ban sharai,
Namar kata ka sngi;
To ngin long kiba la khreh,
Ban ïashem bad U Trai;
Ba ngin ïoh long lem bad U,
Ha burom baphyrnai.
chorus: Ah Trai, to hikai to ai bor,
Katba im ban ïai sharai;
Haduh kata ka por.

hymns.author: J.F.J.
hymns.reference: Ka ktien U Trai yn pyndep (114)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ka ktien U Trai yn pyndep (114)
hymns.db_name: 114. Ka ktien U Trai yn pyndep

lines: Shuwa ba Un leit sha byneng,
Jisu U la kular ei;
Ba Un phah ha ngi l'U Mynsiem,
Ha ka Balang ban ïai trei;
Їa ki synran, ka la biang,
Ka jingaiei U Mynsiem.
La jingkular U la pyndep,
Ynda sha byneng U kiew;
Te U Mynsiem U la hiar,
La pynim ki hajar briew;
Ha ka Pentekost la burom,
Їa ka kyrteng Jisu Khrist.
Ka jingkular rim jong U Blei,
Ka dang biang eh ïa ngi;
Mynta te ngi lah ban duwai,
Ba Un wan U Mynsiem hi;
Ah Trai Jisu, ïa ngi kynmaw,
Theh noh shibun U Mynsiem.
Ah Mynsiem Bakhuid jingkular,
Wan da jingai jong Me hi;
Me ba isnei bymju kylla,
Da ka bor to trei ha ngi;
Pynim, pynshai ïa ki bymman,
Pynlong smat ïa la ki briew.

hymns.author: J.C.E.
hymns.reference: Shuwa ba Un leit sha byneng (115)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Shuwa ba Un leit sha byneng (115)
hymns.db_name: 115. Shuwa ba Un leit sha byneng

hymns.sub_title: To khie, ko ksangti U Trai

lines: To khie, to khie, kup la ka bor,
Ko ksangti kor U Kynrad;
Kumba Me leh ha mynbarim,
Pynim, pynshait, ngi kyrpad.
Ban meh ka ding byneng, Ah Blei,
To trei, to phah l'U Mynsiem;
Lem bad ki ktien bakhuid, Ah Trai,
To ai ka bor ban pynim.
Ah Trai, ha ngi ai kylluid War,
Ka kular jong U Kypa;
U Mynsiem hi ha la jingtrei,
To pyndei ha ngi mynta.

hymns.author: J. R.
hymns.reference: To khie to khie kup la ka bor (116)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: To khie, to khie, kup la ka bor (116)
hymns.db_name: 116. To khie, to khie, kup la ka bor

lines: To hiar Mynsiem Bakhuid ha ngi,
To pynshai ha ki dohnud;
Mynsiem U Khrist Me long ma Me,
Ale, ïa ngi ban pynkhuid.
Jingim, jingkyrmen bad jingshai,
Ki long jingai ki jong Me;
Ki khymat jong ngi to pynsleh,
Da jingsleh kordor jong Me.
Nongshun jong ngi baroh to beh,
Ka jingsuk de ai hapoh;
U Nongïalam jong ngi U Blei,
Ban bha kin ïatrei baroh.
Hikai ithuh ï'U Blei U Kpa,
U Khun ba bha bad ïa Me;
Uwei U Blei na bymjukut,
Uba long Laingut ruh de.
Ban ïaroh ï'U Blei ba isnei,
Ha pateng bynriew baroh;
U Kpa, U Khun bad U Mynsiem,
Laingut syriem ban ïaroh.

hymns.reference: To hiar Mynsiem Bakhuid ha ngi (117)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: To hiar Mynsiem Bakhuid ha ngi (117)
hymns.db_name: 117. To hiar Mynsiem Bakhuid ha ngi

lines: Mynsiem ba bha sha ngi to wan,
Da lam ka jingshai byneng;
Me long Mynsiem U Khrist ba nang,
Ka sniew ban wiang kylleng.
Ka dohnud jong ngi to pynshai,
Ah Trai, to ai jingshisha;
Ba ngin ïa ing jingrhem ba im,
Ka mynsiem ha la ka rta.
Jingieit, jingkyrmen, jingim hi,
Dei ki jingai ki jong Me;
Da kine shem b'U Blei U trei,
B'U sei ka bymman shane.

hymns.reference: Mynsiem ba bha sha ngi to wan (118)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Mynsiem ba bha sha ngi to wan (118)
hymns.db_name: 118. Mynsiem ba bha sha ngi to wan

lines: Ko lyer byneng ïa mynta beh,
Ba ka sngi kan sa noh;
Namar ka kyrteng jong Me theh,
Mynsiem, jingshait ngin ïoh.
Ah bor byneng bym ju shah jop,
Pynpaw ïa Uba ïap;
Ka jor ka snam ï'u briew b'la ngop,
Sha jingjot ban sa hap.
Ah Nongpyntyngen ka Balang,
Ha pydeng jong ngi shong;
To nang ïalam ba ngin ïanang,
Nongbeh jingkhuid ban long.

hymns.reference: Ko lyer byneng ia mynta beh (119)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ko lyer byneng ïa mynta beh (119)
hymns.db_name: 119. Ko lyer byneng ïa mynta beh

hymns.sub_title: Ka Jingduwai ban ïoh ïa U Mynsiem

lines: To phah ma Me ïa U Mynsiem,
Ba dawa Jisu hi;
Ka jingtrei jong U kum ka ding,
Ah phah ïa U sha ngi.
Kat kum ka kular kaba kor,
Shah ba yn theh na neng,
Їa U Mynsiem Bakhuid ka bor,
U Blei, ha ngi ba seng.
Kat kum ka mon jong Me, Un wan,
Pynkynduh ïa ki briew;
Їa ki nongïoh byneng ban tan,
Ba shatei kin ïoh kiew.
Kumba Me kular, Trai ba khraw,
Shah ba Un hiar kloi;
U Nongpyntyngen sha ri khlaw,
Ha ngi ka dei b'Un poi.

hymns.author: H. R.
hymns.reference: To phah ma Me ia U Mynsiem (120)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: To phah ma Me ïa U Mynsiem (120)
hymns.db_name: 120. To phah ma Me ïa U Mynsiem

lines: To wan Mynsiem, to Men pynkhleiñ,
Ki kyjat thait jong nga;
Ai ngan ïohi da ka jingngeit,
Kata ka ri ba bha.
Ba ngan iehnoh ïa ka ri khlaw,
Ri shitom bad jingpang;
Їaid ruh sha ri ki jingsngewbha,
Jong ka ki ïaisah bang.
Nga sah ha kynroh kum nongap,
Ba ap jingshai ka sngi;
Nga kwah kan mih ka sngi ba khraw,
Ka jingjop Kalbari.
Ki jingsngewbha pyrthei la jah,
Jingbang jong ki la duh,
Ym don ba sah ka jingsngewbha,
Tang ïaroh Jisu shuh.
Mynsiem ba bha, Me la ïalam,
Riewkhuid ruh mynbarim;
Їa nga ruh to bytin ma Me,
Ha lynti kaba im.
Bun jingpynpep, jingjynjar ruh,
Pynbakla ha ri khlaw;
Me, Nongpyntyngen kiba tlot,
Me, Nongïalam ba khraw.
Kat kiba la ïalam ma Me,
Ki long ki khun U Blei;
Їalam ïa nga ha ki jingeh,
Da bor ka jingaiei.

hymns.reference: To wan Mynsiem to Men pynkhlain (121)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: To wan Mynsiem, to Men pynkhlaiñ (121)
hymns.db_name: 121. To wan Mynsiem, to Men pynkhlaiñ

hymns.sub_title: U Mynsiem ha ka ri them

lines: Ko Nongpynim ki nongïap hi,
Wan da l'U Mynsiem ban pynkhih;
To pyrsad jur ha ka ri them,
Ban im ki shyieng b'la ïap la slem.
Mynsiem Bakhuid jong Me na neng,
To phah kyrhai ha ngi kylleng;
Ki dohnud jong ngi Un pyndap,
Їing Blei ngin long, b'Un shong ïarap.

hymns.reference: Ko Nongpynim ki nongiap hi (122)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ko Nongpynim ki nongïap hi (122)
hymns.db_name: 122. Ko Nongpynim ki nongïap hi

lines: Baroh ki rukom niam blei,
Kat kiba don ha ka pyrthei;
Ka snam, lymne ka mon u briew,
Kim lah pynkylla dohnud sniew.
Ka bor U Blei tang kata hi,
Ba lah pynim mynsiem jong ngi,
Pynkha ïa ngi ha dur U Khun;
To pynlong lok ïa ki nongshun.
U Mynsiem, kum ka lyer ha them,
U pyrsad ha ki khun jingrem;
U pynkha arsien ruh ïa ki,
U sait ka pop ka dohnud hi.
Ki mynsiem jong ngi to pynkhih,
Na kaba thiah ïap jong ki;
To pynim pat, ba ngin ïoh ïeng,
Ban ïaid ka lynti sha byneng.

hymns.reference: Baroh ki rukom niam blei (123)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Baroh ki rukom niam blei (123)
hymns.db_name: 123. Baroh ki rukom niam blei

hymns.sub_title: Ka bor U Mynsiem ha ka dohnud

lines: Bor ki jong Mynsiem Bymjukut,
Ha ka jor ka kuna Blei;
Ki ban pynlong dohnud runar,
Їa ki soh ba bha ban sei;
Ah ki jingthung,
Soh jingaiei U Mynsiem.
Ki mawsiang Salem bymman,
Ki b'la pyrta ban pynduh,
Їa U Khun ka burom —‘shim noh,
To sahnarphyna ïa U!’
Me la dung ngak,
Kita ki la jem la ïam.
Lada'n wan Mynsiem ba jemnud,
Ha ki dohnud kum jong ngi,
Pynitynnad ïa ki baroh,
Da ka snam U Jisu hi,
Ka jingïaroh,
Ha byneng kan sawa jam.

hymns.reference: Bor ki jong Mynsiem Bymjukut (124)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Bor ki jong Mynsiem Bymjukut (124)
hymns.db_name: 124. Bor ki jong Mynsiem Bymjukut

lines: Ah Mynsiem khuid ka byneng,
Mynshuwa ba ngan ïap,
Da jinghikai sngewtyngen,
Shah ba ngan shem jingmap.
Ka jingmap, Ah ka jingmap!
Ka jingmap phar ba-ei,
Long shuwa eh ba nga wad,
Ha snam U Khun U Blei.
Don ha U bor bymjukut,
Jingstad ba khraw ba-ei;
Bun phew klur ki jor ba bha,
Ha snam jong U ki shlei;
Ha U ki kynja baroh,
Ba uba pop u kwah,
Napoh bun jingartatien,
Sha neng un lait im bha.
Ka dei ïa nga ban ïap thai,
Ba thrang ka um ba sngur;
La jan iapler leit jingleit,
Ha khlaw bymnud nga tur;
Sha jaka phlang to ïalam,
Harud um iaid ba jem,
Te hangta kiba sngewthait,
Ki buh ki khlieh ban dem.

hymns.reference: Ah Mynsiem khuid ka byneng (125)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ah Mynsiem khuid ka byneng (125)
hymns.db_name: 125. Ah Mynsiem khuid ka byneng

lines: Mynsiem Bakhuid to wan,
Ka jingdum to pynpra;
Pynpeit, pynshai ïa la ki briew,
Nang trei Mynsiem ba bha.
Pynkhlaiñ ka jingngeit tlot,
Ka ding byneng pynmeh;
Jingsngew artatien to pynduh,
Pynjem ki dohnud eh.
Pynkynduh ïa ki briew,
Їalam sha diengphyna;
Ha lynti beit bytin ma Me,
Ha ri khlaw bah to da.
Pynpaw ï'U Jisu Khrist,
Nongpynim ka pyrthei;
U Trai ki paid, U Blei donbor,
U Syiem ka jingaiei.

hymns.author: R. J.
hymns.reference: Mynsiem Bakhuid to wan (126)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Mynsiem Bakhuid to wan (126)
hymns.db_name: 126. Mynsiem Bakhuid to wan

lines: Ko Mynsiem ka jingpynthymmai,
Ah hiar da ka bor ba khraw;
Pynduh ruh ka buit u soitan,
Ka jingsniew na ngi to law;
Їa ka lyer bneng, Ah Trai to phah,
Їa ki nongpop ban pynim;
Ai ngin sngew ka ktien ka jong Me,
Isnei Kynrad, ai ngin im.
Ryngkat bad ki shakri jong Me,
Phah l'U Mynsiem ban ïatrei;
To pynkynduh ïa ki nongpop,
Pynpaw la ka jingaiei;
Їa ki mynsiem jong ngi mynta
To pynshai, Ah Trai ba bha;
Ai ngin mad ka jingieit jong Me,
Lam ïa ngi sha ka diengphna.

hymns.author: S. E.
hymns.reference: Ko Mynsiem ka jingpynthymmai (127)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ko Mynsiem ka jingpynthymmai (127)
hymns.db_name: 127. Ko Mynsiem ka jingpynthymmai

hymns.sub_title: Ka Jingthrang ban ïoh ïa U Mynsiem Bakhuid

lines: Mynsiem Bakhuid U Blei,
Ba dap da jingaiei;
Pynkynduh nga bapop
Їoh ngan hap sha jingjot.
chorus: To pynim, pynthymmai,
Ha dohnud jong nga shong,
Ta ïalam, nang hikai
Khun U Blei ngan ïoh long.

lines: Mynsiem Bakhuid na neng,
Wan hiar ha nga ba rem;
Pynkhuid pynkyntang noh,
Tang ï'U Blei ngan ïaroh.
Mynsiem Bakhuid to wan,
Diengphna pynpaw hajan;
Pynkhuid kloi kum ïa nga,
Pynkup bor da shisha.

hymns.author: L. D.
hymns.reference: Mynsiem Bakhuid U Blei (128)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Mynsiem Bakhuid U Blei (128)
hymns.db_name: 128. Mynsiem Bakhuid U Blei

hymns.section_heading: IV. SHAPHANG KA KTIEN U BLEI.
hymns.sub_title: Ka Jingïaid ha ki hukum (Salm cxix)

lines: Suk u briew uba khuid ka lad,
Ba wad ki hukum janai,
Ba shida hi la ka jingïaid,
Ba shait ban bat ki tynrai.
Kumno, Ah Trai, u samla'n bat,
Un sumar khuid la jingleit?
Da kaba sumar pyrkhing eh,
Ban leh khlem shah ban kyrbeit.
Sngewtynnad eh, Ah Trai, ha nga,
Ban phla ka ktien ka jutang:
Ha kane hi ngan ïai buh lut,
Ka jingmut bad jingshemphang.
Ka sharak, lynti ban ïalam,
Ban jam, ngan ïoh ka jingshai;
Nga smai ba ngan ym kylla shuh,
Ngam lyndet ruh ki tynrai.
Nang kyrshan, Ah nang kyrshan, Trai,
Ngan phai ban ïoh khiah junom;
Bad ha ki hukum ngan sa shem,
Ka jingskhem bad ka burom.

hymns.reference: Suk u briew uba khuid ka lad (129)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Suk u briew uba khuid ka lad (129)
hymns.db_name: 129. Suk u briew uba khuid ka lad

hymns.section_heading: IV. SHAPHANG KA KTIEN U BLEI.

lines: Ki ktien b'la kyrkhu jong U Trai,
Jingshai ban shngaiñ u bynriew;
Na jingdum tliw ba nga la ngam,
Kin lam sh'U Blei, kin kyntiew.
Da sngap ki mynsiem baroh phar,
Ba ïar ki ktien jingkyrmen;
Ki long ka jingim ï'u nongpop,
L'u ngop ha rem, la tyngen.
Ki jingpynpaw U Blei na neng,
Ha ki U ïeng U Kynrad;
Ban ai jinghun ha ka pyrthei,
Khlem pud U trei U pyrkhat.
Їa ngin ïakyntiew la ka ktien,
Їariwai hin ha lynti;
Ka lad ka jingpynim la paw,
Ban law ïa ngi na byndi.

hymns.reference: Ki ktien bla kyrkhu jong U Trai (130)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ki ktien b'la kyrkhu jong U Trai (130)
hymns.db_name: 130. Ki ktien b'la kyrkhu jong U Trai

hymns.section_heading: IV. SHAPHANG KA KTIEN U BLEI.

lines: Ka jingshai bad ka bor ba khraw,
Ka long ka Ktien U Blei;
Shikynnoh em, kam lah ban duh,
Da shisha kan sah skhem.
Ka Ktien ba thiang kum ka ngap,
Ba dap da jinggaiei;
Ka ïai pynpaw ki jor ba bha,
Ka jinglong khuid U Blei.
Ki kular jong U kum ka sngi,
Da lei lei kim lah khih;
Shikynnoh em kan ym lah jah,
Ka Ktien U Blei jong ngi.
Ki kular jong U ba la shon,
Ki um ba kyrsoi sngur;
B'la pun ka lynti phyrnai eh,
Shaneng sha khlieh ki khlur.

hymns.reference: Ka jingshai bad ka bor ba khraw (131)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ka jingshai bad ka bor ba khraw (131)
hymns.db_name: 131. Ka jingshai bad ka bor ba khraw

hymns.section_heading: IV. SHAPHANG KA KTIEN U BLEI.

lines: Ki sngur ki wah U Blei, ha khymih,
Ki tuid ba ki pilgrim kin suk;
Ki madan iwbih bad ba jyrngam,
Ki sei ki soh bang ban pynsuk!.
Tang mad ki soh shngiam bad sla de,
Na kine ki dieng kiba mih,
Men die noh ki mar pyrthei baroh,
Ban thied te ïa kane ka bri.

hymns.author: J. R.
hymns.reference: Ki sngur ki wah U Blei ha khymih (132)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ki sngur ki wah U Blei, ha khymih (132)
hymns.db_name: 132. Ki sngur ki wah U Blei, ha khymih

hymns.section_heading: IV. SHAPHANG KA KTIEN U BLEI.

lines: Ki jingmut ki jong U Blei,
Ha Baibl ki la paw,
Kiba long ïaineh junom,
Jingshisha kaba khraw;
Jingkular don ba shisha,
Ba la pynskhem da snam,
Kham kor de ïa ka ksiar,
Bad paila kordor tam.
Ka phla ha bynriew baroh,
Kaba long shisha hi,
Ba U Blei ha ka burom,
U thaw ï'u kpa jong ki;
Ka jinglong suk ba nyngkong,
U briew u pynduh hi;
Na kata mih jingsngewsih,
Jingrem ka jait jong ngi.
Ngi shem ruh ha ka Baibl,
Ka ktien ba sawa jam,
Ba don ka jingim janai,
Їa uba tyngit tam;
Jingpynïasuk la pyndep,
Ha jingïap jong U Khun;
U Blei, namar U Jisu,
U pydiang ki nongshun.
Ka Baibl kaba kynthup,
Ki hukum jong U Blei;
Jingsneng jong ka kham kordor,
Їa baroh ka pyrthei,
Ha kane don bun hajar,
Atiar kiba nep;
Khlem pud ïa ka ngan pule,
Ngan pyrkhat khlem da pep.

hymns.reference: Ki jingmut ki jong U Blei (133)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ki jingmut ki jong U Blei (133)
hymns.db_name: 133. Ki jingmut ki jong U Blei

hymns.section_heading: IV. SHAPHANG KA KTIEN U BLEI.
hymns.sub_title: Ka Jingïaroh ïa ka Ktien U Blei

lines: Ba ngi la ïoh ka Ktien U Blei,
Ngin ïaroh;
Ka long ka ktien sngewbha aiei,
Ngin ïaroh,
Kum ka sngi ba pynshai sngur bha,
Pynjem ka lynti khlaw ka lah;
Ba ngi la ïoh ka jingshisha,
Ngin ïaroh.
Kham thiang hi ia ka rewngap,
Ngin ïaroh;
Ngin ïoh ka jingsngewbha ba dap,
Ngin ïaroh.
Їa baroh lang kham kor shsha,
Їa ksiar bad ïa ki paila;
Ka Ktien U Blei long la ka spah,
Ngin ïaroh.

hymns.reference: Ba ngi la ioh ka Ktien U Blei (134)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ba ngi la ïoh ka Ktien U Blei (134)
hymns.db_name: 134. Ba ngi la ïoh ka Ktien U Blei

hymns.section_heading: IV. SHAPHANG KA KTIEN U BLEI.

lines: Ah to kren ba jemnud Jisu,
Ki Ktien jong Me long umsoh,
Kiba lah pynmih ka jingsuk,
Kaba dap da jor baroh.
Ka jingsawa ka jingpynlong,
Ki jingpynshoi doh bad pop;
Ha jingsawa sngewbha jong Me,
Ki jam jai jai, ki duh khop.
Kiei kiei ba itynnad,
Kiba bang ruh jong pyrthei;
Ym lah nujor bad jingsawa,
Ki ktien sngur ka jingmap ei.
Ai ngin sngew jingsawa jong Me,
Ka jingsawa ba donbor;
Hapoh jong nga, ha ka dohnud,
Pynmih jingsuk kaba kor.
Ong ha nga ba Me long jong nga,
Ong da ka ktien kaba shai;
To pynduh ka jingartatien,
Kren ha nga, to kren, Ah Trai!
Ai ngan ïohsngew kawei ka ktien,
Kaba mih na byneng hi;
Ki jingsheptieng kin jah junom,
Jingsuk bymjukut kan mih.

hymns.author: H. R.
hymns.reference: Ah to kren ba jemnud Jisu (135)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ah to kren ba jemnud Jisu (135)
hymns.db_name: 135. Ah to kren ba jemnud Jisu

hymns.section_heading: IV. SHAPHANG KA KTIEN U BLEI.
hymns.sub_title: Ka Jingthiang ka Ktien U Blei

lines: Ka Ktien jong Me kaba kordor,
Kum ka ksiar b'la pynphrang;
Ka Ktien jong Me ka itynnad,
Ka Ktien jong Me kaba bang,
Kaba dap da rewngap,
Dohnud jong nga ka pyndap.
Kan ïalam ka Ktien ka jong Me,
Lyngba ka ri khlaw bymnud;
Kane long ‘u Iyoh’ ba tyngshaiñ,
Ba ki Israel kin nang bud,
Kaba kor, dap da jor,
Ban ïalam ruh ba donbor.
Haba kynmaw kito ki sngi,
Ba nga shem sngewbha ba bun;
Ka jingsawa ka Ktien jong Me,
Dohnud jong nga ka pynhun;
Suk ma ki, ba ïohi,
Khymat jong Me, byneng hi.
Ah! ban sngew ka Ktien ka jong Me,
Ba kren pasiaw bad ba shon:
Їoh ngan ïaid wir khlem jingpyrkhat,
Sha kadiang sha kamon.
Nang bytin da ka Ktien,
Ngan ïaid beit, khlem kylla dien.

hymns.reference: Ka Ktien jong Me kaba kordor (136)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ka Ktien jong Me kaba kordor (136)
hymns.db_name: 136. Ka Ktien jong Me kaba kordor

hymns.section_heading: IV. SHAPHANG KA KTIEN U BLEI.
hymns.sub_title: Ka Bor ka Ktien U Trai

lines: Phah, Ah Trai ïa la jingsawa,
Mynta da ka bor ba khraw;
Ban ïaleh ïa ka Ktien jong Me,
Shah, b'u briew um lah, kan paw;
‘Їaid kylleng, ding byneng’,
Thang ka bymman bad jingmeng.
Ka Ktien jong Me ka la biang,
Ban ïalam sha kut ka khlaw;
Long ‘ka jingshai’ long ‘u lyoh’,
Ban ithuh ba Me da paw;
Ktien ba neh, long ha Me,
Kum ha kane ai ngin leh.

hymns.reference: Phah Ah Trai ia la jingsawa (137)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Phah, Ah Trai ïa la jingsawa (137)
hymns.db_name: 137. Phah, Ah Trai ïa la jingsawa

hymns.section_heading: IV. SHAPHANG KA KTIEN U BLEI.

lines: Ban wad ïa ka ktien jong Me,
Ah Trai, ïarap ïa nga;
Ha ban da shem ï'U Jisu,
U Nongpynim ba bha.
U long U Blei ba donbor,
Ban shna ïa ki jingpang;
La khraw ka pop ka jong nga,
Ban pynduh khoit U nang.

hymns.author: J.C.E.
hymns.reference: Ban wad ia ka ktien jong Me (138)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ban wad ïa ka ktien jong Me (138)
hymns.db_name: 138. Ban wad ïa ka ktien jong Me

hymns.section_heading: IV. SHAPHANG KA KTIEN U BLEI.
hymns.sub_title: Ka burom ka Ktien U Blei

lines: Ah peit ki ‘mat jong nga ban ïohi,
Ka burom ka ktien jong Me phar;
Kham myntoi ïa nga ban shem kane,
Їa kaba ïoh rupa bad ksiar.
Ka pyrthei kan ing bad ki paila,
Ka Ktien U Blei jong nga kan neh;
Ka jingim bymjukut long ithuh,
Ї'U Jisu, U Briew bad U Blei.

hymns.reference: Ah peit ki mat jong nga ban iohi (139)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ah peit ki mat jong nga ban ïohi (139)
hymns.db_name: 139. Ah peit ki mat jong nga ban ïohi

hymns.section_heading: IV. SHAPHANG KA KTIEN U BLEI.

lines: Baibl ba nga ieit,
Ka long ka Ktien U Blei;
Ka ïalap ï'U Jisu,
Nongpynim ka pyrthei.
chorus: Ka Baibl, ka Baibl,
Ka Baibl, ba nga ieit;
Ka Baibl, ka Baibl,
Ka long ka Ktien U Blei.

lines: Shem ruh ha ka Baibl,
Ka jingieit bah U Blei;
Ba ï'U Khun U aiti,
Їa ngi ban pynim ei.
Baibl ba nga ieit,
Ngan kohnguh tang ïa ka;
Kan sa long ka sharak,
Ban ïalam beit ia nga.

hymns.author: C.M.S.
hymns.reference: Baibl ba nga ieit (140)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Baibl ba nga ieit (140)
hymns.db_name: 140. Baibl ba nga ieit

hymns.section_heading: IV. SHAPHANG KA KTIEN U BLEI.

chorus: Bet ï'u Symbai Babha.

lines: Bet ï'u symbai babha,
Bet mynstep, mynsngi bad mynmiet;
Bet ï'u symbai babha,
Ka Ktien jong U Blei:
Bet ï'u symbai babha,
Ha ki khyndew kiba seisoh;
Bet ï'u symbai babha,
Ka Ktien jong U Blei.
chorus: Bet ï'u symbai babha,
Bet ï'u symbai babha,
Bet ï'u symbai da jingïaishah bad
jingjemnud;
Pynbna khubor Gospel
Bad jingmap ei halor diengphna,
Bet ï'u symbai babha,
Ka Ktien jong U Blei.

lines: Bet ï'u symbai babha
Ha ki jait bynriew ka pyrthei;
Bet ï'u symbai babha,
Ka Ktien jong U Blei:
Bet ï'u symbai ka ktien,
Khlem jingthohbria ha la jingim,
Bet ï'u symbai map ei,
Ka Ktien jong U Blei.

hymns.author: D.S.Y.
hymns.reference: Bet iu symbai babha (141)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Bet ï’u symbai babha (141)
hymns.db_name: 141. Bet ï'u symbai babha

lines: To ai ban ïasyllok ki kur ha U Trai,
U hukum U Khrist ba kin ieit khlem wai;
Ka jinglong shitylli ki khun jong U Blei,
Ka pynpaw ka burom U Khrist ha pyrthei.
To pynlong ïa ngi kum ka Balang ba seng,
Ha dur jong ki Lai Ngut ha Uwei ha neng;
Ka jingïalong kawei ka Balang ba bha,
Ka phla ïa ki briew ba ï'U Khrist Me la phah.
Ka Balang shitylli ka ïoh ka bor Blei,
Ban ïeng ha ka thyma, ban jop ka pyrthei,
Ka khot ïa u bynriew, sha jingjot b'la hap,
Ka lam sha ka jingim U Jisu b'la ïap.

hymns.reference: To ai ban iasyllok ki kur ha U Trai (142)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: To ai ban ïasyllok ki kur ha U Trai (142)
hymns.db_name: 142. To ai ban ïasyllok ki kur ha U Trai

lines: Yn i ka Seïon kum ka ïor,
La hangne tyngit eh;
Kan mih ruh lawei da ka bor,
Ba khuid, ba phyrnai de.
Ha pydeng kan ym long ba swai,
Kan tyngshaiñ kat ka sngi;
Kan kup ka hok U Khrist U Trai,
U Nongbahkhlieh jong ngi.
Ka dei ki jynjar diengphyna,
Shi-yrta hi ban bud;
Їa kane ai ngan shah sngewbha,
Ka shitom ngam bynnud.
Ai bor ngan ïaid ngan kyrmen skhem,
La shah ka um ka ding;
Ha ka bakut, junom ngan shem,
Їa U Blei khlem jingtieng.
Ї'U Nongpyntyngen khuid to ai,
Ka jingshai ha ri khlaw;
Ka ding ba kular hi U Trai,
Mynsiem U Blei ba thaw.
Na ri shongmraw ‘u Pharo’ Syiem,
Sha ri riewkhuid shaneng;
Mynsngi ‘u lyoh’ mynmiet ‘ka ding’,
Їoh bakla lad kylleng.

hymns.author: H. R.
hymns.reference: Yn i ka Seion kum ka ior (143)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Yn i ka Seïon kum ka ïor (143)
hymns.db_name: 143. Yn i ka Seïon kum ka ïor

lines: Ah! shnong ba khuid ha Seïon,
Ba shong U Syiem jingsuk;
Nga sngew ban ïap shisyndon,
Ban i ba pha la duk.
La twa ka templ U Blei,
Ki khyrdop kumjuh hi;
Ki Jentil ki ïarykhie,
Їa U Blei bad ïa ngi.
To kynmaw ï'U Messaïah,
Ha Kanaan ri b'la im;
B'la shah ka beiñ ka shipa,
Їa pha ban ïoh pynim.
Їa U ba pha pynshitom,
Haba ïa pha U wad;
Wan phai, to ngeit, Ah Seïon!
Balei phan bakla lad?

hymns.reference: Ah shnong ba khuid ha Seion (144)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ah! shnong ba khuid ha Seïon (144)
hymns.db_name: 144. Ah! shnong ba khuid ha Seïon

hymns.sub_title: Ka jingïada U Blei ïa ka Balang

lines: Ah Trai! kynmaw la ka Balang,
To wan kloi, ïarap, ïada;
Balei ba ki paidbah nongshun,
Kin ïoh pynduh khoit ïa ka.
Ah pyni ki rishot ïaineh,
Ba la buh ban shan ïa ka;
Ki jingkular bym ju kylla,
U Blei namar diengphyna.
Ba nga im ka long ba phylla,
Ha ka lawarding ba thang;
Te kham phylla ynda tynjuh,
Mih na jynjar b'la pynphrang.
Por pynkhuid, ka sngi ban kynther,
Toi nga ïeng ruh khlem da khih;
Uba bat jingpeh ha ka kti,
U la man ka jakarieh.
Ah! ban kiew, Ah! na ri lawbah,
Ah! ban lait na shitom ma;
Beit sha khet ka burom jong U,
Khymat jong U ka sngewbha.
Alpha, Omega, Lok ba ïaineh,
Long U Jisu Trai ha khlieh;
Burom Blei Lai Ngut ka tyngshaiñ,
Ha jingpynim ei ïa ngi.

hymns.author: J. R.
hymns.reference: Ah Trai kynmaw la ka Balang (145)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ah Trai! kynmaw la ka Balang (145)
hymns.db_name: 145. Ah Trai! kynmaw la ka Balang

lines: Seïon ba swai ka ud, ka lynñiar lang,
Ba kan ïoh lait, ka diengphyna ka khang;
Pynshait ka kam, ka jingleit kan ym slem,
Nga tieng ïoh ïap shuwa ïa Me nga shem.
Ah! ban da wai ban bna ki jingïamai,
Ki jingïakhlad, ka bishni ba pynswai;
Wan, ko Mynsiem jingsuk, ban beh jingshun,
Ai ka jingieit na neng ba ngin ïahun.

hymns.reference: Seion ba swai ka ud ka lynniar lang (146)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Seïon ba swai ka ud, ka lynñiar (146)
hymns.db_name: 146. Seïon ba swai ka ud, ka lynñiar

lines: Balang tang kawei hangne bad ha neng,
Bad im bad ïap ha kajuh ki ïa seng;
chorus: “Khraw long U Khun”  ki riwai ki riewkhuid,
“Khraw long U Khun”  na ngi ruh ka ïai tuid.

lines: Jingim U Trai, jingud bad jingïap triem,
Ї'U Blei jinghun ka ai, ïa ngi jingim;
Ki jor jingïap, bad bor jong U ban sait,
Їa uba tlot kin kyrshan, kin pynshait.
U long U Lok ïa kiba shitom sat,
Na jynjar bah ngin mih ba U ïai bat;
La ngi la swai, ym don na ngi ban jah,
Na ri khlaw bah shaneng poi suk ngi lah.

hymns.reference: Balang tang kawei hangne bad ha neng (147)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Balang tang kawei hangne (147)
hymns.db_name: 147. Balang tang kawei hangne

lines: Ha ri Goshen pynïeng dara,
Wan ma Me, Ko Trai, ban shong;
Na byneng ka burom jong Me,
Bad u briew to dem ban long.
Shong ha Seïon, to ïai sah ruh,
Ha ba lang ki paid riewblei;
Wat ïakhlad n'u paidlang jong Me,
Haduh ban da wai pyrthei.
Nga la thait harud wah Babel,
Tang ka lynñiar hangta don;
Ki duitara jong ka Seïon,
Ha ka dohnud ki ïai shon.
Lam ïa ngi u paid ba ryntih,
Na ka ri ka jinglongmraw;
Ban da poi sha khlieh lum Seïon,
Nang bytin, ko Trai ba khraw.

hymns.author: J.C.E.
hymns.reference: Ha ri Goshen pynieng dara (148)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ha ri Goshen pynïeng dara (148)
hymns.db_name: 148. Ha ri Goshen pynïeng dara

lines: Ko Nongaplangbrot sngew ïa ngi,
Pynpaw Me don ryngkat;
Kumba Me hikai ban duwai,
Dohnud ai ban kyrpad.
Hapoh kane ka ïing pynshong,
Jingieit, Jingsuk ba khuid;
Hangne pynkhiah dohnud ba mong,
Pynjem pisa jingmut.
Da jingngeit ai ngin pdiang ka Ktien,
Da jingngeit ngin duwai;
Bad ha khmat jong U Trai jong ngi,
La dohnud phar ngin ai.
Ka shkor ba sngew ka khmat ba i,
Dohnud ba sngewrit ai;
Tyngshaiñ nangto na jrong ha ngi,
Jingbha kan man kyrhai.

hymns.author: H. L.
hymns.reference: Ko Nongaplangbrot sngew ia ngi (149)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ko Nongaplangbrot sngew ïa ngi (149)
hymns.db_name: 149. Ko Nongaplangbrot sngew ïa ngi

lines: Їa la ka Balang to pynkhuid,
Ah Trai Uba donbor;
Pynbaptis thymmai da ka ding,
Pynlieh ruh kat ka ïor.
Wat ai kan shaniah ha ka doh,
Wat shah kan iw pyrthei;
Ai ba kan san, kan roi ruh de,
Da bor ka jingaiei.
Jingshisha bad ka hok kan beh,
Kan beiñ ka burom spah;
Wat shah jingstad ba kynja briew,
Ka burom Blei kan kah.
Khlem tiar ïapom, tang ka jingngeit,
Bad waitlam U Mynsiem;
Kum kynroh ding to ai kin ker,
Jingieit U Nongpynim.

hymns.author: G.A.J.
hymns.reference: Ia la ka Balang to pynkhuid (150)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ia la ka Balang to pynkhuid (150)
hymns.db_name: 150. Їa la ka Balang to pynkhuid

lines: Nongrim ka Balang hangne,
Dei Jisu Khrist U Trai;
Їa pyrthei ba jot katne,
Da ka Un thaw thymmai.
Na neng Un wan ban pynim,
Ban long ka jong U hi;
Ban pyllait na ka jingtim,
U ïeng ban ïap ïapli.
Synjat ka Balang bakhuid,
Halor ka sla pyrthei;
Namar u bynriew, riewkhuid,
Baroh ki long kawei.
Ka nam jong U ki ïaroh,
B'U theh lut la ka snam;
Jingkyrmen kawei baroh,
Kajuh ka miej ki bam.
La bunsien ki ïoh krenbeiñ,
Namar bun jingïapher;
La slem ruh ki shah lehbeiñ,
Nongshun sawdong ki ker.
Hynrei riewkhuid ki ïaishah,
Lano, ki ong, kan wai!
Hadien ka miet ba kynjah,
Kan pei ka step phyrnai.
Hapdeng ki thma bun rukom,
Ba bun ki jingïapait;
Ki khmih lynti ka burom,
Junom na ki ban lait.
Balang bakhraw shitylli,
Lynti shata ka wad;
Ynda ïa ka ngin ïohi,
Jingsuk ngin ïoh ban mad.
Kawei bad riewkhuid ha neng,
Ko Blei ha Uwei Lai;
Riewkhuid na pyrthei kylleng,
Burom ïa Me ki ai.
Balang ba khraw shitylli,
Kata ka por ka jan;
Jingduwai ruh man ka sngi,
‛Ah Trai Jisu, to wan’.

hymns.author: E. R.
hymns.reference: Nongrim ka Balang hangne (151)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Nongrim ka Balang hangne (151)
hymns.db_name: 151. Nongrim ka Balang hangne

lines: Serampore   (C. M.)
chorus: Ka Balang jong U Trai.

lines: Ha khmih ka Balang jong U Trai,
B'la siewspah ei da U;
Kan ïai tyngshaiñ  bad ïaiphyrnai,
Ban sakhi tang ïa U.
Sha ka, la khmat jaidbynriew phai,
Bad baroh kin ïa ong;
“Їa ngin ïa kiew sha ïing U Trai,
Ba burom Blei ka shong.”
Hangta de, Un hikai ha ki,
Їa hukum khuid jong U;
Ban ïaid bad U lynter lynti,
Ban ïohpdiang jingkyrkhu.
Balang bakhuid, Jingshai U Trai,
Їai bud dienjat jong U;
Ko Burom Blei tyngshaiñ  khlem wai,
Pynphriang Gospel Jisu.

hymns.author: O.S.M.

hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ha khmih ka Balang jong U Trai (152)

lines: Ah Me! U Blei ba khraw,
Їa baroh Me la thaw;
Da bor jong Me ki dang ïaineh,
Ka burom ki pynpaw.
Hynrei u briew la kylla sniew,
La hap la ngam sha pop;
Їa Me la klet, na Me la phet,
U mane dem ki blei thala,
U len ïa l'U Nongthaw.
Ah Me! U Nongpynim,
Me wan na mynbarim;
Ha ka diengphna ka pop Me bah,
Ban im ki khun jingtim.
Ka hok ïa ngi ha Kalbari,
Kyrhai la mih ban phong;
Ha ïing jong Me, Mynsiem to theh,
Ba Me la teh ka ktien ba neh,
Bad ngi ba Men wan shong.
Ah Me! U Trai Nongthaw,
Ngi nguh ha khet ba khraw;
Ka ïing la tei ban mane Blei,
Ka burom ai kan paw.
To wan ma Me, ha ka shongneh,
Ha ngi pynmeh ka ding;
Ka kam ka swai, la Mem wanphai,
Ah Trai! sha ïing ban shong khlem wai,
Ban long jingshai ha ïing.

hymns.author: J. R.
hymns.reference: Ah Me U Blei ba khraw (153)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ah Me! U Blei ba khraw (153)
hymns.db_name: 153. Ah Me! U Blei ba khraw

hymns.sub_title: Ka Jingitynnad ka Їing U Blei (Salm lxxxiv)

lines: Ah Trai ki paid! Ah Blei ba thaw!
Ka khraw ka jingitynnad;
Ka ïing ba Me la buh ban dem,
Ban shem ïa la U Kynrad.
Mynsiem jong nga hir hir ka ïam,
Ban i, ïalam nga shapoh;
Ah jingsngewthrang ï'U Blei ba im,
To shim ka dohnud baroh.
Kham suk shisha ki sim byneng,
Ba seng ha ïing U Kypa;
Ka lyntait hi la skum ban dem,
Ka shem ka jingshngaiñ hangta.

hymns.reference: Ah Trai ki paid Ah Blei ba thaw (154)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ah Trai ki paid! Ah Blei ba thaw! (154)
hymns.db_name: 154. Ah Trai ki paid! Ah Blei ba thaw!

lines: Ah Trai! to ong uei un shong,
Ha tabernakl jong Me?
Ha Seïon lum uei un shong,
Ban ïai long junom bad Me?
Uba ïaid beit, uba leh hok,
Uba ïai syllok janai;
Uba kren khuid na dohnud sot,
Uta Men khot ha lade.
U bym kren sniew harieh harieh,
Їa la ki paramarjan;
U da ka nam ki lok ba bha,
Um shah ka jingkren bymman.
U bym sngewbha bad ki riewsniew,
Ki parabriew u burom;
Ban smai u nud, kumta un sah,
Um kylla junom junom.
U bym ai sbai ban ïoh ka sut,
Da jingmut kaba lalot;
Um ju bam tyngka ban pynrem,
Їoh ba un shem jinglanot!
Uba leh kine khlem da pud,
Na dohnud kaba kohnguh,
Te lano lano um khih shuh,
Un ïoh ruh ki jingkyrkhu.

hymns.reference: Ah Trai to ong uei un shong (155)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ah Trai! to ong uei un shong (155)
hymns.db_name: 155. Ah Trai! to ong uei un shong

hymns.sub_title: Ka Jingkwah ban shongduh ha ka Їing U Blei

lines: Ban ïoh ïai shong ha ïing U Trai,
Nga kwah, nga brai da shisha;
Jingkyrkhu long ï'u briew ba wad,
Un shad un kymen hangta.
La ïaid sha khlaw rang ryngkhiang bah,
La kumta ruh ngam sliang;
Ki pung ki shlei da um byneng,
Jingtyngen ka la biang.
Ha ïing jong Me tang shisngi lah,
Їa kaba ïoh shihajar,
Ha ïing ba khraw ki bymman lang,
La nga ap jingkhang shabar.
Kumne ngi ïaid, ngi nang ïoh bor,
Sa khyndiat por ïoh ïeng;
Ha Seïon lum ban kymen lang,
To nang ïabeh ka byneng.

hymns.reference: Ban ioh iai shong ha iing U Trai (156)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ban ïoh ïai shong ha ïing U Trai (156)
hymns.db_name: 156. Ban ïoh ïai shong ha ïing U Trai

lines: Jar ba wan, suk uta u briew,
Ba kiew sha ïing U Kypa;
Ba shisngi hangne long kham hun,
Їa bun ha ïing jingthala.
Hangne ngi shem jingai ba shlei,
Ї’U Blei ba dap jingisnei;
U Mynsiem jong U, U pynneh,
Ban ym leh sniew da lei lei.

hymns.reference: Jar ba wan suk uta u briew (157)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Jar ba wan, suk uta u briew (157)

lines: Nang beh ko lyer ba pyngngad hun,
Na lum Kaersalem thymmai;
Ba ngin sngewtynnad hun mynsiem,
Kum Dabid Syiem ngin riwai.
Їa ngin ïa kiew sha ïing U Trai,
Nga brai ban ïai leit hangta;
Pyni ka lynti ba ngan ïaid,
Khlem thait ngan beh jingshisha.
Bad kumta ngin ïoh bor ïoh bor,
Ban ïaid khlem dor sha burom;
Ah Blei ïalam! ka jingïaroh,
Men ïoh ha byneng junom.

hymns.reference: Nang beh ko lyer ba pyngngad hun (158)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Nang beh ko lyer ba pyngngad (158)
hymns.db_name: 158. Nang beh ko lyer ba pyngngad

lines: To ïaroh ïa U Trai bakhraw,
U long ba dap jingisnei;
Ki lad kyrhai ïa ngi U ai,
Kane ka ïing ngi la tei.
Ka long ka ïing ban syllok lang,
Ban mane ruh ïa U Blei,
Jingduwai kin kiew khlem da pud;
Jingïaroh de ngin ïai sei.
Hangne ngin wan bad ngin ïai shong,
Nangne ngim khih da lei lei;
Kumta ngin nang ïoh bor thymmai,
Ban lait ki saikhum pyrthei.

hymns.author: G. L.
hymns.reference: To iaroh ia U Trai bakhraw (159)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: To ïaroh ïa U Trai bakhraw (159)
hymns.db_name: 159. To ïaroh ïa U Trai bakhraw

chorus: Їaroh ïa U Blei.

lines: Їaroh ï'U Blei ki kam b'U la leh,
Ki jingkyrkhu ha ngi U la theh;
Mynta kumne lang sha U ngi phai,
Їingmane thymmai ba U la ai.
chorus: Їingmane ba ngi la dep ban tei,
Їing ban shakri bad mane ï'U Blei;
Ngi ïa duwai lang kum ka Balang,
Da kti jong Me Trai to pynkyntang.

lines: Їing ban mane Trai kumno ngin tei,
Bor ngi tlot, ki lad ngim don ei ei;
Dei ha bor jong Me ngi la aiti,
Їing la tei mynta ban ïoh shakri.
Trai Jisu kyrkhu kane ka sngi,
Kyrkhu ruh Trai Їingmane jongngi;
Jingtyngshaiñ burom jong Me kan paw,
Lyngba Їingmane ba ngi la thaw.
Tang kti briew ban pynkyntang kim biang,
Wan ma Me ko Trai la kti ban phriang;
Lyngba Їingmane ba ngi la tei,
Ai ba kan paw ka burom U Blei.

hymns.author: H.M.S.
hymns.reference: Iaroh iU Blei ki kam bU la leh (160)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Iaroh ï’U Blei ki kam b'U la leh (160)
hymns.db_name: 160. Їaroh ï'U Blei ki kam b'U la leh

lines: Nga ieit ka ïing jong Me,
Ba shong ka burom Blei;
Jingkmen ha ïingmane,
Palat sngewbha pyrthei.
Ka long ka ïing duwai,
Ha ka ngi wan ïalang;
Bad hangta Me Me don,
Bad ngi ban syllok lang.
Ngi ieit ‘tien jingpynim,
‘Tien ba ïalap jingsuk;
Jingshngaiñ ha jingïaleh,
Bad jingkmen bym ju duh.
Ngi ieit ban rwai hangne,
Ki jingisnei b'la ai;
Bad ngi kwah ruh ban nang,
Ki jingjop bneng ban rwai.
Trai Jisu, to kyrkhu,
Hangne ban ieit ïa Me;
Ha bneng ïa Me ban i,
Lem bad riewkhuid mane.

hymns.author: H. L.
hymns.reference: Nga ieit ka iing jong Me (161)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Nga ieit ka ïing jong Me (161)
hymns.db_name: 161. Nga ieit ka ïing jong Me

hymns.sub_title: Ka Jingduwai ba Blei Un don lem

lines: Ngi wan ïaseng ha Me, Ah Trai,
Ka jaka isnei Me la buh;
Sha la ki briew Me ju wan phai,
To map ïa ngi ba ngin ithuh.
Haba ngi ïam ha Me, Ah Blei,
Ka bor ka jingngeit ka nang khraw;
Jingsumar byniah ka pyntrei,
Ban mih jingtyngen ha ri khlaw.
La bun, la khyndiat, Trai to wan,
To shong bad ngi ba Men ïalam;
Ka ksangti jong Me ka ban shan,
Ka shkor ka pei ban sngew jingïam.
Ngin dem ngin nguh ï'U Trai ki paid,
B'Un kad byneng, b'Un hiar kloi;
Ka Seïon swai Un nang pynshait,
Ka ïing Un tei, ki khun kin poi.

hymns.author: J. R.
hymns.reference: Ngi wan iaseng ha Me Ah Trai (162)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ngi wan ïaseng ha Me, Ah Trai (162)
hymns.db_name: 162. Ngi wan ïaseng ha Me, Ah Trai

lines: Ngi wan ïaseng da jingsngewkmen,
Ban ïaroh ïa U Nongpynim;
Da jingieit bad ka jingsuk jai,
Ha khmih ngi ïai ïarwai.
chorus: To ïaroh jam, ko bneng, pyrthei,
Їa la ki jingïaroh to sei;
Ban kyntiew Syiem ï'U Khrist U Trai,
Jingiaroh jam ngin ai.

lines: Ngi nguh ïa Me, Ah Trai U Blei,
Ba ngi la ïoh ka Ktien jong Me;
Ba Me la shah ha ka diengphna,
Ka pop jong ngi ban bah.
To hikai, Trai, to nang pynshai,
Ban sngewthuh ïa ka bor jong Me;
Ki dohnud jong ngi synshar lut,
Ko Syiem ka bymjukut.
To sah bad ngi ha la ka sngi,
To sah, ko Nongpynim jong ngi;
Ba ngin ïoh shakri tang ïa Me,
Katba im ha pyrthei.

hymns.author: A.W.T.
hymns.reference: Ngi wan iaseng da jingsngewkmen (163)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ngi wan ïaseng da jingsngewkmen (163)
hymns.db_name: 163. Ngi wan ïaseng da jingsngewkmen

lines: Trai to wan jngoh ka jingïaseng jong ngi,
Kyrkhu ma Me da jingaiei na jrong;
Ba jingshakri ba tlot barit jong ngi,
B'la dap da bor Mynsiem kan kylla long.
Pynlong ïa ngi ki atiar Trai ba bha,
Ba pyndonkam ki sap ba Me la ai;
Ban shakri ki mynsiem ha ka shipa,
Ban khring ïa ki na jingdum sha jingshai.
Ai ngin theh lut ha kjat ki jong Me Trai,
Ki jingiwbih ba sngur bad kordor tam;
Ba jingsuhsieng kan her sha jan bad jngai;
Jingïaroh ruh ngin ïoh n'U Trai ka kam.
Kumta nang ïaid ki sngi ki snem jong ngi,
Ki soh mynsiem kin nang kham bang kham thiang;
Ba ynda wai jingleit ha pyrthei sngi,
Ngin ïaid ha lynti da ka ksiar b'la siang.

hymns.author: M. K.
hymns.reference: Trai to wan jngoh ka jingiaseng jong ngi (164)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Trai to wan jngoh ka jingïaseng (164)
hymns.db_name: 164. Trai to wan jngoh ka jingïaseng

lines: B'la kyrkhu long ka kti,
Ba teh lang ki riewngeit;
Ka syllok lang shimynsiem hi,
Hangne ka kum ha bneng.
Ha khmat ka khet l'U Kpa,
Shitrhem ngi dem ngi nguh;
Jingkmen jong ngi, jingtieng, jingma,
Baroh ki long ki juh.
Їoh long jingkordit sat,
Jingkit p'ralok kit lem;
Bad bunsien uwei ï'uwei pat,
Ngi jaw ummat sngewlem.
Haba ïakhlad jynduh,
Dohnud la kumba kad;
Ha ka mynsiem khlem ïakhlad shuh,
Kyrmen ngin ïashem pat.

chorus: Ngi ïaseng lang.

lines: Ngi wan ïaseng ban ïaroh lang,
Kyrteng Jisu ka thiang;
Ban i ïa Me ngi wan ban dem,
Kyrpad ba Men don lem.
chorus: To ngin ïaroh to ngin rwai jam,
Ї'U ngin kyntiew nam;
Їa ka kyrteng U Khrist U Trai,
Tang ïa U ngin rwai.

lines: Ba ngin ïohbor ban pynthymmai,
Dohnud sha Me ngi phai;
Me dang isnei bad Me pyllait,
Ki pop jong ngi Me sait.
Kyrteng jong Me ngi ieit ban dwai,
Bad ïaroh da jingrwai;
Ai bor ia ngi ba ngin iaineh,
Mon jong Me ba ngin leh.
Ha jingshakri ïa Me Ah Trai,
Dohnud ba dum pynshai;
Ngi kwah ruh ba Men pynkyntang,
Ki khun jong ka Balang.

hymns.author: S.D.W.
hymns.reference: Ngi wan iaseng ban iaroh lang (166)

lines: (ALEX. III No. 388)
chorus: Ngi wan ban ïaseng lang.

lines: Ko Trai babha, ngi wan ïaseng lang hangne,
Ban dem, ban nguh, ban shakri, ban mane;
Ka pyrthei ai ngin klet noh kumne shipor,
Ma Me hi ko Trai ïa ngi to ai bor.
Me la kular ko Trai ban don lem bad ngi,
Ar ne lai ngut ba ïa Me ngi shakri;
Ngi sngewshngaiñ da shisha haba ngi pyrkhat,
Ban tip Trai baieit ba Me don ryngkat.
Dohnud, jingmut, jingpyrkhat jong ngi baroh,
Tylli lang kawei ïa Me ban ïaroh;
Jingaiei jong Me mynta ai ngin ïoh pdiang,
Ha kane ka jingïasyllok bathiang.
Ki ktien ba bang to ai ngin sngew na Me Trai,
U Mynsiem Bakhuid ruh ha ngi to ai;
Ngin mih nangne ki briew b'la ïoh jingkyrkhu,
Ban ïai im namar kyrteng U Jisu.

hymns.author: H.M.S.
hymns.reference: Ko Trai babha ngi wan iaseng lang hangne (167)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ko Trai babha, ngi wan ïaseng (167)
hymns.db_name: 167. Ko Trai babha, ngi wan ïaseng

lines: Ngi wan ha khmat jong Me, Ah Trai,
Ban leh ka hukum bad ban smai;
Їa me ban kohnguh katba im,
Ban bud ka jingïalam Mynsiem.
Ka jingpynbaptis Me la buh,
Te na ka Balang kan ym duh;
Ka dak na shabar, ka pyni,
Ka jinglong hapoh kaba rieh.
Ngi wan ha kyrteng jong Me, Kpa,
U Khun bad U Mynsiem Babha;
To nang ïada, to hikai ruh,
Ba ngin long jong Me junom duh.

lines: U Trai U ong ka rukom bat,
Ka synjat jong ka jingim;
To phah na jutang suk, Ah Trai,
Їa ka jingai U Mynsiem.
Ka um ka long ka sakhi skhem,
Ї'u briew ba rem ba bymman;
Lai Ngut ha Uwei U Blei hi,
Їa ngi Un ri Un kyrshan.
To sait ïa ngi bad rit bad khraw,
Ban paw ka kam U Mynsiem;
Ia ngi, Ah Blei, to ri bysa,
To shna ban bit sha jingim.
Mynnyngkong ïoh n'U Khun U Briew,
Ban kyntiew khynnah lui lui;
Wat khang ïa ki ban wan ha Nga,
Ka hima dei ka jong ki.

Mynta peit ha ngi ba seng;
Їa ki khynnah to wan kyrkhu,
Da jingaiei na byneng;
Me la wan na khet ka burom,
Me la shim ka jinglong briew;
Lad me thaw ruh ïa ki khynnah,
Sha ka byneng khuid ban kiew.
Їa ki khun jong ngi Me dawa,
To ïarap ïa ngi ban ai;
Me don bor ïa ki ban kyrshan,
Bad ban kyrkhu ruh, Ah Trai;
Ha pyrthei ba sniew to sumar,
Їa ki dohnud ruh to shim;
Ai kin kup ka hok ka jong Me,
Ban ïalam sha ka jingim.

lines: Nongaplangbrot jong ki Israel,
U ju sumar la ki khun;
Da ka jingsngewbha U khot ruh,
Ban pyndap da ka jinghun;
‘Shah ki khynnah ban wan sha Nga,
Wat da khang’, U Khrist U ong,

Їa ki khunlung, Trai, ngi wallam,

lines: Ka jutang ki Lai Ngut ha Uwei,
Ka pynlong ka jingim ïa ngi;
U Blei ha ka doh U la pyndep,
La shan da ka snam jong U hi;
Ban teh ka byneng bad ka khyndew,
Da U Blei ha Lai ngut la thaw;
Ban kyntiew ïa ngi na ba jylliew,
Ka sniew na ka dohnud ban law.
Ban shna ïa ki jingpang u bynriew,
Ka kynja ka jong u, U shim;
Ka rukom jingbaptis ka pynpaw,
Ka lynti ban lait ka mynsiem;
La shem lad ban kynriah ka jingrem,
Na la ka jingtyngit ban khuid;

Ka um kaba im ka la tuid.
Hapoh ka jingshon jong ka jutang,
Ka um, ha U Khrist la aiti;
Ї'U Jisu ruh baroh ngin kohnguh,
Ah! kane ka jutang kam khih;

Їa kane ka um ka pynpaw;

lines: Don ki um ka wah ba pynim,
Kiba tuid ha ri ba ïap;
Ha ki bynriew ki ïai tyrwa,
Jingsuk bad ka jingbymïap;
Ha Kalbari,
Kiba im ki um ki mih.
Hangta ngan leit wad jingsngewbha,
Jingsngewbha ka bym ju duh,
Hangta ngan ïoh map pop baroh,
Yn pynduh ka jingrem ruh;
Hangta marwei,
Ngan ïoh sngewsih la ka pop.
Ka jingpynim ba nga dawa,
Kaba aiei la ka jor;
Nga la duh jingkyrmen junom,
Khlem ka kuna kaba kor;

lines: Don ki um ha ka jingpynim,

Kiba sah jingbha ruh junom,

Kynmaw kane ha ka jingtlot,

Bun hajar kin sa lieh-
Lieh kum ka ïor na neng;
Yn i riewtyngit b'Un sa mih,
U Khun byneng.

hymns.reference: Mynsiem to her sha neng (194)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Mynsiem to her sha neng (194)
hymns.db_name: 194. Mynsiem to her sha neng

lines: La khreh ïa ka jingkhawai,
Їa kiba duk, da snam;
Ka dap da ki jingisnei,
Ba tlot, ba swai kin bam;
To mad ïa ki jingkyrkhu,
B'la khreh da ka jingstad;
U Blei U khot phi baroh,
Wan mynta ban ïoh mad.

hymns.reference: La khreh ia ka jingkhawai (195)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: La khreh ïa ka jingkhawai (195)
hymns.db_name: 195. La khreh ïa ka jingkhawai

lines: Wan ki khun ki ksiew U Adam,
La poi Jubil khraw U Trai;
Dang khot baroh ban wan mynta,
Ban ïoh mad ka jingkhawai;
Wan to bam, U da sam,
Ki jingkyrkhu ba da snam.
Wan phi matlah, wan phi dykoh,
Wan phi kiba bun jingpang;
Bret ïa kita ki jingsngewbha,
Kiba phi la ju mad bang;
Waiñ ba bang, baroh lang,
Phin ïoh dih, ba pynkydang.
Wad ki jaiñkup jingshongkurim,
Jaiñ itynnad kiba lieh;
Ym lah shem ïa ki ka kyrteng,
Tang ka hok U Blei jong ngi;
Jaiñ ba ni long ma ki,
Ka pop baroh kin buhrieh.

hymns.reference: Wan ki khun ki ksiew U Adam (196)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Wan ki khun ki ksiew U Adam (196)
hymns.db_name: 196. Wan ki khun ki ksiew U Adam

hymns.sub_title: Ka jingdap ka jingïap U Khrist

lines: Ka jingkhawai dap da jingsuk,
Hangne wan sngewbha ban bam;
Hangne phin ïoh mad jingieit,
Jingsuk kaba da ka snam;
Baroh wan, ale lang,
Shong phi hangne to bam lang.
Hangne phin ïohi ba dang mih,
Um bad snam, ka wah ba khraw;
Na jingmong jingsum Kalbari,
Ka la mih ka wah ba saw;
Kan sait lieh, pop jong phi,
Khuid ka dohnud bad ka kti.
Phin ïoh dih ruh khlem jingsheptieng,
Phin ïoh bam ma phi khlem wai;
Kiei kiei ba pynsngewbha,
Dohnud jong phi na U Trai;
Phin shong ruh, lem bad U,
Junom phin ïa khawai ruh.

hymns.reference: Ka jingkhawai dap da jingsuk (197)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ka jingkhawai dap da jingsuk (197)
hymns.db_name: 197. Ka jingkhawai dap da jingsuk

lines: Bad sngi bad miet ngan sah,
Ha syrngiew diengphyna,
Ban ieit ïa Me;
Ka dor, hooid, kane hi,
B'la siew ha Kalbari;
Їa nga ban pynkhuid lieh,
Junom kan neh.
Hapdeng ka um ka ding,
Ngan riwai khlem da tieng,
Lum Kalbari;
U Lum ba thung U Blei,
Ban pynpaw jingisnei;
Nongïap ban pynim ei,
Da jingïap hi.
Ngan ïaid sha ri ba bha,
B'la pynïoh ei ïa nga,
Nga lajan poi;
Hangta ngan ïoh mad ei,
Ha ri ka jong U Blei;
Ka jingsngewbha ba shlei,
Junom kan roi.

hymns.author: J.C.E.
hymns.reference: Bad sngi bad miet ngan sah (198)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Bad sngi bad miet ngan sah (198)
hymns.db_name: 198. Bad sngi bad miet ngan sah

lines: Ko Mawsiang na mynhyndai,
Ba ngan rieh ha Me to ai;
To ai ïa ka snam bad ka um,
Na krung jong Me ba la sum;
Na ka pop pynkhiah synrop,
Duh ka jingrem bad bor pop.
Te ki kam bha ki kti jong nga,
Pynhun ka hukum kim lah;
La kyñia smat de khlem thait shuh,
Ummat jong nga ïai mih ruh;
Baroh kim lah pynhun ï'U Blei-
Me pynim, pynim ruh ei.
Ei ei ruh, Ah Trai, ngam wallam,
Dieng sahnarphyna nga bat;
Khlem hok, to pynksan ei ma Me,
Tlot, ai la ka jingaiei;
Tyngit, ha Me nga phet, to map,
Jisu, to sait, ne ngan ïap.
Katba sah ka mynsiem jong nga,
Haba sa ïap ruh ban jah;
Ban her sha ki pyrthei bym tip,
I ïa Me ba shong bishar;
Ko Mawsiang na mynhyndai,
Ba ngan rieh ha Me to ai.

hymns.reference: Ko Mawsiang na mynhyndai (199)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ko Mawsiang na mynhyndai (199)
hymns.db_name: 199. Ko Mawsiang na mynhyndai

lines: Nangïaid, ko mynsiem, wat khaweit,
Shatei sha Seïon sha ba beit,
Da khymih dyngong ha u lum;
To khymih sha ka diengphyna,
L'U Kynrad hangta ba la sah,
Ka krung ba kyntang ba la sum,
U lum u jerong, jerong hi,
Ka kuna kor de kin ïohi,
Ki mihngi bad ki sepngi ruh;
Ki briew ba thiah ha ba dum,
La dum, kin khymied sha u lum,
Kin kyrmen nangta junom ruh.
Ki lah ki nongwei jyngai bah,
Ban i ki prek ha U b'la sah,
Kin i ka khlieh ruh ba la dem:
Ban sait kat kine U donbor,
Kin lieh ki dohnud kum ka ïor,
Ka pop bad tyngit shuh nym shem.

hymns.author: J.R.
hymns.reference: Nangiaid ko mynsiem wat khaweit (200)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Nangïaid, ko mynsiem, wat khaweit (200)
hymns.db_name: 200. Nangïaid, ko mynsiem, wat khaweit

lines: Ban kynmaw ka ud ha ka kper,
Ka syep kum ka snam kaba lang,
Shato ka mynsiem ka shu her,
Nangto ka jingieit ka nang;
Ban i ba U kiew sha u lum,
Ban shah ïa ki nar ha U dieng,
Ka dohnud maw eh ka la um,
Ka mynsiem da jingieit ka ing.
Ka snam bad ka um kin pynkhuid,
B'la kyrsoi na Lum Kalbari;
Haduh ka shnong jong nga ki tuid,
Da kine ha U Blei ngan rieh;
La don ki jingeh kiba khang,
Ban poi ka wah jingim sha ngi,
Їa ki ka jingieit ka la thang,
Jerusalem ruh kan sa lieh.

hymns.reference: Ban kynmaw ka ud ha ka kper (201)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ban kynmaw ka ud ha ka kper (201)
hymns.db_name: 201. Ban kynmaw ka ud ha ka kper

lines: Nga kynmaw ï'U Jisu ba hok,
U Jisu bhabriew jemnud tam;
Mynmiet ha ka khriat bajur,
B'U syep ha kyper da ka snam;
Ka syep kaba saw la pynjaw,
Ba pisa jur eh ka mynsiem;
Te junom ngan riwai ïaroh,
Jingieit ba khraw Nongpynim.
Nga kynmaw ki shipai ba wan,
Kynhun bah da rah la ki sum,
Ban kem ï'U Khunlangbrot U Blei,
Ki lam ban sahnar ha u lum;
To sngap ïa ki ktien ba U kren,
Tang Une U nud ban pynmih;
‘To shah te ïa kine ban lait,
Ha khymih, ïa Nga to shim pli.’
Nga kynmaw ka khymat sngewbha,
Ha ka te ka bynthiew la Jur;
Nga kynmaw ka met kaba kor,
B'la lur kiba jerong ki nur;
Ah Kynrad, U Jisu Baieit,
Pynsngew la jingieit ia nga;
Ka dohnud eh jong nga kan pait,
Ban kynmaw ka shitom b'la shah.

hymns.author: J. R.
hymns.reference: Nga kynmaw iU Jisu ba hok (202)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Nga kynmaw ï’U Jisu ba hok (202)
hymns.db_name: 202. Nga kynmaw ï’U Jisu ba hok

hymns.sub_title: Sah sa tang ka snam U Jisu

lines: Ei ban sait ka thoh na nga?
Sah sa tang ka snam U Jisu;
Ei ïa nga ba lah ban shna?
Sah sa tang ka snam U Jisu.
chorus: Ah! kordor long ka wah,
Ba sait lieh phar ïa nga,
Kawei ym don ba lah,
Sah sa tang ka snam U Jisu.

lines: Lad ym don ïa nga ban lait,
Sah sa tang ka snam U Jisu;
Na ka pop ban ïoh jingsait,
Sah sa tang ka snam U Jisu.
Jingsait pop ka long ba rem,
Sah sa tang ka snam U Jisu;
Ban ai kuna ngam lah shem,
Sah sa tang ka snam U Jisu.
Ba ngan kyrmen ba ngan suk,
Sah sa tang ka snam U J isu;
Ban pynïoh ha nga ka hok,
Sah sa tang ka snam U Jisu.

hymns.author: J. R.
hymns.reference: Ei ban sait ka thoh na nga (203)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ei ban sait ka thoh na nga? (203)
hymns.db_name: 203. Ei ban sait ka thoh na nga?

lines: U don u lum ba kyntang tam,
B'la khot Lum Kalbari;
Hangta la sahnarphna ï'U Trai,
Namar ki pop jong ngi.
Ngim lah ban tip, ngim lah ban ong,
Katno ba U la shah;
Hynrei namar jong ngi, ngi ngeit,
B'U ïap ha diengphyna.
Nalor jong U ym don ba lah,
Ka kuna hok ban ai;
Ka khyrdop bneng, Ah! ei ban plie?
Dei tang U Khrist U Trai.
Ah! katno khraw bad phylla eh,
Ka jingieit Nongpynim;
Ngi ruh ngin ieit, ngin aiti lut,
Ban shakri katba im.

hymns.author: A.W.T.
hymns.reference: U don u lum ba kyntang tam (204)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: U don u lum ba kyntang tam (204)
hymns.db_name: 204. U don u lum ba kyntang tam

lines: La tlot, la swai, la ngim don hok,
Ka pop ruh ka ïai ban;
Ban kynmaw ieit ba Me la ïap,
Ngi nud, Ah Trai, ban wan.
Wat ai ban don jingsngew pyrthei,
Ha ngi, Ah Trai babha;
To pynkhuid phar, to pynlong sngur,
Ngi nguh ïa Me mynta.
Te katba ngi ïabam iadih,
Ai bor ngin peit sha Me;
Wan paw Ah Trai, pynim, pynshai,
Ki khmat ban i ïa Me.
Te kumta, haba Me pynkhliañ,
Ngin ïaid lynti U Blei;
Ngin bud ïa Me, ngin ïai pynpaw,
Ki jor ka jingaiei.

hymns.author: S. E.
hymns.reference: La tlot la swai la ngim don hok (205)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: La tlot, la swai, la ngim don hok (205)
hymns.db_name: 205. La tlot, la swai, la ngim don hok

hymns.sub_title: Ka Jingthmu U Blei ban pynim

lines: Hangtai nga ïohi jingphylla,
Jingmut jylliew jong U Blei;
Mynba Um pat thaw ka Eden,
U la khreh ka jingisnei;
Mynba ym pat don ka Jingpang,
Nongpynkhiah U la buh;
Їa ki nongshun U la ieit,
Ї'U ngan ïaroh junom duh.
Ah ka jingynim bymjukut!
Ka jingthymu jong U Trai;
Ban ïalam khun ka jingdum,
Sha ka jinglong ki riewshai;
Jingieit bah, ba na bymgjukut,
Kum ka jinglong U Blei hi;
Ka kydup ki khun ka jingïap,
Ha U Jisu Trai Jong ngi.

hymns.author: J.C.E.
hymns.reference: Hangtai nga iohi jing phylla (206)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Hangtai nga ïohi jing phylla (206)
hymns.db_name: 206. Hangtai nga ïohi jing phylla

lines: Jisu, shim ïa nga tang kumne,
Shim, ba ngan kham khuid ngam lah;
Bor ka jong Me kan ring hajan,
Haba nga shu lam ban jah;
Jingmong jong Me,
Junom kin pynkoit ïa nga.
Ban ïaid marwei ha ri kynjah,
Nga sngewlywait, ngam ïoh hun;
Ngam ju lah ban jop wat iwei,
Iba rit na ki nongshun;
Kyrteng jong Me,
Kan pynphet ïa ki radbah.
Ki kham jur ki ktien Kalbari,
Ki ktien kordor, ki ktien bang;
Khia iba rit na kine,
Їa ki hok nga baroh lang;
Khymih hangta,
Nangta ngan ïoh bor ban jop.

hymns.author: J. R.
hymns.reference: Jisu shim ia nga tang kumne (207)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Jisu, shim ïa nga tang kumne (207)
hymns.db_name: 207. Jisu, shim ïa nga tang kumne

lines: Sha Kalbari nga phai ka khmat,
Ha Kalbari suk mynsiem;
Ka jingaiei bad jingisnei,
Ki pynjaw ka jingpynim;
Lum Kalbari,
Shata, mynsiem, leit ban rieh.
Ha ka lyer nga ïohsngew hangta,
Na byneng ki Salm ki wan;
Ba la nang harud wah Babel,
Haba shitom ka la ban;
Lum Kalbari,
Long ka daw ka jingïaroh.
Hangta ka mynsiem u dakaid,
Ban sa hap ha dujok ding;
Ka la lait phar na ki kynjri,
Bad sha byneng soit la ring;
Lum Kalbari,
Un sa riwai junom duh.

hymns.author: J. R.
hymns.reference: Sha Kalbari nga phai ka khmat (208)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Sha Kalbari nga phai ka khmat (208)
hymns.db_name: 208. Sha Kalbari nga phai ka khmat

lines: Ko Kynrad, nga kwah Men pynkhiah ïa nga,
Men shong ha ka dohnud jong nga ban pynbha;
Pynduh ki blei baroh, pynmih da ka bor,
Nang sait ïa nga, Jisu, ngan lieh kum ka ïor.
chorus: Lieh kum ka ïor h'oid, lieh kum ka ïor,
Nang sait ïa nga, Jisu, ngan lieh kum ka ïor.

lines: Trai Kynrad, wat ai ka jingtyngit kan sah,
Pyndei la ka snam, kaba thoh wat da shah;
Ban ïoh ka jingsait ym lah kheiñ ïa ka dor,
Nang sait ïa nga, Jisu, ngan lieh kum ka ïor.
Trai Kynrad, to peit na la ka jong ka khet,
Ai bor naduh mynta ïa lade ban klet;
Ka jong nga ngan duh, la nga kheiñ kaba kor,
Nang sait ïa nga, Jisu, ngan lieh kum ka ïor.
Trai Kynrad, ïa kane nga duwai shisha,
Nga khymih, ko Jisu, ki kjat ba la sah;
Ban sait phar ïa nga, ba la tuid ka snam kor,
Nang sait ïa nga, Jisu, ngan lieh kum ka ïor.
Trai Kynrad, Me tip ba nga ap la kham slem,
Bad hapoh ka dohnud, wan mynta, kan dem;
Ktien, ‘Em’, ym ju phai haba duwai shalor,
Nang sait ïa nga, Jisu, ngan lieh kum ka ïor.

hymns.reference: Ko Kynrad nga kwah Men pynkhiah (209)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ko Kynrad, nga kwah Men pynkhiah (209)
hymns.db_name: 209. Ko Kynrad, nga kwah Men pynkhiah

lines: Snam ka diengphna ka pynkyntiew,
Kiba tlot ban long nongjop;
Snam ka diengphna ka pyndem ruh,
Kiba sarong ban hap khop;
Ai ba ngan sngew,
Lyer pyngngad na Kalbari.
Ha ka bor jong U ngan kyrshan,
Bor b'la trei bym lah iathuh;
Shem ka jingïap, shem ka dujok,
Shem u soitan, shem ban ïuh;
Lum Kalbari,
Lano ngan ym klet ïa u.
T.J.& H.R.

hymns.reference: Snam ka diengphna ka pynkyntiew (210)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Snam ka diengphna ka pynkyntiew (210)
hymns.db_name: 210. Snam ka diengphna ka pynkyntiew

lines: Weng noh
Jingkah jong ka pop ba dum lyoh,
Pynshai ka sngi ka hok baroh;
U Khunlangbrot da jingieit bah,
U shah shitom ki prek b'la sah,
Ha lum Kal'bri, namar jong nga.
Haei
Ngan Shem jingjahthait, jingisnei?
Tang ha ki jingmong Khun U Blei;
Na krung jong U b'la pei lyngba,
Ka tuid ka snam ba sait ïa nga;
Hangta jingkmen kan long khlem wai.
Shisha
Ka don ka bor ha snam diengphna,
Ban sait khuid phar ki pop jong nga;
U ud khuslai, halor diengphna,
Sh'U Blei b'U kwah ban lam ïa nga;
Da kane keiñ ba ngan poi bneng.
O.H.R.& H.J.

hymns.reference: Weng noh Jingkah jong ka pop (211)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Weng noh Jingkah jong ka pop (211)
hymns.db_name: 211. Weng noh Jingkah jong ka pop

lines: Bah la ka diengphna, Khrist U ong,
Lada phi mon ban bud ïa nga;
Їa lade len, ka pyrthei ieh,
Bud ruh da jingsngewrit shisha.
Bah la ka diengphna, la ka khia,
Haba jinglong mynsiem ka swai;
Peit sha U Jisu, kan sa sting,
Bor bah ban bah ïa ka Un ai.
Bah la ka diengphna, wat lehraiñ,
Bud ïa ki diengjat Nongpynim;
Wat ma U hi U shah lehraiñ,
Mynba U wan ban ai jingim.
Bah la ka diengphna, te phin jop,
Їa ki jingpynshoi u soitan;
Bor bah U Jisu kan pynkhlaiñ,
Haba ka jynjar jur ka ban.
Bah la ka diengphna, bud ï'U Khrist,
Haduh ba jingïap hi kan rong;
Namar dei tang uba ïai bah,
Pansngiat ka jingim un ïoh phong.

hymns.author: H.S.R.
hymns.reference: Bah la ka diengphna Khrist U ong (212)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Bah la ka diengphna, Khrist U ong (212)
hymns.db_name: 212. Bah la ka diengphna, Khrist U ong

lines: Ha khymih ka sngi ba la buh,
Ban shakri tang ïa U Blei;
Ka sngi ba khuid; ka burom ai,
Їa Lai Ngut ba long Uwei.
U Blei ha kane U shongsngi,
Na jingtrei jong U baroh;
U Trai ha kane U la mih,
Їa ngin ïa khie ban ïaroh.

hymns.reference: Ha khymih ka sngi ba la buh (213)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ha khymih ka sngi ba la buh (213)
hymns.db_name: 213. Ha khymih ka sngi ba la buh

lines: Їa ngin ïariwai lang ï'U Blei,
Ka jingaiei ngin kyrpad;
Ka sngi ban khawai, khun ba ieit,
Їaleit ïamane ryngkat.
Ka sngi ba U la buh U Trai,
Ka sngi ba lai U Kynrad;
Їa ngjn ïaseng ban kymen lang,
Ba bang ïa kane'n pyrkhat.
Ka hynñiew sngi b'la kyntang khuid,
Ban tuid ha ngi jingkyrkhu;
Ka sngi ban ïoh ka jingtip Blei,
Ba dei ban shem jingkynduh.

hymns.reference: Ia ngin iariwai lang iU Blei (214)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ia ngin ïariwai lang ï’U Blei (214)
hymns.db_name: 214. Їa ngin ïariwai lang ï’U Blei

lines: Dei kane ka sngi ba U Trai,
U kam kum la ka jong;
To shad byneng, sngewbha pyrthei,
Ban ïoh jahthait ngin shong.
Ha kane ka sngi U la mih,
Ka bor ka pop la duh;
Riewkhuid ki ïalap ka jingjop,
Ki risa jam ïanguh.
Hosanna ïa U Syiem b'la thung,
U Khun u Dabid hi;
Їarap, Ah Trai, to wallam kloi,
Ka jingpynim ïa ngi.
Pynkhraw ï'U Trai ba wan ïalap,
Ki ktien ka jingaiei;
U Wan pynim ï'u briew ba pop,
Bor Blei U don ban trei.
Hosanna jam da kaba nguh,
Ka Balang hi ka ai;
Ki byneng sawdong ïa ka khet,
Ki ïaroh jam ï'U Trai.

hymns.reference: Dei kane ka sngi ba U Trai (215)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Dei kane ka sngi ba U Trai (215)
hymns.db_name: 215. Dei kane ka sngi ba U Trai

hymns.sub_title: Ka Jingduwai ïa ka jingpynkhih U Blei

lines: To khih ka dohnud swai,
Wat long shuh jaipydeh;
Jingphylla jong U Trai,
Ki kam ba U la leh;
Ki khot ïa ngi mynta ka sngi,
Ban ïaroh ia U Trai jong ngi.
Ha kane ka sngi hi,
Ka jingtep ka la ang;
U Syiem Byneng la mih,
Ym don ba lah ban khang;
To khie ma me ban kynmaw ruh,
Ka jingpynim ba khraw jong U.
Slem nga la shong ha pop,
Ka dohnud ruh la swai;
Ai bor ba ngan ïai jop,
Їarap ïa nga, Ah Trai;
Ba dohnud jong nga kan ïoh khih,
Ha kane ka sngi U Blei hi.

hymns.reference: To khih ka dohnud swai (216)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: To khih ka dohnud swai (216)
hymns.db_name: 216. To khih ka dohnud swai

lines: Ki la dep baroh kito hynriew sngi,
Ka sngi U Trai ba thymmai ruh la mih;
To phai mynsiem jong nga, to leh sngewbha,
Ainguh ha kane ka sngi kaba bha.
To khie dang step ban ïaroh ïa U Trai,
Ba ka jingieit jong U ha ngi la ai;
Kane ka sngi U Trai ka sngi pyllait,
Ka sngi jinghun, ka sngi ka jingshongthait.
Ai ba sha neng ki jingmut kin ïa her,
Kum jingiwbih kylleng ba kit ka lyer;
Ban pydiang pat ka jingsuk kaba brai,
Jingkyrmen hun ba hiar na U Trai.
Kane ka jingsuk jai ka synjat hi,
Ba don ka jingshongthait ha neng ïa ngi;
Kaba la khreh U Trai ïa ki riewblei,
Ka long ka kut jingkhuslai jong pyrthei.
Їa ngin iehnoh ka kam pyrthei baroh,
Sha ïingmane ïa leit ba ngin ïaroh;
Hangta ngin ïoh jingkyrkhu na byneng,
Jingkyrmen ruh ka jingshongthait ha neng.

hymns.reference: Ki la dep baroh kito hynriew sngi (217)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ki la dep baroh kito hynriew sngi (217)
hymns.db_name: 217. Ki la dep baroh kito hynriew sngi

hymns.sub_title: Ki Jingtngen Mynsiem ka Sngi U Trai

lines: Ki hynriew sngi jingtrei la wai,
Ka Sngi U Trai wan phai thymmai;
Jingshongthait mynsiem la wan pat,
Jingkyrkhu bneng ngin nang ïai bat.
Ale kyrkhu ï'U Trai bakhraw,
Mynsiem ba swai ka bor kan paw;
Jingkyrkhu bneng U ïai pynkhreh,
Mynta ka sngi ha ngi U theh.
Jingjaijai bneng dohnud sngewtngen,
Synjat jingshongthait ruh pynkmen;
Ha Balang U Blei ka ïaisah,
Jingkhuslai pyrthei, ba kim lah.
Ha jingmane kane ka sngi,
Jingkmen bakhraw ka don ha ngi;
Katno thiang sngi U Trai pynshlei,
Jingkyrmen dap da jingaiei.
Ai ba dohnud jingnguh kyntiew,
Kum jingiwbih sha khlieh kin kiew;
Na bneng ngin ring jingai bathiang,
Jinghun ba shlei Un ïai pynbiang.

hymns.author: H.L.L.
hymns.reference: Ki hynriew sngi jingtrei la wai (218)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ki hynriew sngi jingtrei la wai (218)
hymns.db_name: 218. Ki hynriew sngi jingtrei la wai

hymns.sub_title: Ka Sngi U Trai, ka sngi ki jingkyrkhu

lines: Ka sngi shongthait bad sngewkmen,
Ka sngi ba ai jingshai;
Ka dawai ba ïoh jintngen,
Burom ruh ba phyrnai.
Ha pha bakhraw bad bapoh,
Ha khmat ka khet U Trai;
'Bakhuid' laisien yn ïaroh,
Ha U Blei Uwei Lai.
Ha pha ha ka jingpynlong,
Jingshai nyngkong la kha;
Ha pha jingpynim ka shong,
Khrist na jingtep U phla,
Ha pha U Trai ka jingjop,
L'U Mynsiem phah na bneng;
Ha pha burom ï'u nongpop,
Jingshai ba khraw ka ïeng.
Mynta ha ki ri ba thngan,
Ka mana bneng ka hap;
Ha jingïaseng ba kyntang,
Khubor babha ïalap.
Jingshai Gospel ïai kynud,
Kylleng ka ïai phyrnai;
Um ba im ruh ki ïaid tuid,
Mynsiem ban pynthymmai.

hymns.author: H.L.L.
hymns.reference: Ka sngi shongthait bad sngewkmen (219)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ka sngi shongthait bad sngewkmen (219)
hymns.db_name: 219. Ka sngi shongthait bad sngewkmen

lines: Ki hynriew sngi Trai, Me la ai,
Ban trei ki kam jong ngi;
Sngi ba hynñiew sngi jong U Trai,
Thwei bah mynsiem ngin jngi.
Ka miet ba dum ka la leit noh,
Sngi phyrnai ka la mih;
Jingartatien la dam baroh,
Jingtep rynghang la ieh.
Dang step ha ban da sep ka sngi,
Їa Me Trai, ngin ainguh;
Jingsuk, jingkmen, hapoh jong ngi,
Sngi babud kin nym duh.
To shan bor Trai, da bor Mynsiem,
Pynsngew Me don hangne;
Ba nongbud jong Me kin ïoh im,
Kum tnad ba snoh ha Me.
Ka sngi U Trai, sngi jingkyrmen,
Ngi ruh ngin ïa mihpat;
Hangta ngin rwai, ngin shad ngin kmen,
Da sur bneng bym ju blad.

hymns.author: G.R.S.
hymns.reference: Ki hynriew sngi Trai Me la ai (220)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ki hynriew sngi Trai, Me la ai (220)
hymns.db_name: 220. Ki hynriew sngi Trai, Me la ai

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: U Syiem byneng shaphrang,
Ngi ruh, ngi baroh shlur;
Ka um ka ding kam khang,
Haba ngi nang ïatur;
Ngin tur, ngin tur, ïariwai jam,
Ngin jop, ngin jop, U Syiem Un lam.
Ym don uwei ba swai,
Na shipai Syiem byneng;
Ki pydiang de khlem wai,
Ka bor jong U na neng;
Ngin ïoh, ngin ïoh ka waiñ ba sngur,
Kaba sngewbang, kaba pynshlur.
Sydang ban riwai shuh,
U Paidbah ba ïaseng;
Їaroh jingïap jong U-
U Khun U Syiem byneng;
La ïoh la ïoh ki jingkyrkhu,
Ki angel kim ïoh mad ki juh.
Phi Seraph to ïadem,
Ban khymih to wan kloi;
Ki nongpop kiba rem,
Ha byneng ki la poi;
Їohi ma ki ka ri sngewbha,
Ki kynroh ruh ka ïing I Pa.

hymns.author: J. R.
hymns.reference: U Syiem byneng shaphrang (221)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: U Syiem byneng shaphrang (221)
hymns.db_name: 221. U Syiem byneng shaphrang

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI
hymns.sub_title: Ka Jingduwai ban pynroi ïa ka kam

lines: Ah Blei Bakhraw, pynbha ka kam,
Sha kaba kut pyrthei ïalam;
To tyngshaiñ noh sha lum, sha thor,
Da nang pyni ïa la ka bor.
Ka Babilon ka khynñiuh, te,
Kan kyllon ruh ba don ma Me;
To khymih shen to kad byneng,
Ka Seïon kan long khlieh kylleng.

hymns.reference: Ah Blei Bakhraw pypbha ka kam (222)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ah Blei Bakhraw, pypbha ka kam (222)
hymns.db_name: 222. Ah Blei Bakhraw, pypbha ka kam

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: Kan ïaid ka Gospel Blei shaphrang,
Sha kylleng ka pyrthei;
Ban roi, ban roi ha ka Balang,
Mynsiem to ai ban tei;
Kin mih bun hajar b'la pyllait,
Na jingdum tliw ban im;
Na India ngi kin wan riewshait,
Ban ïaroh Nongpynim.
Ka jingput rupa Jubili,
Kan sawa ha ri khlaw;
To wan u paidbah dang step hi,
Wad Jingpynim ba khraw;
Ka ïing ba kyntang, Trai nang tei,
Pyndep ka ktien jingthoh;
Te katba sah nongrim pyrthei,
Ngin sei ka jingïaroh.
Jingduwai ki riewkhuid kin kiew,
Kum jingainguh ba im;
Jingïaroh seïon ai kin kiew,
Jingkyrsoi U Mynsiem;
Sa khyndiat hi ïa kane'n shem;
Itynnad kum ka sngi;
Kin ïaroh jam ha ki jingtem,
Ka jingjop Kalbari.

hymns.author: J. R.
hymns.reference: Kan iaid ka Gospel Blei shaphrang (223)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Kan ïaid ka Gospel Blei shaphrang (223)
hymns.db_name: 223. Kan ïaid ka Gospel Blei shaphrang

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: Ka jingput Jubili,
Ha jingïap Kalbari;
Ka sawa jam,
Jingpynim ei ïa ngi;
To leh sngewbha mynsiem ba swai,
Jisu la jop ka sngi ba lai;
Kin mih ki koidi jingïap,
Na ki jingkhum kin lait.
U Pharo la u shun,
Um lah pynsniew ki khun;
Ba kiew shaneng,
Sha ïing I Pa ba hun;
Jingjynjar ma ka ri khlaw bah,
Ia ki riewngeit pynsniew kam lah;
Ba rieh ha ki thapniang,
L'U Kapten uba bha.
U Syiem jingsuk la jop,
Pyrthei jingtep bad pop;
Ka Seïon ruh,
Da bor jong U kan jop;
Te mynta baroh risa shait,
Na ïing jingdum to mih sha lait;
Ka bynta skhem ka jong phi,
U Jisu Trai ki paid.
Don paidbah byllien bah,
Ha pyrthei ki ju sah;
Ha pang bad pop,
Ha shitom bad jingma;
Ha jingsuk jai bad ha jinghun,
Ki shong ha trai ka khet U Khun;
Ki Jingïaleh la wai noh,
Bym don shuh ki nongshun.

hymns.reference: Ka jingput Jubili (224)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ka jingput Jubili (224)
hymns.db_name: 224. Ka jingput Jubili

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: Ka Gospel Blei la wan,
Na jyngai bah sha ngi;
To sngap, ha ngi ka kren,
Ka ïaid kylleng ka ri;
To ïeng, to ïeng ban sngew ïa ka,
Ka jingpynim men ïoh sngewbha.
Ka Gospel Blei la wan,
Ngi wad ïa ka la slem;
Sharum, shaneng, ngi ïaid,
Ia l'U Nongthaw ban shem;
To ïeng, to ïeng, ban sngew ïa ka,
Ka ktien U Nongpynim ba bha.
Ka Gospel Blei la wan,
To pydiang ei ïa ka;
Kan pyni lynti beit,
Ban poi sha ïing I Pa;
Ka tyrwa ruh ï'U Nongïalam,
U Jisu Khrist, ban ïaid shaphrang.

hymns.author: S. S.
hymns.reference: Ka Gospel Blei la wan (225)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ka Gospel Blei la wan (225)
hymns.db_name: 225. Ka Gospel Blei la wan

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: Ka lama khraw la sei,
Ka Gospel Blei ka long;
Ka dujok b'ishyrkhei,
U Jisu la pynmong;
Kan hap, kan hap, la imat skhem,
Ha khmat U Jisu kam lah ïeng.
Ka dor pansngiat shiah,
Ha khlieh U Syiem byneng;
Ki nar sah kiba nep,
Kham kor ïa ka jingrem;
To wan khymih kane ka kam,
Uba ïong eh u la lieh tam.
To riwai b'la ïohi,
Ba mih jingshai byneng;
To riwai b'la ïoh mad,
Ki soh Kanaan ha neng;
Ngin poi, ngin poi, ha Seïon lum,
La don jingpep ha ri khlaw bun.
Wat ai jingieit kan swai,
Jingieit ba kum lyoh ding;
Kaba la thung U Trai,
Ban lam ïa ngi sha ïing;
Nga i ka ri ngan ïoh ia ka,
Ngan shong lem bad U Trai babha.
Ah! Tynrai khraw jingsuk,
Ka duriaw bah, khlem kut;
Ha Me ïa kiba duk,
Don spah ka bymjukut;
Jong Me ka nam, ïa Me kin nguh,
Byneng, pyrthei bad dujok ruh.

hymns.reference: Ka lama khraw la sei (226)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ka lama khraw la sei (226)
hymns.db_name: 226. Ka lama khraw la sei

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: Ngi nguh ïa Me, Ah Blei ba lah baroh,
Namar ka Gospel Jisu,—Haleluïa,—AMEN.
Haba ngi long ha ka ïing byndi dum,
Lawan ka jingshai byneng,—Haleluïa,—AMEN.

hymns.reference: Ngi nguh ia Me Ah Blei ba lah baroh (227)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ngi nguh ïa Me, Ah Blei ba lah (227)
hymns.db_name: 227. Ngi nguh ïa Me, Ah Blei ba lah

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI
hymns.sub_title: Ka Jingroi ka Hima U Khrist

lines: Khymih shatai kan sa shai,
Ngin ïa kymen;
Ki riewdum kin wan kyrhai,
Ki da kyrmen;
Kin pynkhraw ï'U Khun U Blei,
Ha ka ïaroh;
Ba ïa ki U pynim ei,
Kin nguh baroh.
Kham ha khlieh ïa ka pyrthei,
Ha ka burom;
Long ka hima jong U Blei,
Junom, junom;
Ka ïing jong U kin ïohi,
Ki jaitbynriew;
Їa ki lum kan paw ha khlieh,
Ba la kyntiew.
Ki riew kyndong ka pyrthei,
Kin wan kyrpad;
Ban ïoh mad ka jingaiei,
Jisu Kynrad;
Їa ki hukum kiba khuid,
Kin sa rakhe;
Jingsuk kaba shlei, ba tuid,
Kan wan shane.
Babilon kan kyllon kram,
Bad u prophet;
Ki blei thala kin sa ngam,
Kham sha lyndet;
Hima kiba rit bad khraw,
La ki thala;
Kin sa nguh ï'U Blei Nongthaw,
Haleluïa!

hymns.reference: Khymih shatai kan sa shai (228)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Khymih shatai kan sa shai (228)
hymns.db_name: 228. Khymih shatai kan sa shai

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: To ïeng ïashah sh'U Jisu,
Phi shipai Syiem byneng;
To kaweh ïa ka lama,
To rah ruh kham shaneng;
Na jingjop sha ka jingjop,
L'U paid ïapom Un lam;
Ki nongshun jong U baroh,
Sha jingjot kin ïa ngam.
To ïeng ïashah sh'U Jisu,
Ka turoi ka la jam;
Shaphrang, ka jur ka thyma,
Їatur, ïapom, U lam;
Phi kiba khlaiñ, to ïeng,
Ki bun ki nongïaleh;
Jingshlur kan mih na jingma,
Ngin jop, ngin jop la eh.
To ïeng iashah sh'U Jisu,
To bat ka bor jong U;
Wat nud ban ieng marwei,
Ka bor u briew kan duh;
Ki tiar ïa pom to kieng noh,
To sharai, to kyrpad;
Ha shitom lane jingma,
To kohnguh l'U Kynrad.
To ïeng ïashah sh'U Jisu,
Ka jingïaleh nym slem;
Ka jam ka thyma mynta,
Lashai jingrisa'n shem;
Ha uba lah ha thyma,
Ka nam nongjop yn ai;
Ha khet U Syiem ka burom,
Un synshar ruh khlem wai.

hymns.author: R. J.
hymns.reference: To ieng iashah shU Jisu (229)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: To ïeng ïashah sh'U Jisu (229)
hymns.db_name: 229. To ïeng ïashah sh'U Jisu

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: Shipai jong U Jisu,
Ryntih baroh lang;
Haba riew ka turoi,
Їa ngin tur shaphrang;
Khrist U Kapten jong ngi,
Uba donbor tam;
Sha ka jingjop thiaw,
Їa ngi Un ïalam.
chorus: La ka thma ka nang jur,
Lei lei wat kynran;
Shaniah tang h'U Jisu,
Dei ma U ba shan.

lines: Ha jingshakri ïa U,
Don ka kam kyrhai;
Kiba hap ban khring pat,
Pynshait kiba swai;
Man ka sngi ka por hi,
Ї'U ngin kyntiew nam;
Sha ka jingjop thiaw,
Їa ngi Un ïalam.
Shaphrang to ngin nang tur,
Ha ka liang U Trai;
Їalap ïa ka Gospel,
Їaid ruh ha jingshai,
Hukum jong U ngin leh,
Bainong ai kan dam;
Sha ka jingjop thiaw,
Їa ngi Un ïalam.

hymns.author: H.S.R.
hymns.reference: Shipai jong U Jisu (230)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Shipai jong U Jisu (230)
hymns.db_name: 230. Shipai jong U Jisu

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: Na ri lum thah ka Greenland,
Naduh ri India ngi;
Na ki um kyrsoi Aphrik,
Ba kit maw ksiar hi.
Na ki dewlang ri Lyngngam,
Naduh ki wah barim;
Ki duwai lem ‘To ïalam,
Na jingïap sha jingim.’
La lyer iwbih ba pyngngad,
Ka beh ha ri Silon;
La baroh ka itynnad,
U briew ha sniew u shong,
Ka long lehnohei suda,
Ban theh ki jingai Blei;
Ba sah u briew ha thala,
B'u dem ï'u ksuid u khrei.
Ma ngi b'la ïoh ka jingshai,
Jingstad ba khuid byneng;
Ngi lah riewdum ban bynnud,
Ka sharak ka jingim?
Jingpynim! Ah Jingpynim!
Ka ktien sngewbha ïalap;
Ba baroh khun ka jingtim,
Ї'U Jisu kin ïasngap.
Kit, kit phi lyer ka jingong,
Phi ruh ki um tyllun;
Ka Gospel kat ka duriaw,
Kan tap lup pyrthei p'lun,
Ki bynriew ba la siewspah,
Ba siew ïashah U Khun;
L'U Syiem ba thaw ba pynim,
Kin wan ïadem ïanguh.

hymns.reference: Na ri lum thah ka Greenland (231)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Na ri lum thah ka Greenland (231)
hymns.db_name: 231. Na ri lum thah ka Greenland

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: U Jisu Khrist Un synshar lut,
Ka pyrthei bah na kut sha kut;
Ka hima jong U kan nang pur,
Katba dang sah ka sngi bad khlur.
To synshar hi, ko Trai ki paid,
Ki koidi na ki nar kin lait;
Riew thait kin shem ka jingsuk jai,
Ka shitom baroh de kan wai.
Ki jingthaw baroh ha pyrthei,
To ai kin ïaroh lang ï'U Blei;
Ki angel neng to shad kymen,
Ka khyndew ruh to ong, AMEN.

hymns.author: J.C.E.
hymns.reference: U Jisu Khrist Un synshar lut (232)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: U Jisu Khrist Un synshar lut (232)
hymns.db_name: 232. U Jisu Khrist Un synshar lut

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: Lyndet lum, ki lyoh bad jingdum,
Suk mynsiem khymih shatei;
Ki jingkular kin sa pynmih,
Їa ka sngi ka jingisnei;
Jubil byneng,
Kata ka sngi ai ngin i.
Wan phi bynriew, wan phi baroh,
Wan nongkyndong ban ïohi;
Їa ka jingjop ba U Jisu,
U la ïoh ha Kalbari;
Ai ba Gospel,
Kan sawa na kut sha kut.
Bun ki ri ba shong ha jingdum,
Ah ban poi jingshai ha ki!
Їa ka miet ba dum to beh noh,
Naduh mihngi sha sepngi;
Ka jingpynim,
Tang ma ka to ai kan jop.

hymns.reference: Lyndet lum ki lyoh bad jingdum (233)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Lyndet lum, ki lyoh bad jingdum (233)
hymns.db_name: 233. Lyndet lum, ki lyoh bad jingdum

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: Trai to synshar ha ka pyrthei,
Naduh mihngi sha sepngi;
To pynïoh ki hima baroh,
Kum ka bynta jong Me hi;
Jingshai byneng,
To pynshai ïa ka pyrthei.
Ka ri India khraw ba riewspah,
Ba la dap da ka jingdum,
Ai kan pydiang ïa ka Gospel,
Ha ri them bad ha ri lum:
Te ka jingsuk,
Kan pyndap na kut sha kut.
Ї'U Syiem Seïon to kin riwai,
Da ki sur sngewbha ba bang;
Naduh shatei shaduh shathie,
Ai kin burom ïa U lang:
Ai kin ïaroh,
Jingitynnad Syiem byneng.

hymns.author: J.C.E.
hymns.reference: Trai to synshar ha ka pyrthei (234)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Trai to synshar ha ka pyrthei (234)
hymns.db_name: 234. Trai to synshar ha ka pyrthei

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: Ah! mynsynñia nga shu khymih,
Khymih lano kan sa shai;
Khymih ba kin plie ki khyrdop,
Na ki nar ba khum ban lait:
Byrngut Jubil,
Lano shisha kan sa paw?
Kum ka leilieh her jingbyna,
Her ban jop ki bynriew phar;
Ai ki pud kin ïar noh kylleng,
Їa ka pyrthei ban synshar:
Ktien ka jingim,
Sha ba kut ka duriaw poi.
Mih to mih ka sngi ba tyngshaiñ,
Beh ka jingdum na ki briew;
Ka jingsawa jingput Gospel,
Hangne bad shaneng kan riew;
Baroh kawei,
Hima bah Immanuel.

hymns.reference: Ah mynsynnia nga shu khymih (235)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ah! mynsynñia nga shu khymih (235)
hymns.db_name: 235. Ah! mynsynñia nga shu khymih

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: U Syiem ka Seïon Un synshar donbor,
Ka pyrthei baroh ïa U kan kohnguh;
Un pynlong la hima ka burom kham kor,
Ka synshar ka jong U te junom kam duh.
Ah Blei, bor bah jong ngi mynno mynno,
Ka jingkyrmen jong ngi lano lano;
Long nongïalam jong ngi katba ngi dang sah,
Ka jaka rieh jong ngi ka long bym ju jah.
Jisu, Me la wad ïa nga u nongwei,
Uba la sakma na ka ïing U Blei;
Me, Men pynim ïa ka mynsiem jot jong nga,
Ka snam, Me la pynmih, ka snam kordor bah.
Shait eh ban sakma, Trai nga sngew kata,
Shait ruh ban phai na Me, Uba nga ieit;
Shim dohnud jong nga Trai, shim pynskhem ïa ka,
Ba ngan ïaid hun bad Me, Ah Kynrad ba bha.

hymns.reference: U Syiem ka Seion Un synshar donbor (236)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: U Syiem ka Seïon Un synshar (236)
hymns.db_name: 236. U Syiem ka Seïon Un synshar

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: Trai pynim la ka kam,
Haba Seïon ka swai;
Ki jingtlot jong ka to pyndam,
Da bor Blei ba kynsai.
La ki briew to pynshai,
Sha mynsiem ba duwai;
Ai la kular kin pynthymmai,
Syllok bad la U Trai.
Hangta Mynsiem Un kren,
Da thylliej tlot jong ngi;
Hangta kin um ki dohnud rben,
Bad nongleh kiat kin phai.
Ah Trai, to sngew ia ngi:
Ngi ïam, ngi nguh, ngi dem;
Ah wallam jingpynim ïa ngi!
Ha Me ngi shaniah skhem.

hymns.author: H. L.
hymns.reference: Trai pynim la ka kam (237)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Trai pynim la ka kam (237)
hymns.db_name: 237. Trai pynim la ka kam

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: B'U Jisu U dang im,
Un lam ki khun jingtim,
Sha ïing U Blei;
Ko khun ka Seïon, shad,
L'U Kynrad pha la wad;
Sa khyndiat eh sa mad,
Jingieit ba shlei.
Ah! ngin ïoh riwai lang,
Ha khet U Trai kan bang,
Mynsiem la hun,
Ki paitbah bun shatei,
Na baroh ka pyrthei,
La jingïaroh ki sei,
‘Burom ï'U Khun.’

hymns.reference: BU Jisu U dang im (238)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: B'U Jisu U dang im (238)
hymns.db_name: 238. B'U Jisu U dang im

hymns.section_heading: VI. SHAPHANG KA KAM U BLEI

lines: Ale phi khun U Blei,
Da jingkmen to ngin rwai;
Ban pynsawa jingieit U Blei, (2 sien)
Sawdong ka Khet U Trai. (2 sien)
chorus: Ngin nang ïaid ska Seïon,
Seïon itynnad jong U Trai;
Ngin nang ïaid shatei sha Seïon,
Sha Nongbah Bakhuid jong U Trai.

lines: Phi ki khun U Syiem Bneng,
To kyntiew nam khlem wai,
Pynbna kyrteng U Trai kylleng, (2 sien)
Ba bynriew tip ï'U Trai. (2 sien)
H'u lum Seïon ba dap,
Da burom jong U Trai;
Ngin ïaid ha lynti ksiar-nylla, (2 sien)
Ban poi ri bneng phyrnai. (2 sien)
Jingrwai thiang yn ïaisah,
Katba shaphrang nang ïaid;
Ngin nang ïaid sha ka ri U Trai, (2 sien)
Ri bathiang bym ju blad. (2 sien)

hymns.author: D.E.S.
hymns.reference: Ale phi khun U Blei (239)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ale phi khun U Blei (239)
