lines: Ki wah bah jingkymen ki kyrsoi,
Na shapoh khet ksiar U Blei;
Te hangta la kyntiew ï'U Jisu,
Bad hangta U ïeng ïasaid ei.
Ka snam b'la pynhun ïa ka hukum,
B'la synreit ruh halor ka khet;
Ka hangta ka kyrpad sngewsynei,
Ka synrang ba skhem ba ngin phet.
Ngin kiew noh na ka khlaw ba kynsha,
Ngin ïoh ïa ka jingsuk ba skhem;
Ka mynsiem ba lywait ka kynjai,
Ha shadem jong U Blei kan shem.
Jinglait ngin ïoh junom te hangta,
Ka pop bad jingjynjar la wai;
Ngin khawai ki yrta bymjukut,
Jingieit U Jisu U Trai.
Na kliar lum jerong Kaersalem
Ka jingieit ri khlaw ngin ïohi;
Hangta ki jingkyllaiñ ka lynti,
Jingbang ka mynsiem kin pynmih.
Ngin khymih ki erïong, jingsheptieng,
Jingïap ba itriem, ka jingtep;
Te hangta ngin lait na ki baroh,
Ka sngi jong ka jingsuk kam sep.

hymns.author: J. R.
hymns.reference: Ki wah bah jingkymen ki kyrsoi (497)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ki wah bah jingkymen ki kyrsoi (497)
hymns.db_name: 497. Ki wah bah jingkymen ki kyrsoi

lines: Ah Salem! ka shnong kaba ieit,
Ka kyrteng jong pha nga sngewbha;
Te lano kan wai noh jingshitom,
Da kymen bad ïaroh ha pha?
Te lano ki khmat kin ïoh khymih.
Ki khyrdop mawlynnai ba rem;
Ki lynti ka ksiar ba tyngshaiñ,
Ki kynroh ruh kiba sah skhem?
Ah Salem! ka shnong U Trai jong nga,
Te lano ngan ïoh poi sha pha?
Ha kaba kam wai jingïasyllok,
Jinghun ruh te junom kan sah.
Ka jingsuk ba khuid ka don hangta,
Їa jingsuk ka Eden kham brai;
Ka jingshai kham tyngshaiñ ïa ka sngi,
Ka jingshai na khmat jong U Trai.
Ah! jaka itynnad ba suk ruh,
Ban poi hapoh hangta nga kwah;
Shen shen ngan ïoh lait na jingshitom,
Ki erïong ki hadien, dang sah.
Te balei ka pang lane shitom,
Jingïap ki pynsheptieng, ki ban?
Ka ri ka jingkular nga ïohi,
Ka Kanaan bymjukut ka jan.
Don hangta nongriwai ba tyngshaiñ,
Ki riwai ï'U Jisu U Trai;
Don hangne ki lok ki ban kiew ruh,
Ban ïaroh bad kita khlem wai.
Ah Salem! ïing jong nga ba ieit,
Ka dohnud ka kwah ban ïohi;
Te hangta jingshitorn kan kylla,
Ka jingsuk ba kynjai ha khlieh.

hymns.reference: Ah Salem ka shnong kaba ieit (498)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ah Salem! ka shnong kaba ieit (498)
hymns.db_name: 498. Ah Salem! ka shnong kaba ieit

lines: Don ka ri ba sngewtynnad hir hir,
Kiba ngeit kin ïohi na jyngai;
Ba I Pa I dang ap harud um,
I la thaw ka ïing hun bad U Trai.
chorus: Ah jinghun! sha byneng!
Ngin sa shem ka jinghun sha byneng.

lines: Ki jingkynud ba bang ki riewblei,
Ngin ïoh riwai ha kata ka ri;
Ka mynsiem kan ym khuslai ei ei,
Ka la her ban suk kynjai ha khlieh.
To ïakhymih sha kata ka ri,
Ngin ïabeh la i nangne ba jngai;
Ngin ïabam ka lyer pyngngad iwbih,
Ka jingkyrmen U Kpa U la ai.
Da ka snam ïa ka lynti la thaw,
Ba ngin poi sha ri hun da jingmap;
Riew Hosanna ï’U Kpa ba sybun,
B’U la ai la U Khun ban shah ïap.
Ї’U Nongpynim ba ieit, ba khraw,
Ka jingnguh ngin ïa-ai, ngin ïaroh;
Ba sha lyndet ka jingïap la thaw,
Їa u bynriew ka jingsuk ban ïoh.

hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Don ka ri ba sngewtynnad hir hir (499)

lines: Ynda la wai jingleit pyrthei,
Jingjynjar bun ruh kylleng,
Ka long ka dawai ba pynhun;
Їa ka shadem ba tlot ba ñuin,
Ban ïoh shongthait ha byneng.
Ah! haba khih ki erïong bah,
Sngewbang ban kynmaw hateng,
La ki lyer khraw ki beh jyndei;
Katba ngi ïaid duriaw pyrthei,
Ka jingsuk jai ha byneng.
La hangne don ki nongshun bun,
Ba pynsaja ba leh meng,
Ha lyndet wah jingïap ba shlei;
Ha duriaw bah jinghun U Blei,
Ngin ïoh jingsuk, ha byneng.
Te mynta don ki lok ba ieit,
Ha ri ka jingsuk shaneng,
Kim sngew ei ei ba pynkhuslai;
Jingshitom baroh ka la wai,
Ki riwai hin ha byneng.
La ïaid ha them jingsngewsih slem,
Da bud riewkhuid bun pateng,
Ki ummat Un ñiad noh U Trai;
Jingud kin kylla jingriwai,
Junom junom ha byneng.
Mynsiem jong nga ka kwah ban i.
Ka shnong na Me b'la kyrteng,
Ko Blei, ko Jisu, ko I Pa;
To ai ngan wan sha ri ba bha,
Ban ïaroh jam ha byneng.

Ha ka burom ka ai ngan mih;
Ha ka sngewsih nga shong, pansngiat
[kwah phong,
Ha ka ri ba sngewbha sha khlieh.
chorus: Ngan ïoh ri itynnad U Trai,
Ka khuslai pyrthei la wai;
U Jisu, ha ka, U leit ban ïashna,
Ka jaka ba ngan suk jai.

lines: Don ka ri ba sngewbha sha khlieh,
Bad ki lok ha ka, suk ki rieh;
Nga sngew kumba i ba ki ap te ïa ngi,
Ha ka ri ba sngewbha sha khlieh.
Don ka ri ba sngewbha sha khlieh,
Bad la hangne ka ïam ka mih;
N'U Jisu ka paw ba ki ummat kim jaw,
Ha ka ri ba sngewbha sha khlieh.
Don ka ri ba sngewbha sha khlieh,
Ktien ‘Khublei’ ban ïa khlad kam mih;
Sha shiliang ka wah ngi la lait ka jingma,
Ha ka ri ba sngewbha sha khlieh.

lines: Ah! junom bad U Trai,
Shaneng to shah ngan shong;
Ha kane im mynsiem khlem wai,
Ka ktien ba im ka long.
Shane ha ruh la set,
Bad jngai na u ka ring;
Te ha la ka sngi nang ïaphet,
Kham hajan sha la ïing.
Sha la ïing, sha la ïing,
Kham hajan sha la ïing.
Ka ïing I Pa sha khlieh,
Sha shnong ruh nga la jan;
Hateng ka jingngeit ka ïohi,
Ban shaw b'Um pep ban wan.
Ban poi ha shnong U Syiem,
Nga thrang mynsiem hateng;
Ka jingïoh bynta ki baim,
Ka Salem sha byneng,
Sha byneng, sha byneng.
Ka Salem sha byneng.
Artatien ka wan lap,
Jingtyngen ruh ka her;
Kum ïa ka paro jong u Noah,
Ba ban ka um ka lyer,
La ryngaw shibit sngi,
La pei la paw byneng;
La hun ban i ka rud ka ri,
Ba shato ngin ïashem.
Ngin ïashem, ngin ïashem,
Ba shato ngin ïashem.

lines: Don ri ba suk janai, jyngai, jyngai,
Hangta riewkhuid tyngshaiñ, shai kat ka sngi.
Ah katno ki ïarwai,
Їaroh ï'U Nongpynim Syiem!
Kin ïaroh jam sngewbha, - Їaroh junom.
To wan sha ri ba suk, - Ah to wan kloi,
Phin ïaïeng lyngngoh lei, phin tud lei, lok!
Jingsuk ngin ïoh pakai,
Ynda pop bad sngewsih lait,
Ngin ïoh im bad U Trai, - Suk, suk, junom.
Suk, shngaiñ ngin long hangta, tyngshaiñ ki
[khmat,
Da kti U Kpa la ri - jingieit kam ïap.
Ah phet sha burom te,
Wan long syiem bad lyngdoh Blei,
Tyngshaiñ, neng bad sngi de, -- Ngin suk
[junom.

lines: To rwai ïaroh ïa U Jisu,
Bad ïa jingieit ba phylla;
Ha ki ïing shongneh ba phyrnai,
U la leit ban khreh jaka.
chorus: Ynda ngin poi lang ha bneng,
Ka jingkmen bah hangta kan long ïa ngi;
Haba i ï'U Jisu,
Ngin ïaroh jingjop Kalbari.

lines: Haba ngi ïaid lynti pilgrim,
Ki lyoh ba dum kin sa shai;
Ynda ki sngi jingleit la wai,
Junom ngin shong bad U Trai.
Long ba shisha bad ba ngeit skhem,
Ha jingshakri ïa U Trai;
Tang shu peit ïa U ha burom,
Jingkhuslai baroh la wai.
Nang ïaid shaphrang pansngiat Un ai,
Їeng skhem bad shaniah ha U;
Shen ki plie ki khyrdop phyrnai,
Bad ngin ïohi l'U Jisu.

lines: RIEWHOK U SHONG HA BNENG.
Riewhok u shong ha byneng,
Bad U Blei bad Khun;
U ïai ïaroh, u ïai ïaroh,
Ї'U Blei Uba la ieit bad isynei.
Ki la poi suk ha ïing I Pa,
Bad riewkhuid ki tem jingkynud;
Jingriew bneng, ïaroh ï'U Blei,
B'u ri pynim ei.

lines: Don ka Ri nga ïohi ha lyndet jong ki lyoh;
Itynnad bad phyrnai kum ka sngi,
Lyer ba iwbih ki ïai beh ruh junom hangta,
Ah! jingkmen jingsuk phin ïoh shisha.
chorus: Ah! Jingkmen, Ah! jingsuk
Ka pyndap ïa mynsiem
Dei hangta nga ïoh mad ïa jinghun ba kynjai
Ha kata ka ri hun bad, U Trai.

lines: Ka nongbah ba la shna da ka ksiar nylla,
Bad pyndait ruh da maw bakordor.
Don khadar ki khyrdop ba phin ïoh rung hangta,
Ї'u b'la sait ha ka snam khunlangbrot.
Nongbah ba dap jingsuk, lano ngan ïoh ïa pha;
Jingpang, jingïap bad khuslai la wai
Ngin ïarwai, ngin ïabam na u dieng ka jingim
Bad junom, ngin ïaroh ïa, u Syiem.

hymns.section_heading: IX. KI SNEM BAD KI AЇOM.

lines: Ka snem la wai jyngai la phet,
Ah Trai ka dap da jingleh klet;
Jingpalat bun, ka khraw jingrem,
To map ki pop katai ka snem.
Ko Pa isnei, Ah Trai jingim,
Da bor jong Me baroh ki im;
Ki kular Me ki ïaineh skhem,
Ha ngi la poi kane ka snem.
Jingsumar sukher, Trai, ka bha,
Baroh shi snem kaba la lah;
Ka jingisnei ruh ngi la shem,
Ngi la ïoh pat kane ka snem.

hymns.reference: Ka snem la wai jyngai la phet (507)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ka snem la wai jyngai la phet (507)
hymns.db_name: 507. Ka snem la wai jyngai la phet

hymns.section_heading: IX. KI SNEM BAD KI AЇOM.

lines: Baroh shisnem la ker U Blei,
Bad katno U la map!
Їa la ka lama ngin ïasei,
B'U Trai U la ïarap.
Kaei sa jia ym lah ban ong,
Ha ki sngi ki ban mih;
Ka jingsbun katno ktien ka long,
‘Ngan da ma nga ïa phi’.
Ah Trai, ha ka kti jong Me buh,
Ki snem ki ban sa mih;
Ka bor jong Me ban shaniah duh,
Ma Me long jakarieh.

hymns.reference: Baroh shisnem la ker U Blei (508)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Baroh shisnem la ker U Blei (508)
hymns.db_name: 508. Baroh shisnem la ker U Blei

hymns.section_heading: IX. KI SNEM BAD KI AЇOM.

lines: Ha Me, Ah Blei, la ki mynsiem,
Ngi ai ban long jong Me, to shim;
Da ka jingieit ruh ngi dem,
Kumne ba sdang kane ka snem.
Pynkylla ruh ïa ngi, Ah Trai,
Ka jingmut dum da nang pynshai;
Da ka jingieit ngin ïadem,
Kumne ba sdang kane ka snem.
Katba dang im, to Men ïarap,
Ban neh ha Me ha ban da ïap;
Ba da ka dohnud khlem jingrem,
Їa khublei ruh kane ka snem.
Kumne nang leit ki snem ki sngi,
Ah Blei, pynbit ma Me ïa ngi;
Ba ha byneng ngin ïoh ïashem,
Ha kaba ym ju kheiñ ki snem.

hymns.reference: Ha Me Ah Blei la ki mynsiem (509)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ha Me, Ah Blei, la ki mynsiem (509)
hymns.db_name: 509. Ha Me, Ah Blei, la ki mynsiem

hymns.section_heading: IX. KI SNEM BAD KI AЇOM.

lines: Ah Trai ba khraw, Me synshar hi,
Ka lyiur, ka tlang, ka snem, ka sngi;
Ї'U slap na neng, Ah Blei, Me phah,
Ї'u jingthung jong ngi ban pynbha.
Ka aïom ot ruh Me la ai,
Їa ngin ïaroh ïa la U Trai;
La man, la bha, la seisoh ruh,
Da ka jingkmen to ngin ïanguh.
Ki thiar ki dap da ka jingbam,
Kyrhai U ai, sybun U sam;
Katba ngi bam, wat ai ngin klet,
Nongpynmih symbai ba la bet.

hymns.reference: Ah Trai ba khraw Me synshar hi (510)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ah Trai ba khraw, Me synshar (510)
hymns.db_name: 510. Ah Trai ba khraw, Me synshar

hymns.section_heading: IX. KI SNEM BAD KI AЇOM.

lines: Ngi don jingbam b'la buh lypa,
Wat shah ngin dap, ngin hun ha ka;
Khlem wad jingbam ba dei mynsiem,
Khlem ïoh ka jingsuk Nongpynim.
Ka aïom ot ba khraw kan wan,
Te mynta ka nang jan nang jan;
Pynlong ïa ngi, ki soh ba ih,
Ba ngin sngewbha kata ka sngi.
Haba ki angel kin sa mih,
Ban lum ban lang jingot ba ih;
Ah! ban da long ban lum ïa ngi,
Lem bad u kew sha byneng hi.

hymns.reference: Ngi don jingbam bla buh lypa (511)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ngi don jingbam b'la buh lypa (511)
hymns.db_name: 511. Ngi don jingbam b'la buh lypa

hymns.section_heading: IX. KI SNEM BAD KI AЇOM.

lines: To ïaroh lang ï'U Trai Nongthaw,
Phi paidbah baroh b'U la thaw;
Da jingkmen nam jong U pynbna,
Ha kyrteng jong U leh sngewbha.
Jingieit bad jingsbun U la leh,
Jingkyrkhu ruh ha ngi U theh;
Na jingma U da U ïalam,
Haduh ba ka snem rim ngi jam.
Ah katno khraw jingieit U Blei,
Halor jong ngi U la theh sei!
Baroh shisnem U ker U da,
Ngi la ïoh pat kane mynta.
Da jingieit bah ba phylla tam,
Їa jingïaid jong ngi U ïalam;
Na jingsniew baroh U pyllait,
Haba ngi tlot U nang pynshait.
Ainguh ï'U Blei namar jingbha,
Jingisnei jong U kim kylla;
Jingshisha jong U ka neh skhem,
Lynter ki sngi, ki bnai, ki snem.

hymns.author: J.C.E.
hymns.reference: To iaroh lang ïU Trai Nongthaw (512)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: To ïaroh lang ï’U Trai Nongthaw (512)
hymns.db_name: 512. To ïaroh lang ï’U Trai Nongthaw

hymns.section_heading: IX. KI SNEM BAD KI AЇOM.

lines: Kyrkhu Trai kane ka snem,
Hajan jong Me ngi ïadem;
Pynkup ïa ngi bor jong Me,
Khun ki jong Me ai ngin long.
Trai Nongaplangbrot jong ngi,
Ha Me ban snoh man ka sngi;
Khmat jong ngi pynpeit Ah Trai,
Burom jong Me ban ïohi.
Me la seng la ka Balang,
Їa ngi Me la khot kyrpang;
Ban sakhi ïa Me ko Trai,
Shilynter kane ka snem.
Kyrkhu lang ïa ngi baroh,
Bor thymmai na Me ban ïoh;
Man ka sngi ban ïai pynbna,
Ka bor bad jingieit jong Me.

hymns.author: W. K.
hymns.reference: Kyrkhu Trai kane ka snem (513)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Kyrkhu Trai kane ka snem (513)
hymns.db_name: 513. Kyrkhu Trai kane ka snem

hymns.section_heading: IX. KI SNEM BAD KI AЇOM.

lines: Ngi dem ha khmat jong Me, Trai,
Ban ïaroh ïa Me khlem wai;
Snem bathymmai Me la ai,
Ba ngi ïoh ban pdiang mynta.
chorus: Їalam, Їalam,
Їalam, Trai, ïoh ngi bakla;
Katba ki sngi ki nang ïaid,
Ah Nongpynim to ïalam.

lines: Snem, bathymmai ngi la ïoh,
Tang jingnguh ïa Me ngi ai;
Ngi dwai ba men nang ïalam,
Ba ïa ka ngin ïaid lyngba.
Sngi ki her ki mareh stet,
Ah Trai ïalam beit ïa ngi;
Lynti eh la dei ban ïaid,
Da la kti to btin ïa ngi.
Lyngba jong kane ka snem,
La jingisnei to pynshlei;
Met bad mynsiem ki jong ngi,
Pyndap da la jingaiei.

hymns.author: L.L.D.
hymns.reference: Ngi dem ha khmat jong Me Trai (514)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ngi dem ha khmat jong Me, Trai (514)
hymns.db_name: 514. Ngi dem ha khmat jong Me, Trai

hymns.section_heading: IX. KI SNEM BAD KI AЇOM.

lines: Ale to ngin ïarwai lang mynta,
Ban ïaroh ïa U Blei;
Ba U la ïalam ïa ngi lyngba,
Kane ka snem barim.
chorus: Rwai jam phi ki bynriew baroh lang
Ban ïaroh ïa U Blei;
Ba U la theh la ki jingkyrkhu,
Lyngba kane ka snem.

lines: Ah Blei ha Me ngi pyndem baroh,
Dohnud jong ngi to shim;
Ei ei ngim don ban ai ha Me,Trai,
Ha jingaiei ngi im.
Ah Blei Me shem bun ki jingduna,
Lyngba kane ka snem;
Hynrei Me la ïalam beit ïa ngi,
Me pynksan ngi barem,
Jingdonkam jong ngi Me la pyndap,
Da jingisnei jong Me;
Ki kam ki kti jong ngi baroh phar,
La kyrkhu hi da Me.
Ah Blei ngi dwai ba Men ïalam pat,
Lyngba sngi ban dang wan;
Haba snem rim ngi ïoh ban ïaid lait,
Jingim ruh pynthymmai.

hymns.author: L.L.D.
hymns.reference: Ale to ngin iarwai lang mynta (515)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ale to ngin ïarwai lang mynta (515)
hymns.db_name: 515. Ale to ngin ïarwai lang mynta

hymns.section_heading: X. KA JINGAI SHA KA KAM U BLEI.
hymns.sub_title: Jingim jong nga, Trai, to shim

lines: Jingim jong nga, Trai, to shim,
Rap ban ïaid ka lynti khim;
Ki sngi jong nga baroh phar,
Nam ka jong Me kin pynïar.
Ki kti jong nga, Trai, to shim,
Ban trei kam ka jingpynim;
Kyjat jong nga ruh, ko Trai,
Ban ïaid beit bad Me khlem wai.
Ka jingsawa jong nga shim,
Ba ngan ïaroh la U Syiem;
Shyntur jong nga to pyndap,
Ka ktien jong Me ngan ïalap.
Spah ka jong nga, Trai, to shim,
Dohnud jong nga kam sngewkhim;
Jingnang jong nga pyndonkam,
Ban pynkyntiew la ka nam.
Mon ka jong nga, Trai, to shim,
To pynduh ka jinglong rim;
Ha ka dohnud jong nga shong,
Khet ka jong Me ai kan long.
Jingieit jong nga, Trai, to shim,
Me la ieit na mynbarim;
Shim ïa nga, Ah Trai ba bha,
Ban ïai im ïa Me nga kwah.

hymns.author: J. J.
hymns.reference: Jingim jong nga Trai to shim (516)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Jingim jong nga, Trai, to shim (516)
hymns.db_name: 516. Jingim jong nga, Trai, to shim

hymns.section_heading: X. KA JINGAI SHA KA KAM U BLEI.

lines: Haba jingim jong phi la pynkhih erïong,
Jingkyrmen la duh, baroh ka thala long;
Ñiew la ki jingkyrkhu, jer ïa ki baroh,
Aiu b'la leh d'U Blei te phin sa lyngngoh.
chorus: Ñiew jingkyrkhu, jer ïa ki baroh,
Ñiew jingkyrkhu, b'U Blei la pynïoh;
Ñiew jingkyrkhu, jer ïa ki baroh,
Aiu b'la leh d'U Blei te phin sa lyngngoh.

lines: Ban kit la ka khuslai phi ud, phi sngewthait,
Ban bah la ka diengphna shisha phim lah lait;
Ñiew la ki jingkyrkhu artatien kan dam,
Lynter lynti phin shu rwai katba nang jam.
Haba phi peit sha kiba kyrhai ka spah,
Kynmaw b'U Khrist U la kular kham bun shah;
Ñiew la ki jingkyrkhu ba spah kam wan rah,
Ka nong ha bneng long ban i ï'U Trai khlem kah.
Kumta hapdeng ki jingeh, la rit ne khraw,
Wat duh jingkyrmen b'U don U Trai Nongthaw;
Ñiew la ki jingkyrkhu b'U Trai U pynphai,
Jingshngaiñ phin ïoh haduh ba jingleit kan wai.

hymns.author: W. M.
hymns.reference: Haba jingim jong phi la pynkhih erïong (517)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Haba jingim jong phi la pynkhih erïong (517)
hymns.db_name: 517. Haba jingim jong phi la pynkhih

hymns.section_heading: X. KA JINGAI SHA KA KAM U BLEI.

lines: Ka pyrthei Me la thaw,
Jingdap jong ka baroh;
Me ai Ah Trai bakhraw,
Ha u briew ba un ïoh.
Ka burom ïa Me dei ban ai,
Ka hok ba shisha kum jingsmai.
Naduh barim hyndai,
Me lum ïa la ki briew;
Ha ki Me da hikai,
Jingainguh ban kyntiew.
Їarap ban pynneh ha ngi ruh,
Ban skhem jingbha kumba Me buh.
Ngi phla ha Me mynta,
Da kine ba ngi ai;
Ki long jingai ba bha,
Sha Me dei ban pynphai.
La rit ne tlot ngi shlur ban leh,
Ha la ka Balang ai kan neh.

hymns.author: H.L.L.
hymns.reference: Ka pyrthei Me la thaw (518)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ka pyrthei Me la thaw (518)
hymns.db_name: 518. Ka pyrthei Me la thaw

hymns.section_heading: X. KA JINGAI SHA KA KAM U BLEI.

lines: Trai Kynrad, Me la ai,
Jingim badap kyrhai;
Ka mynsiem, ka dohnud, bad jingieit,
Shilynter ha pyrthei.
Jingnguh ruh te ngan sei,
Shim ïa nga,
Ko Kynrad, shim ïa nga.
Jingdawa, jong ki kam,
Ktien jong Me, ban ïasam;
Ha pyrthei ba dap da ka jingdum,
Ka jingkñia, jingainguh,
Mawkordor, dei ban buh,
Shim ïa nga,
Ko Kynrad, shim ïa nga.
Jingainguh barit Trai,
Kyrkhu ban roi kyrhai;
B'la mih na kti ba tngit, ba lyngkot,
Shim Ma Me to pynkhuid,
Hikai ban ai kylluid.
Shim ïa nga,
Ko Kynrad, shim ïa nga.
Shim ïa nga, ko Kynrad,
Ki kti, ki kjat, bad khmat;
Ngan bret lut, ïalade, tang ha Me,
Jingim ruh, baroh phar.
Ma Me Trai, to synshar,
Shim ïa nga,
Ko Kynrad, shim ïa nga.

hymns.author: G.R.S.
hymns.reference: Trai Kynrad Me la ai (519)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Trai Kynrad, Me la ai (519)
hymns.db_name: 519. Trai Kynrad, Me la ai

hymns.section_heading: X. KA JINGAI SHA KA KAM U BLEI.

lines: Ngi nguh, ngi dem ïa Me, ko Trai,
Namar jingshai ba Me la ai;
Ki kpa jong ngi ban buh ban seng,
U Khawkham ban kynmaw pateng.
Shi kham mynmiet, shi kham mynstep,
Wat ai ngin klet ban ïai pyndep;
Purew h'u shang ka 'riewkynthei,
Un pynroi jingkyrkhu ba shlei.

hymns.author: M. K.
hymns.reference: Ngi nguh ngi dem ia Me ko Trai (520)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ngi nguh, ngi dem ïa Me, ko Trai (520)
hymns.db_name: 520. Ngi nguh, ngi dem ïa Me, ko Trai

hymns.section_heading: XI. JINGRWAI SHAPHANG KI ЇING KHRISTAN

lines: Ki jingduwai, jingainguh, jingrwai ïaroh,
Kum ïing Khristan, baroh lang ngin ïasoh;
Ka ïing ba la kyrkhu, ka ïing ba la tei,
Long shisha ka ïing ba shong briew shong Blei.
chorus: Trai to kyrkhu ki rympei Khristan jong ngi,
Kin rhem jingdwai jingïaroh man ka sngi;
Mynmiet, mynstep 'tien Blei ngin ïasyllok lang,
Rympei Khristan kin shit kum ding ba klang.

lines: Shisha, Ktien U Blei, ban plied man la ka sngi,
Jingbam mynsiem, ha ïing ha sem jong ngi;
Kum ïing Khristan ngin ïit shisha ïalade,
Ka ïing Khristan, long ïing Blei ba mane.
U Trai Jisu jong ngi tang U hi marwei,
Man ki ïing ki sem Khristan long U Khlieh;
Nongrim jingim Khristan tang ha U la tei,
Soh bathiang ki sei haba paw ne rieh.
Jingieit Blei kan synshar ha ki ïing ki sem,
Hapoh, habar pynpaw sha ka pyrthei;
Ka Gospel ban pynim kiba jot barem,
Ki soh ba bha na ïing Khristan kin sei.

hymns.author: P. L.
hymns.reference: Ki jingduwai jingainguh jingrwai iaroh (521)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ki jingduwai, jingainguh, jingrwai (521)
hymns.db_name: 521. Ki jingduwai, jingainguh, jingrwai

hymns.section_heading: XI. JINGRWAI SHAPHANG KI ЇING KHRISTAN

lines: Їing Khristan ba synshar U Blei,
Jingsuk ka don hangta;
Ki jingïaroh ba dap ba shlei,
Їa U ha la karta.
Tang ha U ban aiti,
Bad ïa U ban shakri;
Man la ka sngi man la ka por,}
U long Uba kordor.          } 2 sien
Ka Ktien jong U Blei kaba kor,
Ha rympei ïing Khristan;
Tang ma ka hi kaba ai bor,
Mynsiem tlot ka kyrshan.
Jingkular don hangne,
Plied ïa ka ban pule:
Man la ka sngi man la ka por,}
Ka long kaba donbor.     } 2 sien
Jingdwai na rympei ïing Khristan,
Kin ïai long borabor;
Lad tang kane ban roi ban san,
Lada ngi la ñiewkor.
Jingpynshoi u soitan,
Kim lah ban tur hajan;
Namar ha syndah jong U Trai,}
Ka bor jingjop Un ai.        } 2 sien
U Jisu U kwah ban synshar,
Їing Khristan baroh phar;
Pdiang bad pynlong U Khlieh jong ka,
Un ri na ki jingma.
Lada kiwei kim treh,
Hukum jong U ban leh;
Ma nga lem bad ka ïing ngin ai,}
Jingshakri ia U Trai.           } 2 sien

hymns.author: P. L.
hymns.reference: Iing Khristan ba synshar U Blei (522)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Iing Khristan ba synshar U Blei (522)
hymns.db_name: 522. Їing Khristan ba synshar U Blei

hymns.section_heading: XI. JINGRWAI SHAPHANG KI ЇING KHRISTAN
hymns.sub_title: Їa Me baroh shi ïing ngi nguh

lines: Їa Me Ah Jisu baieit ngi nguh,
Mynstep bad mynmiet duwan ngi buh;
Namar jingleh isnei ba ïai tuid,
Їa ka ïing jong ngi kum ka wah duid.
chorus: Baroh ngi dem, hooid, baroh ngi nguh,
Burom ïa Me shilynter jingim;
Baroh ngi dem, hooid, baroh ngi nguh,
Burom ïa Me shilynter jingim.

lines: Їa Me Ah Jisu baieit ngi nguh,
Namar jingpynim, jingsiewspah ruh;
Halor ka diengphna ba Me la shah,
Їa ka pop jong ngi Me la siewspah.
Їa Me Ah Jisu baieit ngi nguh,
Namar ki khun baieit jong ngi ruh;
Ki long ki mawkordor bad paila,
Ba pyndap jingkmen bad jingsngewbha.

hymns.author: G.R.S.
hymns.reference: Ia Me Ah Jisu baieit ngi nguh (523)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ia Me Ah Jisu baieit ngi nguh (523)
hymns.db_name: 523. Їa Me Ah Jisu baieit ngi nguh

hymns.section_heading: XI. JINGRWAI SHAPHANG KI ЇING KHRISTAN
hymns.sub_title: Ngin ïa rwai ïaroh da ka jingkmen

lines: Їing Khristan ïing ki khun U Blei baim,
B'la siewspah d'U Khrist Nongpynim;
Ki ïaroh jam kyrteng U Jisu Khrist,
B'U la siewspah ka ïing jong ki.
chorus: Ngin rwai ïaroh da ka jingkmen,
Ngin rwai ïa ka jingsiewspah jong U;
Ngin rwai shitrhem da ka jingieit,
Katba sngi bad snem ki nang leit.

lines: Ha la rympei duwan jong U ngin tei,
Jingsuk jingkmen na U ka shlei;
Haba ïa U ngi nguh ngi dem khlem wai,
Ym don jingsngewsih jingkhuslai.
Ka shap jong U Nongpynim ba la shon,
Hapoh la rympei ai kan don;
Da jingduwai bad jingrwai ngin pynpaw,
Ba tang ma U, U long bakhraw.
Ngin long jingshai ban pynshai sha kiwei,
Jingshai kan paw ha ka pyrthei;
Haba jingduwai ka rhem ha rympei,
La ngi bun ne don tang marwei.
Ah Trai to ïarap ïa ngi ba ngin rwai,
Kum u briew jong me mynhyndai;
Їing jong nga, kan shakri tang ïa Me Trai,
Haduh ba jingim kan da wai.

hymns.author: M.J.E.J.J.
hymns.reference: Iing Khristan iing ki khun U Blei baim (524)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Iing Khristan ïing ki khun U Blei (524)
hymns.db_name: 524. Їing Khristan ïing ki khun U Blei

lines: La ñiew ki khlur la ñiew u shyiap,
Ka pop jong nga ka tam;
Ka jingisnei jingmap U Blei,
Kat kine ka pyndam.
Manasseh, Paul bad Magdalen,
Ki la ïoh map na Me;
Me kular ruh ban map ïa nga,
Ah Trai ba isnei eh.

hymns.reference: La niew ki khlur la niew u shyiap (525)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: La ñiew ki khlur la ñiew u shyiap (525)
hymns.db_name: 525. La ñiew ki khlur la ñiew u shyiap

lines: Ah Trai, to khot ï'u paidbah
Ba bun ban bud ïa Me;
Bythat ki saikhum baroh
Ba teh ki dohnud eh;
To khot ïa ki na mihngi,
To khot na sepngi ruh,
Ban pyndap la ka Balang,
Jaka ka dang don shuh.

hymns.author: J.C.E.
hymns.reference: Ah Trai to khot iu paidbah (526)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ah Trai, to khot ï'u paidbah (526)
hymns.db_name: 526. Ah Trai, to khot ï'u paidbah

lines: La shem ka lynti jingmap,
Ha U Khun;
Ka lynti lait ka jingïap,
Ha U Khun;
Ka hukum ka ïoh burom,
Na kaba U shah shitom;
La hun U Kypa junom,
Ha U Khun;
Kan nguh ka Seïon junom,
Їa U Khun.
La jop, la ïuh ka dujok,
Ha U Khun;
Bad U Blei ïoh ïasyllok,
Ha U Khun;
U Syiem ba khraw ka jingim;
Ka lad ban lait ka jingtim,
Ї'u briew ba sniew ka mynsiem,
Ha U Khun,
Їa ngin ïa nguh Nongpynim,
Їa U Khun.

hymns.reference: La shem ka lynti jingmap (527)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: La shem ka lynti jingmap (527)
hymns.db_name: 527. La shem ka lynti jingmap

lines: Kin ïalap ï'U Jisu Khrist,
Haleluïa!
Ha dykhar ha Khasi ruh,
Haleluïa!
Gospel ka la wan ha ngi,
Haleluïa!
Ruh kan leit haduh sepngi,
Haleluïa!
Kan sa long ba kin ïa seng,
Haleluïa!
Ban pynkhraw ï'U Syiem byneng,
Haleluïa!
Jingïap kordor kin ïalap,
Haleluïa!
Ha pyrthei baroh satlak,
Haleluïa!
LARSINGH.

hymns.reference: Kin ialap iU Jisu Khrist (528)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Kin ïalap ï'U Jisu Khrist (528)
hymns.db_name: 528. Kin ïalap ï'U Jisu Khrist

lines: Ki lok, sha kiba leh palat,
Ei ban leit?
Ban ong b'U Khrist U la mihpat,
Ei ban leit?
Ban pynpaw jingaiei jong U,
Ba jaka rieh U long Jisu;
Ha ki bynriew naduh haduh,
Ei ban leit?
Ban ong b'U Khrist U long ba lah,
Ei ban leit?
Ї'u briew ba pop pynkylla bha,
Ei ban leit?
Da jingput rupa ban pynpaw,
Ba don jingisnei kum duriaw;
Ї'u ïong ï'u lieh, ï'u rit ï'u khraw,
Ei ban leit?
Ko lok ba ieit, mynta uei?
Ei ban leit?
Sha kaba mon Jisu ban trei,
Ei ban leit?
Kat kum ka jingkwah jong U Blei,
Sha ri ba dum, ri khlaw pyrthei;
U ban ym pyrta jam, uei?
Nga ngan leit.

hymns.author: H. R.
hymns.reference: Ki lok sha kiba leh palat (529)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ki lok, sha kiba leh palat (529)
hymns.db_name: 529. Ki lok, sha kiba leh palat

lines: Ale Jisu sha ki bynriew,
Ha ka jingdum ba dang sah;
H'ei ruh h'ei wat ai kan duna,
Jingtip shaphang diengphyna;
Lei yn long, bun ba shong,
Khlem da tip ï'U Trai b'la mong?
Her sha mihngi, her sha sepngi,
Her noh kylleng ka pyrthei;
Pynbna ïa ki nar bad jingsum,
Ha ka met jong U ba pei;
Ale lang, haba nang,
Їoh lashai ka lad la khang.

hymns.reference: Ale Jisu sha ki bynriew (530)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ale Jisu sha ki bynriew (530)
hymns.db_name: 530. Ale Jisu sha ki bynriew

lines: Bun hajar kiba tyngit
Kin wan ïawad ka snam,
B'la mih h'u lum Kalbari,
Ban sait ka pop ka ram;
La sait ki hajar bynriew -
Ki don ha ïing I Pa;
Ka sngur ka pukri pynban,
Ha ri jingjynjar bah.
Kin wan nongpop na kylleng,
Nongkyndong na jyngai;
Kin dem kin nguh ï'U Jisu,
Na ki bleithaw kin phai;
Ah! hangta kin ïa kynmaw
Ka jingïap Kalbari;
Kin um ki dohnud jong ki,
Sha U kin phet kin rieh.
Ka kuna ka diengphyna
Ka dap ba ngin ïohlait,
Ka snam U Jisu Kynrad;
Ka biang hi ban sait;
Te kumta wan u bynriew
Na satlak ka pyrthei,
Wan phai sha ïing U Kypa,
U dap da jingaiei.

hymns.author: J. R.
hymns.reference: Bun hajar kiba tyngit (531)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Bun hajar kiba tyngit (531)
hymns.db_name: 531. Bun hajar kiba tyngit

lines: Wat kyntait, ko Jisu jemnud,
Sngew ka ïam jong nga;
Haba Me dang khot ïa kiwei,
Wat kyntait ïa nga.
chorus: Jisu, Jisu,
Sngew ka ïam jong nga;
Haba Me dang khot ïa kiwei,
Wat kyntait ïa nga.

lines: Shah ngan wan sha khet jingisnei,
Jingsngewhun ban shem;
Haba dem ha ka jingsngewsih,
Jingngeit tlot pynskhem.
Ngam don hok, ko Trai, ban dawa,
Tang ba Me la shah;
Їa ka dohnud sniew pynkylla,
Namar diengphyna.
Me U Tynrai khraw ka jingim,
Bad ka jingsuk jai;
Ngam don shuh, ha neng, ha khyndew,
Tang ma Me, Ko Trai.

hymns.author: W.M J.
hymns.reference: Wat kyntait ko Jisu jemnud (532)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Wat kyntait, ko Jisu jemnud (532)
hymns.db_name: 532. Wat kyntait, ko Jisu jemnud

lines: Ngan da ïeng joit,
Ngan leit sha la I Pa;
Ngan da ong ruh shisha,
Ko Pa! nga la leh pop;
Pyrshah ïa ka byneng bad ïa Me ruh.
Ngam dei long shuh
Ban khot ïa nga u khun jong Me;
Ngan da ïeng joit, ngan leit sha la I Pa.

hymns.reference: Ngan da ieng joit (533)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ngan da ïeng joit (533)
hymns.db_name: 533. Ngan da ïeng joit

lines: Nga la ïaid sakma jngai n'U Blei,
Mynta nga wan phai;
Hapoh ka pop ngam hun, hynrei,
Ah Trai, nga wan phai.
chorus: Nga wan phai, nga wan phai,
Їaid mon shuh ngan nai;
Shan ïa nga da bor jong Me,
Ah Trai, nga wan phai.

lines: La kham slem ha jingsniew nga ngop,
Mynta nga wan phai;
Nga sngewsih kthang ïa la ka pop,
Ah Trai, nga wan phai.
Ban ïaid wir nga la ngiah, Ah Trai,
Mynta nga wan phai;
Ha ktien jong Me ngan im khlem wai,
Ah Trai, nga wan phai.
Dohnud jong nga ka pang shibun,
Mynta nga wan phai;
Ai bor ïa nga ban shem jinghun,
Ah Trai, nga wan phai.
Ka jingkyrmen jong nga ka skhem,
Mynta nga wan phai;
H'U Jisu U b'la ïap la slem,
Ah Trai, nga wan phai.
To sait ïa nga da snam ba kor,
Mynta nga wan phai;
Ba ngan kham lieh ban ïa ka ïor,
Ah Trai, nga wan phai.
JERIMOHON.

hymns.reference: Nga la iaid sakma jngai nU Blei (534)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Nga la ïaid sakma jngai n'U Blei (534)
hymns.db_name: 534. Nga la ïaid sakma jngai n'U Blei

lines: Ka khyrdop don ba rynghang sah,
Na kata i ka jingshai;
Ba tyngshaiñ eh na diengphyna,
Jingieit U Blei ba janai.
chorus: Jingisnei jylliew katno'n ong!
Їa nga ka khyrdop lait ka long!
Ka long, ka long, ka khyrdop lait ka long.

lines: Ka lait ka khyrdop, baroh wan,
Da kaba wad ka jingim;
Riewduk, riewspah, riewrit, riewsan,
Wan lut, ban im ka mynsiem.
Nang beh shaphrang, la bun ba beiñ,
Dang lait, dang lait, ka khyrdop;
Ї'U Jisu nguh, bad U ïakheiñ,
Їoh shisien lap ka jyllop.
Sha lyndet wah, sharud ngin buh,
Ї'u dieng ba ban slem shane;
Ngin ïoh pansngiat jingim ruh,
Jingieit kan jur ha byneng!

[ki lyoh,

[jingwan jong ka,
Namar jingwan ka hima ka la nang jan.

Mynsiem jong nga to pynkloi;
Namar turoi kan sa riew,
Ba U Syiem ha ka burom Un sa paw.

[pynkhreh,
Ka kwah hir hir ba Un wan U Nongpynim;

lines: Wan, wan sha Jisu,
U ap ban pydiang ei;
Nongwir men lyngngoh lei?
Wan, wan sha Jisu.
Wan, wan sha Jisu,
U ap ban pyllait ei;
Na jinglong mraw pyrthei,
Wan, wan sha Jisu.
Wan, wan sha Jisu,
U ap, to wan sngewbha;
Jingkit pynsting U lah,
Wan, wan sha Jisu.
Wan, wan sha Jisu,
U ap ïa me ban ai;
Ki khymat ba la shai,
Wan, wan sha Jisu.
Wan, wan sha Jisu,
U ap ban da ïa me,
Jingshongthait U la khreh,
Wan, wan sha Jisu.
Wan, wan sha Jisu,
U ap ban bah ïa me;
Їa kane, Ah, to leh,
Wan, wan sha Jisu.

lines: Ngan pynlong ïa phi ki nongtong briew,
Ki nongtong briew, ki nongtong briew;
Ngan pynlong ïa phi ki nongtong briew,
Lada phin bud ïa nga.
To khie leit to da pynlong synran,
Pynlong synran, pynlong synran;
To khie leit to da pynlong synran,
Їa ki bynriew baroh.
To leit khring ïa ki na ri jingdum,
Na ri jingdum, na ri jingdum;
To leit khring ïa ki na ri jingdum,
Sha ka ri ka jingshai.
To khie leit da pynbaptis ïa ki,
Pynbaptis ïa ki, pynbaptis ïa ki;
To khie leit da pynbaptis ïa ki,
Ha ka kyrteng jong Nga.

hymns.sub_title: U Jisu Khrist U dang ïaid lait

lines: Jisu Khrist U dang ïaid lait,
Peit sha U, Un ym kyntait;
Pyrta kloi ban sngew dang lah,
‘Ah to isnei, Trai, ïa nga!’
Jisu Khrist U dang ïaid lait,
Me ba swai Un nang pynshait;
Ka sngi pydiang hun la poi,
Wad jingkhiah, to wad kloi.
Peit! U ïeng, U kren ha me,
‘Kaei me kwah ïa nga ban leh?’
Pynpaw lut la ki jingkwah,
Ban pynim U ju sngewbha.
Trai, ïa ngi to isnei eh,
Ai kan paw ka ieit jong Me;
Sha ka mynsiem ai kan pei,
Nangta la ki soh kan sei.
Ah sngewbha! ka bor la wan,
Por ka jingpynim ka jan;
Ha U Jisu Khrist ngi lait,
Їa ka dohnud sniew la sait.

hymns.author: J. R.

hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Jisu Khrist U dang ïaid lait (539)
hymns.db_name: 539. Jisu Khrist U dang ïaid lait

lines: Phi bynriew ba la ngop,
Ha pop bad ha kordit;
Їa Gospel phin ïasngap,
B'U Jisu U dang khot.
Phi kiba jot ba rem, to wan,
Ha kti, U Jisu, bym pat dap.
Wat pynslem mynta shuh,
Wat kren dong thala ruh;
B'U khot ïa phi, ba duk,
Ba matlah, ba dykoh.
La khreh baroh, nongpop to wan,
Ka jaka dang don ï'u ba mon.
Ka ktien byneng to ngeit,
Ba phah ïalap U Trai;
U long ïaineh, ba beit,
Un isnei ei, Un ai.
La phi la lyndet, wan pat lem,
Ka jaka dang don, phin ym rem.
B'la mih U Nongïalam,
Їa phi ba bakla lad;
Ka Ktien jong U to ngeit,
B'U Khrist U khot, U wad,
Te jar ba mon, ba wan ba lap,
Ha jong jingisnei, bym pat dap.

hymns.sub_title: Ka Jingkhot ïa u nongphai dien

lines: Bad rit bad khraw to wan,
Sha Jisu ba la slem;
Ah! katno U la shah,
U Blei la katta'm shem.
Ka sngi la noh, la syit, la dum,
Ka jingkhang te dang lait ban rung.
Me nongphai-dien to wan,
Da wad ï'U Jisu pat;
Ka kti U nang kyner,
Sha me, b'U kwah ban bat.
U Blei U sybun ban ïa-ai,
Jingisnei ïa u briew ba phai.

hymns.reference: Bad rit bad khraw to wan (541)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Bad rit bad khraw to wan (541)
hymns.db_name: 541. Bad rit bad khraw to wan

hymns.sub_title: Ka pyrthei lut ïa U Jisu

lines: Ka pyrthei lut ï'U Jisu,
Ngin thew tang kane hi;
Ban khot ki bynriew baroh,
Ban wan ha U ban rieh.
Ka pyrthei lut ï’U Jisu,
Ha U ki briew kin dem;
Ki mihngi bad ki sepngi,
Ha U jingim kin shem.
chorus: Ka pyrthei lut, ka pyrthei lut,
Pynbna ka ktien ka jingim ha ki bynriew lut;
To kyntiew nam ï'U Jisu ka lama khraw to rah,
Tad da u thylliej baroh ïa U Trai un phla.

lines: Ka pyrthei lut ï'U Jisu,
Їa ka la siewspah duh;
Ki khun ki ksiew u Adam,
Kim bit ban long mraw shuh.
Ka pyrthei lut ï'U Jisu,
Wat ai ba ngin ïa swai;
La kular skhem da U Blei,
B'Un synshar shuh khlem wai.
Ka pyrthei lut ï'U Jisu,
Khie leit, ka bor Un ai;
Ban ïalap ïa ka Gospel,
‘Wat sheptieng,’ ong U Trai.
Ka pyrthei lut ï'U Jisu,
Їa ngin ïamih ïatrei;
‘Ha khymih Nga don ryngkat!’
Ngin tieng ki nongshun 'lei?
Ka pyrthei lut ï'U Jisu,
Ha ïing U Kpa ha neng;
Ki bynriew ba la siewspah,
Bun byllien kin ïaseng.
Ka pyrthei lut ï'U Jisu,
Ah Trai ki trai, to mih;
Ban ïalam sha ka burom,
L'u paid b'la sait khuid lieh.

hymns.author: S. E.
hymns.reference: Ka pyrthei lut iU Jisu (542)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ka pyrthei lut ï'U Jisu (542)
hymns.db_name: 542. Ka pyrthei lut ï'U Jisu

lines: Peit sha Jisu, la me thait,
Peit ban im!
Peit sha U, te men ïohlait,
Peit ban im!
U la shah ha diengphyna,
Peit ban im!
Sngap, U ong,“To peit sha nga”
Peit ban im!
chorus: Peit! U Trai la kiew sha khlieh,
Peit! U hajan eh ïa ngi;
Peit ban im! nongpop ba pli,
Peit ban im!

lines: La me long khlem hok ban da,
Peit ban im!
Mynta phai sha diengphyna,
Peit ban im!
Mraw u soitan la me long,
Peit ban im!
Ha ka burom men ïoh shong,
Peit ban im!
La sha jyngai me la phet,
Peit ban im!
La ïa U Blei me la klet,
Peit ban im!
Da I Pa ïa me la khot,
Peit ban im!
Phai noh mynta na jingjot,
Peit ban im!

hymns.author: J. J.
hymns.reference: Peit sha Jisu la me thait (543)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Peit sha Jisu, la me thait (543)
hymns.db_name: 543. Peit sha Jisu, la me thait

lines: U Jisu U la ieit ïa nga,
U wan na ka ri Kanaan;
U ud U ïap ha diengphyna,
Ba ngan ïoh poi sha Kanaan,
Pansngiat burom ngan ïoh phong,
Ha ri tyngshaiñ ka Kanaan;
Bad Jisu junom ngan ïoh shong,
Ale, ngin leit sha Kanaan.
chorus: Kanaan! Ri phyrnai!
Lano ngin poi sha Kanaan!
Ha Kanaan jingsuk la janai,
Ale, ngin leit sha Kanaan.

lines: Ynda poi sha jingïaseng bah,
Ki riewkhuid ha ri Kanaan;
Bad ki shaphang l'U Nongsiewspah,
Ngan riwai ha ri Kanaan.
U Jisu b'la burom, ha khet,
U shong hangta ha Kanaan;
Ki khun U Blei sha ïing U khot,
Ban shong hangta ha Kanaan.
To wan sh'U Jisu, lok, to wan,
U ap ïa phi ha Kanaan;
Ki angel khuid kin wan ban tan,
Ban shaw ïa phi sha Kanaan.
To wan ban dih ki um ba im,
Ba tuid jem jai ha Kanaan;
Ha Kanaan jingsuk la janai,
Ale, ngin leit sha Kanaan.

hymns.author: H.S.R.
hymns.reference: U Jisu U la ieit ia nga (544)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: U Jisu U la ieit ïa nga (544)
hymns.db_name: 544. U Jisu U la ieit ïa nga

lines: Ki sngi, khymih, ki nang poi,
Sngi sngewkymen;
Ba kin burom Khun U Blei,
Pyrthei kylleng.
Jingïap shitom Kalbari
Yn sa byna;
Ki riewkyndong ruh'n ïohi,
Haleluïa!
Ka jingieit ba khraw U Trai,
Yn ïoh ïalap;
Kynrup, byllien, la jyngai,
Na ka jingïap.
Ka jingput ka Gospel Blei
Ka nang sawa;
Mihngi sepngi kan sa pei,
Haleluïa!
Jisu kham itynnad tam,
Ki lok baroh;
Jor bad jingai Blei U lam,
Ї'U ngin ïaroh,
Kat U Kynrad ym lah shem,
Ha ki yrta;
Byllien bah ïa U kin dem,
Haleluïa!

hymns.author: H. R.

hymns.sub_title: Katno ki pop ba U map ei!

lines: Ka pop ka jur, ka ram ka khraw,
Ki saikhum jong ka ym lah law;
Ym don ka lad ba ngin ïoh lait?
Ym don ka snam ba ngin ïoh sait?
Ka khubor na byneng ka phla,
Ka ram la siew h'u diengphyna;
U nongpop mynta u la lait,
Ka pop bun byllien la ïoh sait.
U Jisu baroh U la siew,
La pyllait phar ïa ngi ki briew;
‘Ka Jingthoh pyrshah kam don shuh,’
Їa U ngin ïaroh junom duh.
Katno ki pop ba U map ei!
Katno ba khraw ka jingisnei!
Ka met bad mynsiem ngin ïa ai,
Ї'U Jisu Khrist, b'U long U Trai.

hymns.author: W.M.J.
hymns.reference: Ka pop ka jur ka ram ka khraw (546)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ka pop ka jur, ka ram ka khraw (546)
hymns.db_name: 546. Ka pop ka jur, ka ram ka khraw

hymns.sub_title: Ngam sngewlehraiñ ban phla ï'U Trai

lines: Ngam sngewlehraiñ ban phla ï'U Trai,
Uba la map ïa nga;
Ban burom ïa ka Ktien b'U ai,
Bad ïa ka diengphyna.
chorus: Ha U Khrist, ha U Khrist, nga la lait na ka pop,
Bad ka jingkit jong nga phar ka la duh;
Ha ka diengphyna nga la ïeng nga la jop,
Te mynta ngan kymen junom shuh.

lines: Jisu U Trai nga ithuh bha,
Ha U nga shaniah ruh;
B'Un ym pynlehraiñ kum ïa nga,
Ba kyrmen skhem ha U.
Kum la ka khet, ka Ktien ka skhem,
Їa kaba U la smai;
Te nga la ngeit ba ngan ym rem,
Ha ka sngi jong U Trai.
U Trai U'n phla ïa nga, Un ong,
Ha khmat jong U Kypa;
Ba ha ka Salem ngan ïoh shong,
Ha ïing b'la khreh ïa nga.

hymns.author: R. E.
hymns.reference: Ngam sngewlehrain ban phla ïU Trai (547)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ngam sngewlehraiñ ban phla ï'U Trai (547)

hymns.sub_title: To wan sait ha ka snam U Khunlangbrot

lines: Lok, lada phi kwah ban sait khuid la ki pop,
To wan sait ha ka snam Khunlangbrot;
Wan da shaniah lut ha jingaiei jong U,
To wan sait ha ka snam Khunlangbrot.
chorus: To wan sait, to wan sait,
To wan sait ha ka snam Khunlangbrot;
La pop la tap ïa phi baroh shirynïeng,
To wan sait ha ka snam khunlangbrot.

lines: Lada phi kohnguh jingkhot U Khrist U Trai,
Ban wan sait ha ka snam Khunlangbrot;
Jingsuk mynsiem phin shem shilynter jingim,
Ba la sait ha ka snam Khunlangbrot.
Haba sngi bishar kan poi, phin sa shadkmen,
Ba la sait ha ka snam Khunlangbrot;
Namar ba phi lah ban shong suk ha byneng,
Da jingsait ha ka snam Khunlangbrot.
Kumta, lok, phim donkam ban dang pynslem shuh,
To wan sait ha ka snam Khunlangbrot;
Їoh ba poi ka por ba lad jingkhot kan wai,
To wan sait ha ka snam Khunlangbrot.

hymns.reference: Lok lada phi kwah ban sait khuid la ki pop (548)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Lok, lada phi kwah ban sait khuid (548)
hymns.db_name: 548. Lok, lada phi kwah ban sait khuid

lines: Ale nongpop mynta to ïam,
Namar ki pop ba khraw;
Hangta ha Kal'bri lum ka don,
Ka jingmap ï'u nongpop.
chorus: Don jingmap! h'oid, don jingmap!
Bad jingkhuid ruh, jingsuk kynjai;
Kine baroh h'U Khrist ki don,
Un ai ha kito baroh kiba ngeit.

lines: Namar ki pop ba phi la leh,
Ka jingmap ei Un ai;
Da pdiang te ha la ka dohnud,
Їa phi shisha Un kdup.
Ka bor u nongjop ruh Un ai,
Un ai khlem da tyngkai;
Mynsiem Bakhuid shapoh Un trei,
Na pop ba phin ïoh khuid.
Ah lok nongpop, phim mon ban im,
Ha bneng ban im junom?
Hangta ha burom ba phyrnai,
Baroh ngin phyrnai lang.
Phi pynslem lei? Ah lok nongpop,
To tip ki sngi ki stet;
Sha bymjukut ki her noh lin,
Wan phai shuh te kim mon.

hymns.author: D. G.
hymns.reference: Ale nongpop mynta to iam (549)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ale nongpop mynta to ïam (549)
hymns.db_name: 549. Ale nongpop mynta to ïam

lines: Ah, shaei ki nongtrei, ki ban ïalum,
Ї'u kew uba don ha ri thor ri lum?
Ba bat la ki rashi - ka jingshisha,
Ba mon ban sa shongthait ynda dep bha.
chorus: Shaei ki nongtrei? Ah ei ban wan,
Ban ot ïa u kew shuwa ba un tlor?
Ah, ei ban ïarap, ban lum, ban tan,
Ї'u kew uba don ha ri lum ri thor?

lines: Khie wad man ki lad bad man la ki dong,
Phin shem ïa u kew ha ki ñiut ba jrong;
Iwei ruh ban iehnoh, ban klet wat ai,
To lum ïa ki baroh ha thiar U Trai.
Ki lyngkha ki byrlieh ki la ih bha,
Sa tang ïa ki nongtrei ki ap mynta;
Ki nongtrei ki khyndiat ka kam ka bun,
Ka jingduh ka jingsep kan long shibun.
Te mynta, to wan rah la ki rashi,
Ban lum lang i'u kew jong U Trai jong ngi;
Ban trei ruh haduh ban da khot U Trai,
Ban shong lem ban khawai junom khlem wai.

hymns.author: H.S.R.
hymns.reference: Ah shaei ki nongtrei ki ban ialum (550)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ah, shaei ki nongtrei, ki ban ïalum (550)
hymns.db_name: 550. Ah, shaei ki nongtrei, ki ban ïalum

lines: Lada phi kwah ban ïoh lait na ka pop,
Don bor ha ka snam, bor ha ka snam;
Lada phi wad bor jingpynshoi ban jop,
Don bor ba phylla ha ka snam.
chorus: Don ka bor, bor,
Bor ba trei phylla;
Ha ka snam, Kalbari,
Don ka bor, bor;
Bor ba trei phylla,
Ha ka snam kordor, Kalbari.

lines: Ban lait na jingmeng bad jingkwah pyrthei,
Don bor ha ka snam, bor ha ka snam;
Wan ban sait khuid ha ka wah Kalbari,
Don bor ba phylla ha ka snam.
Lada phi kwah ban kham lieh ïa ka ïor,
Don bor ha ka snam, bor ha ka snam;
Ban khuid ki thohbria ha wah ba kordor,
Don bor ba phylla ha ka snam.
Shakri ï'U Jisu, U Syiem bymjukut,
Don bor ha ka snam, bor ha ka snam;
Pynleit ka jingim ban shakri ï'U Trai,
Don bor ba phylla ha ka snam.

hymns.author: E.H.W.
hymns.reference: Lada phi kwah ban ioh lait na ka pop (551)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Lada phi kwah ban ïoh lait na ka pop (551)
hymns.db_name: 551. Lada phi kwah ban ïoh lait na ka pop

lines: Hangno phin shong ha bymjukut,
To pyrkhat kloi kumno phi mut;
To ïathuh shai kumno phin kut,
Hangno phin shong ha bymjukut?
chorus: Ha bymjukut, ba bymjukut,
Hangno phin shong ha bymjukut?

lines: Bun kiba jied ï'U Khrist mynta,
Na la ki pop ki phai shisha;
Jingsuk byneng kin ïoh khlem kut,
Hangno phin shong ha bymjukut?
Haba la phai na lynti khim,
Bad phi nang phet ha lad jingtim;
Kumno kan long ka jingrai kut,
Hangno phin shong ha bymjukut?
To phai, to ngeit mynta kumne,
Peit sha U Jisu, wat sangeh;
Phin sa nang phai ktien hun jingmut,
‘Nga la lait im ha bymjukut’!
chorus: Ha bymjukut, ha bymjukut,
Nga la lait im ha bymjukut!

hymns.reference: Hangno phin shong ha bymjukut (552)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Hangno phin shong ha bymjukut (552)
hymns.db_name: 552. Hangno phin shong ha bymjukut

lines: Don bun hajar ha ka pyrthei,
Don bun spah ha la ka ri;
Bym tip jingieit bah jong U Blei,
Bad jingsiewspah Kalbari.
Sha kine ei ban leit ïalap,
Jingpynim ei ban ïathuh?
Jingknia ba tlem, ba khraw, ba dap,
Ka dawa ba kin ym duh.
Sha khlaw sha btap ka pop ka lam,
Ban mane blei ba kynsha;
Mynsiem ba bha baroh ka dam,
Hapoh jingdum ba thala.
Їa kine mano ban leit wad,
Mano ïa ki ban pyllait?
Jingïap ïapli jingkah la kad,
Lynti jingim ruh la lait.
Spah, nam, burom bad jingsngewbha,
Ki jingpah shukor pyrthei;
Dohnud u briew ki pynbyrngia,
Ha jingthala ba shyrkhei.
Їa kine mano ban kyrsiew,
Mano ïa ki ban sngewlem?
Ka biang jingshah U Khun U Briew,
Ban pynksan ei ki barem.
Jisu, Jisu tang Me Me lah,
Ban pynim na jingïap duh;
Bun bun hajar ha pop ba thiah,
Ban khie nangta bym lah shuh.
Ah pynmih kyrhai ki nongtrei,
Kiba sngew jingkhot U Trai,
Ban leit ïalap khubor U Blei,
Kylleng ka ri khlem tyngkai.

hymns.author: H. L.
hymns.reference: Don bun hajar ha ka pyrthei (553)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Don bun hajar ha ka pyrthei (553)
hymns.db_name: 553. Don bun hajar ha ka pyrthei

lines: U Nongpynkhiah ba khraw la shem,
U Jisu, Uba sngewlem;
Tien pyntngen U kren ï'u nongpang,
To sngap ka sur U Jisu.
chorus: Sur ba thiang jingrwai angel,
Kyrteng kor tam ha pyrthei;
Jingrwai bang bym pat ju sngew,
Jisu baieit, Jisu.

lines: Ki pop baroh Un map lut phar,
To sngap 'tien sbun U Jisu;
Jingdum ba kah kan phyrnai kdar,
Phin shong ha burom jong U.
Jingpang mynsiem, jingpang bam pong,
Kin shem jingkoit h'U Jisu;
Jingshitom pyrthei har rukom,
Kin her ha kyrteng Jisu.
Mynsiem ba lwait jinghun kan shem,
Ha kyrteng ieit U Jisu;
Jingdum ba kah, u lyoh ba rben,
Kin pra lut phar h'U Jisu.
To wan, ko lok, shongsah hangne,
Їaroh kyrteng U Jisu;
Ka jingkhot ieit wat ñiew thala,
To sngap bad wan kloi sha U.
Ynda ngin poi ha bneng lawei,
Ngin ïohi ïa l'U Jisu;
Sawdong ka khet ïaroh ngin sei,
Ka kyrteng ieit U Jisu.

hymns.sub_title: Khyndai phew khyndai ki langbrot ha sem

lines: Khyndaiphew khyndai ki dem sngewbha,
Hapoh jingker ka sem;
Iwei sha lum I ïaid sakma,
Jngai bah na ki khyrdop ba skhem.
Jngai bah sha ki lum ba riat ba ma,
Sha lyndet ka khmat U Nongap ba bha.
Trai, hangne don khyndaiphew khyndai,
Kine kim la biang ïa Me?
‘Ine I jong nga,’ ong U Trai,
‘I la sakma na kine.
Te la lynti ka sniew, la thiep ki jrong,
Ngan kiew ïa ki lum, ngan wad la I jong’.
Hynrei ki b'la siewspah kim tip satia,
Jingjylliew ki wah b'U jam;
Ne jingdum ka miet b'U ïaid lyngba,
Shuwa ïa I ba Un tam.
Shapoh lawbah U ïohsngew I pah,
I pang sa ban ïap, marwei I thiah.
Trai naei jaw snam katne katne,
Artet lynti lum kynjah?
Na krung U Nongap la jaw kane,
Ha b'U wad ban shem iba jah.
Trai balei ki mong ki kti katne?
Ba trud ba tar shiah mynmiet hynne.
Hynrei lyngba ki lumbah ba shyrkhei,
Bad nalor ki riat ba jrong,
Jingpyrta ka kiew sha duwar U Blei -
“To kmen, Nga la shem la I jong”
Bad ki angel bneng ki risa ki ong -
“To kmen, U Trai U la shem la I jong”.

lines: Lok nongpop, wan sha jingkhawai,
B'U khot ieit U Jisu U Trai;
Iwei ruh Un ym kyntait noh,
Namar U khot ï'u briew baroh.
To wan baroh phi ba sngewthait,
Ha U phin shem ka jingjahthait;
Phi kiba jynjar bad ba duk,
Tang ha U hi phin shem jingsuk.
Ka jingieit bah jong U ka lah,
Їa dohnud maw ba eh ban ktah;
Te kan kylla long dohnud doh,
Ї'U Blei ban ieit bad ban ïaroh.
To wat pyntud, to wat bakla,
Sngi jingpynim ka long mynta;
Tang sngew jingkhot kloi lan wan noh,
Ha U b'la ïap namar baroh.

lines: Ei ba la kloi ban rap ïa nga,

To wad ïa ki sha lum sha them,
To wad ïa ki ha ban da shem;
Ki langbrot kiba la sakma,
Ong U Jisu, Nongap ba bha.

lines: To phai lok, Ah phai lok, balei phin ïap ei?
U Blei ïa phi mynta U khot ieit isnei!
U Jisu U khot, Mynsiem ruh U ong ‘Wan’,
Ki angel ki ïa-ap ïa phi hi ban tan.
Ka jingbuhteng wat ai ïa phi kan shukor,
Ba phi phin sa ngeit ynda poi hi ka por;
Wan rangli wan juki, wan kloi noh katba,
Ki wah um ka jingim ki dang tuid sngur bha.
Ka spah bad ka sngewbha kim myntoi ei ei,
Kim lah syrpai kordit ne pang da lei lei;
Tang Jisu hi U long U Doktor mynsiem,
To pdiang ïa U mynta, ïa phi Un pynim.
Balei phin shu phet, lok, sha riat ka jingtim,
Haba ha U Jisu don lad ban laitim?
Lada phi dang artatien, ale wan jngoh,
Da lade phin shem hi, bad jingim phin ïoh.

lines: Ka jingaiei ka jong Me,
Ka khot ïa nga ban wan;
Ban lait na ka pop ka tngit,
La katne ki ïai ban.
Bad la nga la ïaid jngai ruh,
Da im khlem aiñ, khlem Blei;
Їa nga, ko Jisu Kynrad,
Men sait, Men pynim ei.
Ka khyrdop ka dang rynghang,
Bad baroh kiba wan;
Kin shem ka khmat ba sngewbha,
U Kpa ba U wan tan.
Un map ka palat baroh,
Ka jingkmen ruh Un ai;
Ka pansngiat ruh bad burom,
Kim duh ha ri jingshai.
Ah jingisynei ba jylliew,
Ka jingïaimap U Blei!
L'ym ïoh ngan duh jingkyrmen,
Ki ummat ruh kin shlei.
Haba jingpynshoi ki lap,
Ka jynjar ruh ka ban;
Nga tip ba U Blei na bneng,
Un ïarap, Un kyrshan.

hymns.sub_title: La ki pop ki saw haiñ haiñ

lines: La ki pop ki saw haiñ haiñ,
Kin sa lieh phar kum ka ïor;
La ki saw byrïong ruh,
Kin khuid baroh phar;
La ki pop ki saw haiñ haiñ,
Kin sa lieh phar kum ka ïor.
Sngap ka ktien kaba khot ieit,
Ah wan phai phi sha U Blei!
U long ba dap jingisynei,
Bad jingieit phylla;
Sngap ka ktien kaba khot ieit,
Ah wan phai phi sha U Blei!
Pop ki jong phi Un map ei,
Un ym kynmaw shuh ïa ki,
‘Peit sha Nga, phi u paidlang,’
Ong U Trai U Blei;
Pop ki jong phi Un map ei,
Un ym kynmaw shuh ïa ki.

lines: Phai, ko nongïaid wir, b'la khuslai b'la thait,

lines: Na jinglongmraw jingdum bad khuslai,
Jisu nga wan, Jisu nga wan;
Sha jinglaitluid, jingkmen bad jingshai,
Jisu sha Me nga wan.
Na jingtlot jong nga sha bor jong Me,
Na jingduk jong nga sha spah jong Me,
Na jingtngit jong nga sha khet jong Me,
Jisu sha Me nga wan.
Na jingbymlah ba tlot bor jong nga,
Jisu nga wan, Jisu nga wan;
Sha ka burom bad bor ka diengphna,
Jisu sha Me nga wan.
Na shitom pyrthei sha jingsuk jai,
Na sngi ba dum lyoh sha sngi phyrnai,
Na jingsngewsih kthang sha ka jingrwai,
Jisu sha Me nga wan.
Na jingsngewmeng, sngewsarong, sngewheh,
Jisu nga wan, Jisu nga wan;
Sha jingsngewrit, mon jong Me ban leh,
Jisu sha Me nga wan.
Ha jingieit jong Me ban shong nga brai,
Jingduh jingkyrmen kan phet sha jngai,
Shatei ban her da thapniang, ngam btai,
Jisu sha Me nga wan.
Na jingsheptieng ba jingtep kan rong,
Jisu nga wan, Jisu nga wan;
Sha jingsngewbha ïingsyiem ban ïoh shong,
Jisu sha Me nga wan,
Na jingjot ba jynjar bym lah ong,
Sha jakarieh, bneng ba suk ha jrong;
Khmat tyngshaiñ jong Me junom kan long,
Jisu sha Me nga wan.

Ka burom Jisu kum U Syiem,
Ngan pynpaw katba im.
Ah Trai ba ieit eh jong nga,
Їarap ba ngan ïathuh;
Ka kyrteng jong Me ha ki briew,
Jingieit jong Me ruh.
Ka kyrteng Jisu ka donbor,
Jingsheptieng ban pynduh;
Ka riew sngewtynnad ha ka shkor,
U nongpop b'la ïohlait.
U pynduh ïa ka bor ka pop,
Ї'u koidi U pyllait;
Ka snam jong U ka pynkhuid phar,
Їa nga te ka dang sait.
U kren bad haba sngap ïa U,
Ki nongïap ki im pat;
Ka jingsuk jong U ruh ka tuid,
Ha kiba khuslai sat.

[wai.

lines: Jisu Un synshar kat haba,
Ka sngi ka sbai bad ka thaba;
Hima kan ïar na kut sha kut,
Haduh b'u bnai un ym ngen shuh.
Ki jingduwai kin kiew sha U,
Jingïaroh kin thung Syiem ïa U;
Kyrteng jong U iwbih kan sieng,

Ba tlot ki shem ka jingjahthait.

lines: Kynmaw,Trai ïa ka Ri Khasi,
Kynti u barim bajah
Shon ka muhor U Jehobah
Ha ka pateng ba dang sah;
Trai ba bha, ïeng ban da
Їa ka Ri na ka jingma.
Kynmaw ïa ki rympei Khristan,
Hapoh ïing poh sem nang trei;
Ai ha kine ki per sara
Ka umjer ka jingaiei
Trai nang trei, ba ngin sei,
Їa ka sap tipbriew tipblei.
Ha ki pateng bynriew baroh,
Me la long ka jakarieh
Ngin ym syier la dum ka lawei,
Lada Me, Men long ka stieh;
Trai ba bha, ïeng ban da
Їa ka ri na ka jingma.

lines: (ALEX - III No. 4)
chorus: Ah Trai kynmaw.

lines: Ah Trai kynmaw ka Ri jongngi,
Ka Ri b'la siewspah U Trai;
Ha jingieit Blei ngi ïoh ban jngi,
Da bor phylla ka jingshai.
chorus: To kyntiew nam kyrteng U Trai,
Jingïaroh burom ngin ai;
Ai Gospel Blei kan ïai phyrnai,
Tad haduh pyrthei kan wai.

lines: Ah Trai to sei ki nongïalam,
Kiba sngew jingkhot jong Me;
Spah, nam, burom kan duh kan dam,
Hukum jong Me kin rakhe.
Rympei Khristan Trai to wan-i,
Shlem jingieit U Trai Nongthaw;
Jingriewblei kan ïoh kam kynti,
Dur bha briew U Khrist kan paw.
Shon shap ha pateng ba dangsah,
Pynshlei ki Anthem thymmai;
Pyrthei satlak la kti kin rah,
‘Long b'la kyrkhu ïa U Trai’.

hymns.section_heading: XIV. KI JINGRWAI SHAPHANG KA RI

lines: Ah Blei, Me U Trai Kynrad,
Me U Nongbuh-Nongthaw;
Ha Me ngi dem ngi kyrpad,
Ha Me ngi wan ban paw;
Namar la ka jong ka Ri,
Ngi nguh ngi ïai duwai;
Їa ka ban sumar ban ri,
Isnei ma Me Ah Trai.
To sei ïa ki nongïalam,
Kiba shaniah ha Me;
Shuwa ban sdang la ki kam,
Ki khmat kin khmied sha Me;
Ka Ri, ban saiñdur thymmai,
To sei da la ki jong;
Lawei ka Ri kan phyrnai,
Ka hok kan ïeng rasong.
Ki nongsynshar to pynmih,
Kiba Me, Me la jied;
Ban ïalam ha jingryntih,
Ki khmat sha Me kin khmied;
To ai ha ki ka jingstad,
Jingshisha kin ïohi;
Ai bor ma Me ko Kynrad,
Kin ïalam la ka Ri.

[jong ka,

lines: Jingstad jong Me Trai ai ha ki nongïalam
[jongngi,
Buit bad jingshemphang ha ki to ai;
Wat la nongshun ker sawdong jong ka ban
[ïoh pynpra,
Da bor jong Me kan nang phyrnai.

Ko ri India baieit jongngi to nang ïaid shaphrang,
Jinglong kawei ai pyrthei kan i;

lines: Ah Trai ki trai, Syiem ki syiem
Wan ma Me ban synshar
Ri tip briew tip Blei ngin im
Thapniang jingsuk kan pyiar.
Katba Balang ka dang sah
Ban tbeh jingshai h'la ri,
Khun jong Me Gospel kin rah
Їa jingieit Blei sakhi.

U Trai don ha liang jong ngi,
Ban ïeng pyrshah u ei?
Nongshun la ki wan ïaleh
Ngin jop ba don U Blei.
Ah Trai to wan ban synshar
Їa dohnud khun jong Me
Hangno hangno ba ki don
Tang ïa Me kin mane.
Їarap ïa ki nongïalam
Ban ieit, sheptieng ïa Me

Jingbha kan roi kyrhai.

lines: Jisu jemnud bad ba bha,

lines: Ngi long ki khynnah kiba rit,
