Ko Nongpynim ba ieit ngi mon.
Ki khynnah Khristan baroh phar,
Ki don ka thyma man ka sngi;
Ban jop ki pop ba rit ba khraw,
Ko Jisu, to ïarap ïa ngi.
Ka dohnud bunsien ka dap lin,
Da sarong bad da jingsngewmeng;
Ki ktien pynsngewsih ngi shait kren,
Ki ummat bitar ki mih teng.
To ai ngin kren ki ktien ba bang,
Ban ym pynmong ki lok ki jor;
Їa baroh ki jingsniew ngin jop,
U Kapten jong ngi Un ai bor.
Ngi dei ban bah ka diengphyna,
Ki khynnah baroh ha ka ri;
Ban ieit, ban shakri man ka sngi,
Ї'U Jisu Khrist U Trai jong ngi.

hymns.reference: Ngi long ki khynnah kiba rit (597)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ngi long ki khynnah kiba rit (597)
hymns.db_name: 597. Ngi long ki khynnah kiba rit

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: Hosanna, jam Hosanna,
Ki khynnah ki ïarwai;
Ban pynher la jingïaroh,
Ї'U Jisu Khrist U Trai.
Ї'U Jisu Uba ju rah,
Їa ki ha la shadem;
Їa U ki wan ban ainguh,
Їa U ki wan ban dem.
Na lum Olib ba jymgam,
Ki bud ï'U Khrist U Trai;
Ki kaweh la ki tnat tlai,
Ki riwai de kyrhai.
Hosanna, jam Hosanna,
Ї'U Khun u Dabid Syiem;
Uba la wan ban pyllait,
Na pop bad na jingtim.
Hosanna, jam Hosanna,
Їa kajuh ngin ïa rwai;
Namar ïa ngi la siewspah,
Da kuna b'U la ai.
Їa U to ai ngin shakri,
Da dohnud sngur baroh;
Mynta bad ha la ka rta,
Ї'U junom ngin ïaroh.

hymns.author: H.S.R.
hymns.reference: Hosanna jam Hosanna (598)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Hosanna, jam Hosanna (598)
hymns.db_name: 598. Hosanna, jam Hosanna

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: Wan khynnah to ïaroh,
Haleluïa! Amen;
Burom ï'U Khrist baroh,
Haleluïa! Amen.
Ї'U Jisu pynlong Syiem,
Hapoh la ka mynsiem;
Ngin ainguh katba im,
Haleluïa! Amen.
Wan, khynnah, ïaroh jam,
Haleluïa! Amen;
Trai Jisu, khraw ka nam,
Haleluïa! Amen.
U long U Nongpynim,
Ba ieit na mynbarim;
U ai la ka jingim,
Haleluïa! Amen.
Junom ngin nguh ï'U Trai,
Haleluïa! Amen;
Jingiaroh ngin ïa ai,
Haleluïa! Amen.
Ha bneng lang ngin ïashem,
Ha khmat ka khet ba skhem;
Ban burom Syiem to dem,
Haleluïa! Amen.

hymns.author: E.H.W.
hymns.reference: Wan khynnah to iaroh (599)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Wan khynnah to ïaroh (599)
hymns.db_name: 599. Wan khynnah to ïaroh

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: Sawdong ka khet U Blei haneng,
Khynnah bun lak ki ïeng;
Baroh ki pop jong ki la weng,
Ah suk ka jingïaseng,
Ki ïariwai, Burom, Burom.
Kumno ki poi ki khynnah duk,
Sha byneng, ri sngewbha;
Ba don ka kymen bad jingsuk,
Kumno ki poi hangta ?
Ki ïariwai, Burom, Burom.
Namar b'U Khrist U shah jingïap,
U pynmih la ka snam;
Ban sait ïa ki ka wah la dap,
Ka pop jong ki la dam,
Ki ïariwai, Burom, Burom.
Hangne ha pyrthei, ki la wad,
Ї'U Jisu Khrist U Trai;
Bad kumta ki la shem ka lad
Ban shong bad U khlem wai,
Ki ïariwai, Burom, Burom.

hymns.author: E.H.W.
hymns.reference: Sawdong ka khet U Blei haneng (600)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Sawdong ka khet U Blei haneng (600)
hymns.db_name: 600. Sawdong ka khet U Blei haneng

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH
hymns.sub_title: “Shah ïa ki khynnah ban wan ha nga.”

lines: Ki kymie na Salem,
Ki khun ki lam sh'U Jisu;
Ki synran te kim shah kin wan,
Ki beh noh ruh ïa ki;
U Jisu Kynrad U ïohi,
U peit sngewbha, U ong ha ki,
“Shah ïa ki khynnah ba kin wan ha Nga.”
“Ngan shim kum ïa kita,
Ban kydup ha ka shadem;
Ngan long nongsumar ïa ki ruh,
Wat beh noh te ïa ki;
Ha nga ki dohnud te kin ai,
Kin shong bad nga ha ri jingshai,
Shah ïa ki khynnah ba kin wan ha nga.”
U sybun U Jisu,
B'U khot sngewbha ïa kita;
Bun hajar pynban ki dang sah,
Ka nam jong U kim tip;
Kim pat ithuh ka ktien U Blei,
Kim pat ïohsngew ka ktien aiei,
“Shah ïa ki khynnah ba kin wan ha Nga.”
Ki riewdum to wallam,
To ring ki bynriew baroh;
Kin bret ïa ki bleithaw jong ki,
Ban ngeit ka ktien jong Me;
Pynpaw ïa lade Ah U Blei,
Pyni ha ki ka jingaiei,
Khot ïa ki khynnah ban wan lut ha Me.

hymns.author: S.M.R.
hymns.reference: Ki kymie na Salem (601)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ki kymie na Salem (601)
hymns.db_name: 601. Ki kymie na Salem

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: Ei, ko khun, phi thymu,
Ha la ka jingim ?
Shakri ïa U Jisu,
Їaid ka lynti khim.
Khuid ka dohnud samla,
Khuid ka ktien ba kren;
Kynmaw la ka burom,
Їa U Khrist wat len.
Kynmaw la U Kynrad,
Bud dienjat jong U;
Na diengphna ba shitom,
Wat da kynran shuh.
Їa ki thiep ka jingim,
Kiew da bor U Blei;
Ynda poi ha kliar,
Jingïaroh phin sei.

hymns.author: R. E.
hymns.reference: Ei ko khun phi thymu (602)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ei, ko khun, phi thymu (602)
hymns.db_name: 602. Ei, ko khun, phi thymu

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: Don U Lok ïa ki khynnah rit,
Ha neng ki khlur phyrnai;
U Lok U bym lah kylla,
La jingieit ba janai.
Ym kum ki lok ha pyrthei,
Ba lah ban kylla pat;
Une dei U Lok, bad phi,
Ban im ban ïap ryngkat.
Don ka ri ïa ki khynnah rit,
Ha neng ki khlur phyrnai;
Hangta Jisu U synshar,
Ha ri ba suk kynjai.
Ha pyrthei ym don kat ka,
Ba bit ban ïanujor;
Jingsuk ba khlem jingïapher,
Ym don ba poh ne kor.
Don jingrwai ïa ki khynnah rit,
Ha neng ki khlur phyrnai;
Kin tem la duitara ksiar,
Bad rah la ki diengtlai.
Ha neng ka spah la kynshew,
Ka don ha U Khrist hi;
Ale, ko khynnah baieit,
Їa ka phin ïoh kynti.

hymns.author: S. T.
hymns.reference: Don U Lok ia ki khynnah rit (603)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Don U Lok ïa ki khynnah rit (603)
hymns.db_name: 603. Don U Lok ïa ki khynnah rit

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: Їaroh, ïaroh, phi ki khynnah baroh,
Ї'U Jisu Uba ieit;
Їaroh, ïaroh, phi ki khynnah baroh,
Ї'U Jisu Uba ieit.
To nguh, to nguh, phi ki khynnah baroh,
Ї'U Jisu Uba ieit;
To nguh, to nguh, phi ki khynnah baroh,
Ї'U Jisu Uba ieit.
To ieit, to ieit, phi ki khynnah baroh,
Ї'U Jisu Uba ieit;
To ieit, to ieit, phi ki khynnah baroh,
Ї'U Jisu Uba ieit.
Burom, burom, phi ki khynnah baroh,
Ї'U Jisu Uba ieit;
Burom, burom, phi ki khynnah baroh,
Ї'U Jisu Uba ieit.

hymns.author: H. J.
hymns.reference: Iaroh iaroh phi ki khynnah baroh (604)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Iaroh, ïaroh, phi ki khynnah (604)
hymns.db_name: 604. Їaroh, ïaroh, phi ki khynnah

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: Jisu U sngewbha ki khynnah,
Dap da jingisnei U long;
Ha la ka sngi ruh U sumar,
Ha khet ka bneng la U shong.
chorus: Nga, nga tip bha ba U dang ieit,
Ba U la pdiang ruh ïa nga;
U dang ieit, ïa U ngan ïaroh,
U la shah ha ka diengphna.

lines: Lada kylli, nga suk kumno,
U la ïap namar jong nga;
Bad U ong ruh ha ka Baibl,
“Khynnah rit to wan ha Nga.”
Kumta nga la wan sh'U Jisu,
Kumba dei ïa nga ban leh;
Nga da duwai da ka dohnud,
Ba ha U ngan ïoh ïaineh.
Ki jingduwai jong ki khynnah,
Nga tip ba un sngap U Trai;
Ale, ale, wan sh'U Jisu,
Ї'U ngin ïaroh khlem da wai.

hymns.reference: Jisu U sngewbha ki khynnah (605)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Jisu U sngewbha ki khynnah (605)
hymns.db_name: 605. Jisu U sngewbha ki khynnah

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: Ngi long ki khynnah ba rit,
Kum ki khlur ngi tyngshaiñ;
Hapdeng jingdum jong ka miet,
Khrik khrik ngi ïai tyngshaiñ.
chorus: Tyngshaiñ, tyngshaiñ, tyngshaiñ,
Kum ki khlur rit ha bneng;
Man la ki par ngi ïai tyngshaiñ,
Jingsuk, jingkmen kylleng.

lines: Khrip khrip kumba khih ki khlur,
Katba sha tbian ki peit;
Ngi ruh ngin nang ïai tyngshaiñ,
Kat sha ba ngi nang leit.
Kum ki khlur rit ha suiñ bneng ,
La ngi trei ne lehkai;
Barabor ngin ïai tyngshaiñ,
Sha jingsniew ngin ym phai.
Hosanna ! jam Hosanna !
Їa U Trai ngin ïaroh;
Ngi long mawkordor U Khrist,
Jingkmen ki briew baroh.

hymns.reference: Ngi long ki khynnah ba rit (606)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ngi long ki khynnah ba rit (606)
hymns.db_name: 606. Ngi long ki khynnah ba rit

hymns.tune: U BLEI U IEIT ЇA NGA.
hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: U Blei U thaw ki sim baroh,
Bad 'tiew bha rong b'la jied;
Ha la ka ktien ki ïai ïaroh,
“U Blei U long jingieit.”
chorus: U Blei U ieit - to ngin ïaroh,
U Blei u ieit ïa nga;
Lada U ieit ki sim barit,
U Blei U ieit ïa nga.

lines: Iwei i sim ïing in ym hap,
Khlem ka jingtip I Pa;
U ieit ki sim rit ban ïarap,
U Blei U ieit ïa nga.
U Blei ï'u tiew lili U thaw,
Ka jingbha dur shisha;
U ieit ki tiew kulab ba saw,
U Blei U ieit ïa nga.
Ngin long ki syntiew jong U Trai,
Ban pyniwbih la Ri;
Ngin tyngshaiñ kum ki khlur phyrnai,
U Blei U ieit ïa nga.

hymns.reference: U Blei U thaw ki sim baroh (607)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: U Blei U thaw ki sim baroh (607)
hymns.db_name: 607. U Blei U thaw ki sim baroh

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: Ki khynnah Jerusalem,
Kyrteng Jisu rwai shitrhem;
Ki khynnah ba mynta ruh,
Ki rwai ïaroh ïa kajuh.
chorus: Sngap! Sngap! Sngap! Ki khynnah ki ïarwai,
Sngap! Sngap! Sngap! Ki ïaroh khlem da wai,
Jam Hosanna! Jam Hosanna! Jam Hosanna!
[ïa U Trai.

lines: La hikai ban ieit ï'U Trai,
Ban pule ka ktien khlem wai;
Lynti sha bneng de ban ïoh,
Burom ai sh'U Blei baroh.
Bad rit bad khraw baroh lang ,
Ki rwai lem ki sur ba bang;
Ryndang ba syiang ki pynjam,
Hosanna! kiba jrong tam.

hymns.author: O.H.R.
hymns.reference: Ki khynnah Jerusalem (608)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ki khynnah Jerusalem (608)
hymns.db_name: 608. Ki khynnah Jerusalem

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: Jisu ba khuid, ba janai,
Khmih ïa nga i khynnah rit;
Me la phah ïa la jingshai,
Kaba beh jingdum ka miet.
Me phah ka sngi ban tyngshaiñ,
Halor pyrthei itynnad;
Ban ai jingsyaid, ban pynkhlaiñ,
Jingthung bad syntiew ha ka.
Dang step phyrngab, sim ki rwai,
Sngewbha halor tnat ki dieng;
Da sur bang, ïaroh ki ai,
Ї'U Nongthaw ba long U Syiem.
Me ïa ki sim Uba bsa,
Їa nga ruh bsa man ka sngi;
Їa U Mynsiem Bakhuid ai,
Khlem ma U ngam lah ban im.
Їa nga, Trai, pynlong jemnud,
Kumba dei ia u khynnah;
Baroh shisngi ialam ruh,
Bthah aiu ngan ong, ngan leh.
Haba lehkai haba trei,
Ai ngan san ha la ka sngi;
Ynda por Men wan la dei,
Shim ïa nga sha lade hi.

hymns.reference: Jisu ba khuid ba janai (609)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Jisu ba khuid, ba janai (609)
hymns.db_name: 609. Jisu ba khuid, ba janai

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH
hymns.sub_title: Nga ieit ban sngap ka khubor

lines: Nga ieit ban sngap ka khubor,
Ba angel ki ïalap;
Kumno b'U Syiem ka burom,
La wan long briew ban ïap;
La nga la pop bad la jot,
Їa kane nga tip bha;
Ba U la wan ban pynim,
Namar b'U ieit ïa nga.
chorus: Nga ieit ban sngap ka khubor,
Ba angel neng ki ïalap;
Kumno b'U Syiem ka burom,
La wan longbriew ban ïap.

lines: Nga sngewbha ba U Jisu,
Long khynnah kum ma nga;
Ban pyni kumno ngan im,
Ka jingim kaba bha.
Bad mynta lada ngan bud,
Ї'U Lynti, Jingshisha;
Um klet ïa nga da lei lei,
Namar b'U ieit ia nga.
Jingriwai bang kan ïai long,
Ban ïaroh ïa U Khun;
Jingkynud sngur ka dohnud,
U Trai un pydiang hun:
U Jisu Khrist U kular,
Ba ngan ïoh leit shisha;
Ban riwai bad ki angel,
Namar b'U ieit ïa nga.

hymns.author: H.S.R.
hymns.reference: Nga ieit ban sngap ka khubor (610)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Nga ieit ban sngap ka khubor (610)
hymns.db_name: 610. Nga ieit ban sngap ka khubor

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: LADA WAN SHA U JISU.
C.H. No. 669
chorus: Woodbrook (65, 65 & Refrain )

lines: Lada wan sha Jisu,
Jingkmen un pyndap;
Jingsngewbha ruh Un ai,
Ha jingsngewsih sat.
chorus: Lada wan sha Jisu,
Da shisha ngan suk;
Da jingieit U ïai khot,
Nga barit baduk.

lines: Lada wan sha Jisu,
Jingdwai ruh un sngap;
Un ieit ïa nga shisha,
Pop jong nga un map.
Lada wan sha Jisu,
Un bytin ïa nga;
Un ïalam beit ïa nga,
Sha Ri kaba bha.
Ha ki jaiñkup phyrnai,
Ngin ïakynduh lang;
Ngin ïohi ïa U Trai,
Ha Ri ka jingshai.

hymns.reference: Lada wan sha Jisu (611)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Lada wan sha Jisu (611)
hymns.db_name: 611. Lada wan sha Jisu

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: KTI BARIT AЇU KIN LEH ?
chorus: Child Service (76,887)

lines: Kti ba rit aïu kin leh,
Ban pynsngewbha ï'U Blei?
Kti ba rit kam babha kin trei,
Їarap ba shitom ha pyrthei;
Ban long kumne, nga kwah.
Shyntur ba rit aïu 'nleh,
Ban pynsngewbha ï'U Blei?
Shyntur ba rit jingsawa sei,
Jingduwai, jingïaroh ï'U Blei;
Ban long kumne, nga kwah.
Khmat ba rit aïu kin leh,
Ban pynsngewbha ï'U Blei?
Ki khmat ba rit sha U kin peit,
Ban ieit ka Ktien Bakhuid U Blei;
Ban long kumne, nga kwah.
Dohnud ba rit aïu 'nleh,
Ban pynsngewbha ï'U Blei ?
Dohnud ba rit ïa U ban ai,
Ban ieit ï'U Jisu Khrist U Trai;
Ban long kumne nga kwah.

hymns.reference: Kti ba rit aiu kin leh (612)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Kti ba rit aïu kin leh (612)
hymns.db_name: 612. Kti ba rit aïu kin leh

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: (ALEX - III No. 39)
WAT KLET DUWAI.
Wat klet duwai, Blei U hajan,
Wat klet duwai, ïa phi Un shan;
La jingkular Un pyndep hi,
Wat klet duwai, Un sngew ïaphi.
Wat klet duwai, ha jingdonkam,
Wat klet duwai, phin ïoh khamtam;
Ki jingkyrpad la rit ne khraw,
Wat klet duwai, na U kin jaw.
Wat klet duwai, ha jingpynshoi,
Wat klet duwai, ïarap U kloi;
Trai hi la shah pynshoi kum ngi,
Wat klet duwai, Un da ïaphi.
Wat klet duwai, ha jingkhuslai,
Wat klet duwai, Un ai jingshai;
U tip ma U kumno ban leh,
Wat klet duwai, ha U ïaineh.

hymns.reference: Wat klet duwai Blei U hajan (613)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Wat klet duwai, Blei U hajan (613)
hymns.db_name: 613. Wat klet duwai, Blei U hajan

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: KHYNNAH BARIT ЇAROH Ї'U B LEI.
Khynnah ba rit ïaroh ï'U Blei,
Na bneng hi U peit ïaphi;
Їaroh namar jingieit bashlei,
Ba ï'U Khun U ai ha ngi.
chorus: Rwai Hosanna, rwai Hosanna,
Їa ka kyrteng Jisu Khrist;
Rwai Hosana, rwai Hosana,
Їa ka kyrteng Jisu Khrist.

lines: La ka khet burom U iehnoh,
Ban long khynnah kum ma ngi;
Haba khynnah rit ki ïaroh,
Da ka shkor U sngap ïa ki.
Khynnah ba rit ïaroh ï'U Blei,
Long tang ma U lok baneh;
Ynda la wai jingim pyrthei,
Ha bneng bad U ngin shongneh.

hymns.reference: Khynnah ba rit iaroh iU Blei (614)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Khynnah ba rit ïaroh ï'U Blei (614)
hymns.db_name: 614. Khynnah ba rit ïaroh ï'U Blei

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: JISU U LOK KI KHYNNAH.
Jisu U Lok ki khynnah,
U khot sha U ïa ki;
U aiti la ka jingim,
Ka khyrdop bneng ban plie.
chorus: Jisu U lok ki khynnah,
Jisu Jisu;
U aiti ïa la ka jingim,
U Lok jong ki khynnah.

lines: Jisu U Lok ki khynnah,
Bad ki U ïakmen lem;
U tip ruh khuslai jongki,
U kloi de ban pynjem.
Jisu U Lok ki khynnah,
U long U ba ïaineh;
Їa kiba shaniah ha U,
La jingaiei U theh.
Jisu U Lok ki khynnah,
U kwah ïa ki ban trei;
Sha ka kam da mon sngewbha,
Ka bor ruh de ban sei.

hymns.reference: Jisu U Lok ki khynnah (615)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Jisu U Lok ki khynnah (615)
hymns.db_name: 615. Jisu U Lok ki khynnah

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: TO LONG BAD NGA AH TRAI.
To long ma Me ka bor jongnga,
Lama jong me ban rah;
Nongshun ba bun ban jop ïa ki,
Da bor jong Me nga lah.
chorus: To long bad nga Jisu jemnud,
To long bad nga Ah Trai;
Ha la ka sngi ïa Me ngan ieit,
Junom ruh ngan ïai rwai.

lines: To long ma Me ryndang jong nga,
Sur bathiang ba ngan rwai;
Da ki ïa kiwei ban ïoh khring,
Sha khet ka jong Me Trai.
To long ma Me met bad mynsiem,
Mon ka jong me ban leh;
Ha por bad jinglong baroh Trai,
Bad nga to ïai shongneh.
To long ma Me lynti jong nga,
To long ruh ka jingshai;
Haduh ba jingim hi kan wai,
To long ma Me ko Trai.

hymns.author: W.R.L.
hymns.reference: To long ma Me ka bor jongnga (616)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: To long ma Me ka bor jongnga (616)
hymns.db_name: 616. To long ma Me ka bor jongnga

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: Jingim jong nga, pynlong Ah Blei,
Kum sharak rit phyrnai;
Ba tyngshaiñ noh ha ka pyrthei,
Kat shaba leit bad phai.
Jingim jong nga, pynlong Ah Blei,
Kum syntiew rit iewbih;
Ba phuh ha ïing la jong marwei,
Ba pynthiang ïa ka Ri.
Jingim jong nga, pynlong Ah Blei,
Kum jingrwai rit babang;
Ba pyntngen ki ba dap khuslai,
Pynkmen ïa baroh lang.
Jingim jong nga, pynlong Ah Blei,
Kum diengduh rit ba khlaiñ,
Ban kyrshan ki ba tlot baswai,
Їa baroh ban pynshngaiñ.
Jingim jong nga, pynlong Ah Blei,
Kum sur jingrwai ïaroh;
Ba ngeit ha jingïalam jong Me,
Ha lynti ïaid baroh.

hymns.author: A.W.T.
hymns.reference: Jingim jong nga pynlong Ah Blei (617)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Jingim jong nga, pynlong Ah Blei (617)
hymns.db_name: 617. Jingim jong nga, pynlong Ah Blei

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: (ALEX - III No. 429.)
SHAPHANG U JISU.
Ai ba ngan kham ieit ï'U Jisu,
Ai ngan ïalap kyrteng jong U;
Namar jingpynim ba phylla,
B'U ïap ïapli namar jongnga.
chorus: Tang shaphang U Jisu,
Tang shaphang U Jisu;
Ai ngan ïai rwai ha la ka rta,
Jingsiewspah bymjukut ïa nga.

lines: Jinglong babha Jisu ban beh,
Mon bakhuid jong U ruh ban leh;
Ah Blei ïarap ma Me ïa nga,
Ngan lah ban ïaid lynti diengphna.

hymns.author: S.R.L.
hymns.reference: Ai ba ngan kham ieit iU Jisu (618)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ai ba ngan kham ieit ï'U Jisu (618)
hymns.db_name: 618. Ai ba ngan kham ieit ï'U Jisu

hymns.section_heading: XVI. KI JINGRWAI IA KI KHYNNAH

lines: HA JINGSHAI.

hymns.author: ALOTE.
hymns.reference: ShU Nongpynim ia ngin leit (619)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Sh'U Nongpynim ïa ngin leit (619)
hymns.db_name: 619. Sh'U Nongpynim ïa ngin leit

hymns.sub_title: Ka Jingduwai ïa ka bor U Blei

lines: Ah Trai Jisu, sha Me ngi phai,
Kum ki samla, ngi tlot, ngi swai;
Jingim jong ngi to nang pynshai,
Ban long jong Me, (3)
Jingim jong ngi to nang pynshai,
Ban long jong Me.
Їalam ïa ngi, Ah Trai babha,
Ha lynti dum ba dap jingma;
Tang ha Me ai ngin shem sngewbha,
Ban bud ïa Me, (3)
Tang ha me ai ngin shem sngewbha,
Ban bud ïa Me.
To ai ngin sngew ka Ktien jong Me,
Ban shan ïa ngi ha ki jingeh;
Sha Me, Ah Trai, ngi phet ban rieh,
To da ïa ngi, (3)
Sha Me, Ah Trai, ngi phet ban rieh,
To da ïa ngi.
Jingim jong ngi, Trai to pynbeit,
Ai ba ngin im da ka jingngeit;
Tang sha Me, ai ba ngin ïai peit,
Man la ka sngi, (3)
Tang sha Me, ai ba ngin ïai peit,
Man la ka sngi.
Ai bor, Trai, ïa ngi ki Samla,
Na ki jingpynshoi ruh to da;
Lam ïa ngi sha kjat ka diengphna,
Ba ngin ïoh im, (3)
Lam ïa ngi sha kjat ka diengphna,
Ba ngin ïoh im.
Phah, Ah Trai, l'U Mynsiem ban trei,
Їa Me ban pynpaw ha pyrthei;
Soh U Mynsiem, to ai ngin sei,
Pynkhuid ïa ngi, (3)
Soh U Mynsiem to ai ngin sei,
Pynkhuid ïa ngi.

hymns.author: B.C.L.
hymns.reference: Ah Trai Jisu sha Me ngi phai (620)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ah Trai Jisu, sha Me ngi phai (620)
hymns.db_name: 620. Ah Trai Jisu, sha Me ngi phai

lines: Nga kwah ban long u shipai,
Hapoh ka lama lieh,
Ngan kohnguh Syiem ï'U Jisu,
U Trai Uba ha khlieh,
Ngan shim ka jingkieng atiar,
Ba lah ban da ïa nga,
Ba ngan ïoh long shi-yrta,
U shipai uba bha.
chorus: Trai ba bha, to shong bad nga,
Katba rhem ka thyma;
Ynda wai ha ka ri jingshai,
Ngan shong ha la ka rta.

lines: Ka rhem jur ka thma mynta,
U bymman u pynjot;
Ki sum ba meh ding jong u,
Ki thew sha nga ba tlot,
Ngan kieng ka stieh ka jingngeit,
Ka waitlam U Mynsiem,
Ka jingda khlieh bad shadem,
Ka hok bad jingpynim.
Katba ka nang jur ka thma,
To long ka jakarieh;
Ai bor ïa nga ban ïaineh,
Ban ïeng ruh khlem da khih,
Te ynda kut ka jingleit,
Ka jingim ruh la wai,
Ngan ïoh shongthait shi junom,
Ha ri ka jingsuk jai.

hymns.author: G.A.J.
hymns.reference: Nga kwah ban long u shipai (621)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Nga kwah ban long u shipai (621)
hymns.db_name: 621. Nga kwah ban long u shipai

lines: Phi ki Samla ha U Khrist, to ïeng joit mynta,
Ka jingieit U Nongpynim ban pynbna;
Da jingaiei U siew ka ram halor diengphna,
Ba jingim bymjukut phin ïoh shisha,
Long kiba khlaiñ, bad ka jingbha U Trai to mad,
Ka bor U Mynsiem Bakhuid ruh to wad;
Їaineh skhem ha ka jingngeit bad ka jingduwai,
Ka kyrteng jong U ban ïalap khlem da tyngkai.
Phi ki Samla ha U Khrist, to ïeng ban sakhi,
Ha pyrthei jied tang ïa U ban shakri;
Spah bad burom baroh ha ki to wat shaniah,
Ha jingsngewbha pyrthei wat pynbyrngia.
Sharai, duwai ba phin ym hap ha jingpynshoi,
Ban im namar U Jisu to pynkloi;
To peit sha U la jingïaleh bajur ki wan,
Jingjop bakhraw ïa phi Un ai, bad Un kyrshan.
Phi ki Samla ha U Khrist, to ïeng joit mynta,
To kup da jingsngewrit bad jingshisha;
Sngap, U Trai hi U ong, “Dei ban kha pat ïa phi,”
La jingim baroh ha U to aiti.
Їa ka Balang U Blei, mynta to ïeng ban tei,
Da jingsngew shitrhem bad jinglong kawei;
La phi la tlot bad ban khia da jingkhuslai,
To wan sha U, ka jingjahthait ïa phi Un ai.

hymns.author: B.C.L.
hymns.reference: Phi ki Samla ha U Khrist to ieng joit mynta (622)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Phi ki Samla ha U Khrist, to ïeng (622)
hymns.db_name: 622. Phi ki Samla ha U Khrist, to ïeng

lines: To ïeng, Samla, U Trai ïa ngi U khot sngewbha,
Їeng noh, mynta, to ngeit ka Ktien jong U;
To khie, pynbna, ka khubor jingpynim babha,
Їa lade, ai lut ban len namar U Jisu.
chorus: Shaphrang, to ngin nang ïaid,
Ka Kam U Trai jong ngi, ngin mih ban ïatrei,
Shaphrang, to ngin nang ïaid,
Hima jong U ban pynïar ha pyrthei;
Longshlur, wat sheptieng, b'U Trai U don hajan,
Kum shipai babha ngin tur ngin ym kynran;
La jingeh bunjait ngin shem,
Bad U Jisu ngin sngew skhem,
Їa ngi Un ai bor, ha jingtlot Un kyrshan.

lines: Ka jingpyrta bajur ka wan na ri bajngai,
Pynkloi, mynta, ka Gospel ban ïalap;
Ki jaidbynriew ki dang ap ban ïoh ka jingshai,
Ki khun jingjynjar baroh, to ïeng ban ïarap.
Ki nongïaid wir baroh b'la jah na sem U Trai,
Na jingjot b'la hap, ïa ki ban pynphai;
Їeng joit, mynta, ka hukum jong U ban pyndep,
Ka bainong ngin ïoh ynda jingtrei ka la wai.

hymns.author: B.C.L.
hymns.reference: To ieng Samla U Trai ia ngi U khot sngewbha (623)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: To ïeng, Samla, U Trai ïa ngi (623)
hymns.db_name: 623. To ïeng, Samla, U Trai ïa ngi

hymns.sub_title: Namar U Khrist bad ka Balang

lines: Namar U Khrist bad ka Balang, to ngin ïaroh jam,
Da sur ba thymmai bad bathiang tam;
Ha ka bor ka jinglong samla, to ïeng ban ïatrei,
Burom U Trai ban pynpaw ha pyrthei.
chorus: Namar U Khrist hi,
Ngin ïeng ban sakhi;
Ha jinglong kawei ïa U ban shakri;
Namar ka Balang jong u,
Ngin trei ngin ym man thait shuh;
“Ah Trai, ma Me, ïa ngi to nang pynbit.”

lines: Namar U Khrist bad ka Balang, ka jingbha ngin
[wad,
Diengphna ngin bah, ban bud l'U Kynrad;
To ngin pyndem ïa lade ha ka bor U Mynsiem,
Ban ïai shakri ïa U katba dang im.
Namar U Khrist bad ka Balang ngin ai ïa lade,
Spah, ka por, ki sap, bad bor ruh de;
Ngin ai lut katba don na bynta U Trai jong ngi,
Da jingieit ngin ïeng, ïa U ban sakhi.
Namar U Khrist bad ka Balang, ngin bret lut baroh,
Lynti pyrthei bad jingbrai ka doh;
To shim ka Ktien jong U, bad ïaineh ha jingduwai,
Ka bor ba ngin jop, ïa ngi hi Un ai.

hymns.author: B.C.L.
hymns.reference: Namar U Khrist bad ka Balang to ngin iaroh jam (624)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Namar U Khrist bad ka Balang (624)
hymns.db_name: 624. Namar U Khrist bad ka Balang

hymns.sub_title: To ïeng mynta phi ki Samla

lines: Samla Khristan ki donkam ï'U Jisu,
Hapdeng ki erïong ba kyrhuh;
Kum ki pukni kin ïoh pynthymmai bor,
Ka kam ban trei khlem kheiñ ka dor.
chorus: To ïeng mynta, phi ki Samla,
Jingieit U Blei kylleng ban leit rah;
To kup ka hok U Trai jong ngi,
Namar jong U khlem thait ngin trei.

lines: Ki ïing jong ngi ki donkam ï'U Jisu,
Jingbha kin ïoh bad jingsuk ruh;
Ki jingkyrkhu ba dap kyrhai kin shem,
Jingshakri Blei ruh kin nang rhem.
Ki shnong jong ngi ki donkam ï'U Jisu,
Jingieit, jingshisha kim don shuh;
Ki jingsniew babun jaid ki la nangroi,
Jingshai Gospel ka dei ban poi.
Ka ri jong ngi ka donkam ï'U Jisu,
Samla, to ïeng ban leit ïathuh;
Ki mynsiem b'la jot ngi dei ban ïarap,
Ka Ktien jingaiei ban ïalap.
Ka pyrthei hi ka donkam ï'U Jisu,
Samla, to ïeng ban leit ïathuh;
Ki jaidbynriew, jingsuk shisha ki wad,
Ha U kin ïoh jingim badap.

hymns.author: B.C.L.
hymns.reference: Samla Khristan ki donkam iU Jisu (625)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Samla Khristan ki donkam ï’U Jisu (625)
hymns.db_name: 625. Samla Khristan ki donkam ï’U Jisu

lines: Ngi kular mynta, ha Me, Trai,
Jingshakri jong ngi ban ai;
Namar jong Me, ngi kloi ban len,
Pyndap ïa ngi da jingkmen.
Їa ngi ki Samla kiba tlot,
Sha ka Kam jong me to khot;
Ngi kular ban kohnguh ïa Me,
Ai ngin pyndem ïa lade.
Trai, ngi kular da mon sngewbha,
Ban ïai bud ïa Me shirta;
Jingim jong ngi to pynthymmai,
Ba ngin im bad Me khlem wai.
Jingthmu jong ngi don tang kawei,
Ka Balang jong Me ban tei;
Ha kano ma kaba ngi leh,
Ngin pyndonburom ïa Me.
Trai, ngi kular ba ngin ïaid beit,
Ha khmat jong Me da jingngeit;
Ba ki briew baroh kin ïohi,
Їa Me ha jingim jong ngi.
Їarap ïa ngi, Trai, ban sumar,
Hukum jong Me baroh phar;
Ngi donkam ïa ka bor jong Me,
Ba ngin jop ki jingïaleh.

hymns.author: B.C.L.
hymns.reference: Ngi kular mynta ha Me Trai (626)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ngi kular mynta, ha Me, Trai (626)
hymns.db_name: 626. Ngi kular mynta, ha Me, Trai

lines: Pyrthei dap tang jingkylla na kut sha kut,
Ka pynthame ïa ngi da ki jingsngewbha;
U soitan syiem jingdum u trei don bor lut,
Khie joit, khie joit, ko Samla.
chorus: Khie joit, khie joit, ko Samla, (2)
Ka thma u syiem jingdum ka rhem bha mynta;
Khie joit, khie joit, ko Samla.

lines: Haba tehmraw ïa ngi da jingmlien basniew,
Kynmaw ba ngim dei ban shu sah kut hangta;
Ngin ïathuh ha U Jisu ba Un kyrsiew,
Khie joit, khie joit, ko Samla.
Don bun ki kam ban trei namar U Kynrad,
Kumjuh ruh namar jingieit bah ka diengphna;
Ka Balang ruh ka donkam bad ka ïai wad,
Khie joit, khie joit, ko Samla.

hymns.author: G.R.S.
hymns.reference: Pyrthei dap tang jingkylla na kut sha kut (627)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Pyrthei dap tang jingkylla (627)
hymns.db_name: 627. Pyrthei dap tang jingkylla

hymns.sub_title: To ïalam ïa ngi Trai Babha

lines: To ïalam Trai babha,
Їa ngi ki khun Samla,
Ki nongpop ba la rem bad baswai;
Lyngba jingeh baroh,
Tang ha Me ai ngin snoh,
Lam ïa ngi sha burom jong Me, Trai.
Lynti jingïaid jong ngi,
Dap jingsniew ba jyrsieh,
Trai baieit, sha Me mynta ngi phai;
Jingma batriem ki ap,
Jingdum ïa ngi ka tap,
Lam ïa ngi sha burom jong Me, Trai.
Ynda jingtrei la wai,
Ngin ïoh shong bad Me, Trai,
Jingsuk jingkmen ngin shem ruh kyrhai;
Ha ka ri baphyrnai,
Long ma Me ka jingshai,
Lam ïa ngi sha burom jong Me, Trai.

hymns.author: B.C.L.
hymns.reference: To ialam Trai babha (628)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: To ïalam Trai babha (628)
hymns.db_name: 628. To ïalam Trai babha

lines: Tang kum u nongrah atiar, nga nga ïeng skhem,
Nga ap ban bud tang shu hukum U Syiem;
Ban tur, lada shaphrang U phah ïa nga,
Ryngkat bad U Kapten kum shipai babha.
chorus: Sngap, sngap ka jingpyrta!
‘Shaphrang,’ ka khot;
Khmih kiba artatien shadien ki ran,
Nga tip U Kapten Un shaniah ïa nga,
La tang nongrah atiar nga long shisha.

lines: Tang kum u nongrah atiar hapdeng ka thma,
Ki jingriam ba phyrnai nga don ban da;
Nga ap ban sngew ïa ka hukum ban poi,
Hangta hi ban jubab, Kynrad nga la kloi.
Tang kum u nongrah atiar nga long, hynrei,
Ngan ïoh ka pansngiat ba phyrnai U Blei;
Un burom ruh ha khmat ki paid ka bneng,
Lada ha ka thma haduh ba kut nga ïeng.

hymns.author: S. T.
hymns.reference: Tang kum u nongrah atiar nga nga ieng skhem (629)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Tang kum u nongrah atiar (629)
hymns.db_name: 629. Tang kum u nongrah atiar

lines: Shaphrang shipai! Shaphrang mynta!
Khrist U Kapten U dang pyrta;
Sha ka thyma ïa ngin ïamih,
Rah ka wait bad stieh!
chorus: Shaphrang! Shaphrang! U ong U Trai,
Wat tieng long shlur, ka bor Un ai;
Un ap, Un da ma U ïa ngi,
Katba sah ka sngi.

lines: Shaphrang shipai! to wat leh tud,
Sngew, U hukum, ïa U to bud;
Da U ngin jop, ïa ngi ïaleit,
Nongshun ngim khaweit.
Shaphrang shipai! ka hok ka neh,
La ka lama to nang kaweh;
Shen ‘Ka jingjop’ ngin ïoh riwai,
Bad U Khrist U Trai.

hymns.author: J. J.
hymns.reference: Shaphrang shipai Shaphrang mynta (630)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Shaphrang shipai! Shaphrang (630)
hymns.db_name: 630. Shaphrang shipai! Shaphrang

lines: Shipai U Khrist ka kam mynta ka dawa,
U Trai, ïa ngi baroh ban trei, U la phah;
Ka Balang ban tei, kyrteng jong U ban phla,
Ha pyrthei ba dum, dap jingthala.
chorus: To ngin pyrshang,
Їa ki kam kiba khraw na ka bynta U Blei
To khmih lynti
Їa ki kular kiba khraw na U hi.

lines: Shipai U Khrist, ka Gospel khie leit pynbna,
Sha ki jaitbynriew, ba na pop kin phai noh;
Jingsuk ban ai ha pyrthei dap jingkylla,
Dei tang h'U Jisu, jingim kin ïoh.
Namar U Khrist bad ka Balang ïeng mynta,
Katba por ka dang don, wat ai ngin buhteng;
To ngin iehnoh ka pyrthei bad jingsngewbha,
Ki jingeh baroh U Trai Un weng.

hymns.author: B.C.L.
hymns.reference: Shipai U Khrist ka kam mynta ka dawa (631)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Shipai U Khrist ka kam mynta (631)
hymns.db_name: 631. Shipai U Khrist ka kam mynta

lines: Їeng joit mynta, ka turoi ka la sawa jam,
Na kylleng sawdong ka wan jingpyrta;
Їa ngi ka khot, ki bor ka jingdum ban pyndam;
Ka jingshai U Khrist ngin pynpaw shynna.
chorus: Їeng mynta, kum ki Samla Khristan,
La jur ka thma to wat kynran;
Rah la ki atiar, jingdum kan shai kdar,
U Trai ki paid U don hajan;
Ka jingïaleh ka dang rhem mynta,
Ha ka bor jong U to shaniah;
Ha ka liang U Trai, ïeng khlem da tyngkai,
Jingjop bakhraw ha ngi Un ai.

lines: Kum kiba khlaiñ ha U Trai, ngin ïeng khlem
[sheptieng,
Ban tur shaphrang la ki jingeh ki wan;
Ngin pynkhreh ïalade, la ki atiar ngin kieng;
Ha por baroh Trai ïa ngi Un kyrshan.

hymns.author: B.C.L.
hymns.reference: Ieng joit mynta ka turoi ka la sawa jam (632)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ieng joit mynta, ka turoi ka la sawa (632)
hymns.db_name: 632. Їeng joit mynta, ka turoi ka la sawa

lines: Їaroh ï'U Blei ba pyrthei b'U la thaw,
Ka nam jong U ngin nang pynkhraw;
Ki khunswet, khun rangli, jaidbynriew baroh,
Kajuh ka jingieit ki ïa ïoh.
chorus: Sngap, phi, ki samla,
U Trai U dawa;
Ki kam babha baroh to trei,
Kane ka long jingkhot U Blei,
Met bad mynsiem ban pynim ngi dei.

lines: Kiba pang, shitom, baduk bad kyrduh,
Ki ud bym don jingkyrmen shuh;
Kiba shem jingjynjar, lanot bad shipa,
Їarap ïa ki da mon sngewbha.
Ka pyrthei hi jingsuk kam lah ban shem,
Ka wad jingshngaiñ bad jingsngewskhem;
Tang ïa U Jisu ha ka ban ai ngi dei,
Da met bad mynsiem ruh ngin trei.

hymns.author: B.C.L.
hymns.reference: Iaroh iU Blei ba pyrthei bU la thaw (633)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Iaroh ï'U Blei ba pyrthei b'U la thaw (633)
hymns.db_name: 633. Їaroh ï'U Blei ba pyrthei b'U la thaw

lines: Trai, pyllait da kaba kyrkhu,
Ai ka jingsuk hapoh ruh;
Na ka manna Gospel jong Me,
Ai ngin bam da kaba nguh;
To pyndap ka dohnud jong ngi
Da ka jingsngewbha na neng,
Te ngin ïaroh ïa Me junom
Bad ki angel khuid byneng;
To ngin riwai, to ngin ïaroh,
Їaroh ïa U Kypa bad U Khun,
Їa U Mynsiem ruh junom,
Haleluïa! Amen.

hymns.reference: Trai pyllait da kaba kyrkhu (634)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Trai, pyllait da kaba kyrkhu (634)
hymns.db_name: 634. Trai, pyllait da kaba kyrkhu

lines: Ki jingkyrkhu ka jingkular,
Kin sa hap kum ki umjer,
Na U kypa Uba isnei,
Ban ïoh synreit ka kyper,
Ki jingkyrkhu,
U la kular na byneng.
Ki jingkyrkhu kum u lapbah,
Їa ka dohnud ban pynjem;
Ale phi riewkhuid ruh baroh,
Ban ïa kyrpad to ïadem;
Ki jingkyrkhu,
Ban pynthymmai ïa ka kam.

hymns.reference: Ki jingkyrkhu ka jingkular (635)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ki jingkyrkhu ka jingkular (635)
hymns.db_name: 635. Ki jingkyrkhu ka jingkular

lines: Trai, phah mynta ka jingkyrkhu,
Ban pynkynduh ngi ba pop;
Jingieit jong Me ha ngi to buh,
Ba ha pop ngin ym ïai ngop;
Pynsmat ïa ngi,
Ba ïaid lyngba ka ri khlaw.
Jingnguh ngi ai bad jingmane,
Gospel Jisu ka la poi;
Ai ki soh jingpynim jong Me,
Ha ngi ban long ban kha roi;
Їaineh junom,
Bad kaba shisha ngin shem.

hymns.reference: Trai phah mynta ka jingkyrkhu (636)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Trai, phah mynta ka jingkyrkhu (636)
hymns.db_name: 636. Trai, phah mynta ka jingkyrkhu

lines: ‘U TYNRAI KI JINGKYRKHU’
Ah Me Tynrai ki jingkyrkhu,
Jingaiei na Me ki tuid;
Їa la ki briew Me ïai kyrkhu,
Jingisnei kum ki wah-duid;
Me ngan ïaroh, Me ngan burom,
Shilynter katba dang im.
Jingkyrkhu jong Me ki ïai shlei,
Ha jingim ki dap kyrhai;
La ha jingduk, jingpang shyrkhei,
Ha Me ym don jingkhuslai;
Me ngan nguh Syiem, ngan ai nam ruh,
Shilynter katba dang im.
Ah Me U Blei tang ma Me hi,
Ba pyndap ïa ngi ki briew;
Me bsa sim bneng, ki tiew lily,
Kin ym hap ha kaba sniew;
Me ngan kyntiew, ngan rwai ïaroh,
Shilynter katba dang im.

hymns.author: J.F.J.
hymns.reference: Ah Me Tynrai ki jingkyrkhu (637)
hymns.kyrteng_shuwa: Ah Me Tynrai ki jingkyrkhu (637)
hymns.db_name: 637. Ah Me Tynrai ki jingkyrkhu

lines: Hapoh ki jingkyrkhu jong Me,
Ngi ïakwah, Ah Trai, ban shong,
To pyndap ka dohnud jong ngi,
Khun ki jong Me ai ngin long;
Jingsuk jong Me,
Ha la ka sngi ruh to ai.

creed.title: KA JINGPHLA KA JINGNGEIT KI APOSTOL (Apostles’ Creed)

items.text:
Nga ngeit
 ha U Blei U Kpa Badonbor baroh, U Nongthaw ka bneng bad ka khyndew:

Bad ha U
 Jisu Khrist U Khun ba tang marwei jong U, U Trai jong ngi Uba
 la pun da U Mynsiem Bakhuid, Uba la kha na ka Mari Theisotti,
 Uba la shah shitom ha U Pontios Pilat, la Sahnarphna ïa U,
 U la ïap bad la tep ïa U; U la hiar sha ki riewïap; U la
 mihpat na kiba ïap ha ka Sngi kaba lai, U la kiew sha
 bneng bad U la shong ha ka kti kamon U Blei U Kpa
 Badonbor baroh; nangta Un wan ban bishar ïa
 kiba im bad kiba ïap.

Nga ngeit
 ha U Mynsiem Bakhuid, ka Balang Bakhuid shi tyllup ka pyrthei,
 ka Jingïasyllok ki riewkhuid, ka jingmap ïa ki pop; ka
 jingmihpat jong ka met, bad ka jingim
 bymjukut.

marquee:
“Naba U Blei U la ieit katta katta ia ka pyrthei katba u la aiti noh ia la
 U Khun ba la kha marwei, ba uei uei ruh uba ngeit ha u, un ym jot shuh, hynrei un
 ioh ia ka jingim bymjukut”.

items.text:
Ma Nga U Trai Uba U Blei jong Me, Uba la wallam noh
 ïa me na ka Ri Ijipt, na ka ïing ka jinglongmraw.
Men ym ïoh kiwei kiwei ki blei nalor jong Nga.

Men ym thaw bleithaw ïa lade, lymne ïa ka dur jong
 kaei kaei ruh kaba don ha bneng sha jrong, lymne
 ha ka khyndew shapoh, lymne ha ka um hapoh ka khyndew;
 Men ym dem ïa ki, lymne shakri ïa ki: naba Nga U
 Trai Uba U Blei jong me, Nga long U Blei uba thut
 shen, Uba pynwan ïa ki jingpalat ki kpa ha ki khun,
 haduh kaba lai bad kaba saw pateng bynriew jong kiba
 isih ïa Nga, bad Uba leh isynei ïa ki hajar, kiba ieit ïa
 Nga, bad kiba sumar ruh ïa ki Hukum jong Nga.

Men ym ong thala ïa ka kyrteng U Trai U Blei
 jong me; naba U Trai Un ym pynksan ïa uba ong thala
 ïa ka kyrteng jong U.

Kynmaw ïa ka Sngi Sabbaton, ban rakhe khuid ïa ka.
 Hynriew sngi men trei, bad men leh ïa ka kam jong me
 baroh: hynrei ka sngi kaba hynñiew ka long ka
 Sabbaton ïa U Trai U Blei jong me: ha kata men ym
 leh kaei kaei ruh ka kam, ma me, lymne u khun jong
 me, lymne ka khun jong me, lymne u mraw jong me,
 lymne ka mraw jong me, lymne ka jingri jong me, lymne u nongwei hapoh ka
 phalor jong me; naba ha ki hynriew sngi U Trai U la
 thaw ïa ka bneng bad ka khyndew, ïa ka duriaw ruh,
 bad ïa baroh katba don ha ki, U la shong sngi ruh ha kata ka
 sngi kaba hynñiew: namarkata, U Trai U la kyrkhu ïa
 ka Sngi Sabbaton, bad U la pynkyntang khuid ïa ka ruh.

Burom ïa la u kpa bad ïa la ka kmie: ba yn pynslem ïa ka
 rta jong me ha ka khyndew, ïa kaba U Trai Uba U Blei
 jong me U ai ha me.
Men ym sakhi lamler ïa u paramarjan jong me.

Men ym ikwah ia ka ïing u paramarjan jong me, men
 ym ikwah ïa ka tnga u paramarjan jong me, lymne ïa
 u mraw jong u, lymne ïa ka mraw jong u, lymne ïa u
 masi jong u, lymne ïa u kada jong u, lymne ïa kaei kaei
 ruh kaba dei ka jong u paramarjan jong me.

Men ieit ïa U Trai uba U Blei jong me da ka dohnud
 jong me baroh, bad da ka mynsiem jong me baroh, bad
 da ka jingmut jong me baroh.

Men ieit ïa u paramarjan jong me kumba ïa lade (Ha
 kita ki ar hukum la sdien ïa ka hukum baroh, bad ïa ki
 nongïathuhlypa).
